Subject: I can't sleep

Peter -- I know it's late, but I've been up all night looking over my October numbers.

I hate to bother you, but this is important, **we are still thousands of dollars short of my major End of Month goal.**
_When I heard my opponent raised $4 million in a few weeks,**I was surprised.**

When I heard she outraised me again in quarter 3, **I was worried.**

And now, looking at the numbers for this month, **I am terrified. **_

We are minutes away from our meeting and we are just $1,482 SHORT. | | "Countdown" | | | "HELP MARCO>>>" Look, Peter, this cycle, Democrats are trying to repeat EXACTLY what they did in Georgia, Arizona, Colorado, and Nevada. They want to keep expanding their Majority in the Senate. WE MUST STOP THEM. YOU can help change the course of history right now. By helping before our meeting, you will be letting us know that you STOOD UP against the dangerous Left when we needed you most. | | | "Will you step up?" \----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Begin forwarded message From: Marco Rubio "< marco@act.marcorubio.com>" To: Peter Subject: I can't sleep Peter -- I know it's late, but I've been up all night looking over my October numbers. I hate to bother you, but this is important, we are still thousands of dollars short of my major End of Month goal. When I heard my opponent raised $4 million in a few weeks,I was surprised. When I heard she outraised me again in quarter 3, I was worried. And now, looking at the numbers for this month, I am terrified. | | | "STAND WITH MARCO NOW" We make goals so that we don't get outraised, and since we keep failing to hit our goals, my opponent gains more and more momentum. Peter, my race will determine control of the Senate and the fate of Trump's legacy, and here is what I'm going to do... I'm calling an EMERGENCY MEETING about the October numbers with all of my senior staff tomorrow morning and I need to raise $30,000 before we sit down at the table. So, I'm begging you to take a stand before my meeting. Please, don't let Trump and me down again: "<< DONATE $15>>" "<< DONATE $30>>" "<< DONATE $45>>" "<< DONATE $75>>" "<< DONATE $150>>" "<< DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT>>" I won't take up any more of your time, but know that I really appreciate it. I'll be checking the donor list first thing in the morning. Marco Rubio | | | | "MarcoRubioFooter" | Personal note from Marco Rubio: Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again. Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate. If you stand with me, "please click here to donate now"**. Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=dfe8217971704a168ade1d585ee7af3d&_e=vXUSxCRP3eEk3fN--S9P_AhuI24X7uuXmFnEMepxTnDLqaVc23whLrflEX4zrkBx-CSZMeQeUyexIEA2yPExrhYfap4Rs5LyQ5RrSffmssXP5SQp6hrPijW8sqs8u9Sepef_w6-1pY3qDt4lNQBbdGt_WS2Vcc4BkHLx8PR11I3W1okCPP3xlCCKyIWdIE7s-X087ygT-dY9KXNJCLveVu4Jj_AXljTn3vrtQ9RJGRltKzjEVq9g212kiTNmRDL1hvxpCe_-B9PMixVG8MVGREuwGgW1Ul8JkCq209CI1ZzD6VhYsDxUAVMWt16azDoeQi1df1LYvna7cecUztxn1EPQq4nRA0wCgbVba5Sf9Vpoowi1DQdIVIAQWD7yjowMbWZHAMYfgc6cdsF4ew5APAqDQ4A6YA5TnxRHGsIJ7exvoCtChSjLDrO1hcOgr7eAqu1X4oraleL-sr_RJFmUCA%3D%3D) **

I am running against Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud Democrat who has voted for every idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=dfe8217971704a168ade1d585ee7af3d&_e=vXUSxCRP3eEk3fN--S9P_AhuI24X7uuXmFnEMepxTnDLqaVc23whLrflEX4zrkBx-CSZMeQeUyexIEA2yPExrhYfap4Rs5LyQ5RrSffmssXP5SQp6hrPijW8sqs8u9Sepef_w6-1pY3qDt4lNQBbdGt_WS2Vcc4BkHLx8PR11I3W1okCPP3xlCCKyIWdIE7s-X087ygT-dY9KXNJCLveVu4Jj_AXljTn3vrtQ9RJGRltKzjEVq9g212kiTNmRDL1SY3jTBotQzVUraNc2mFAvP4Tmb9wXw4twhq1mSTWBO9MSJ-SK7fUDabTdkMOVz3C_ueGJn0-NKIHY_hgRAMnfgTEfB6rXK7PY5FUvPpspVSDhmO6gwRvWibwahQcr-t4OmvbykDJAn84pCvQTESprkP1TZpXJpa_WoPCzJkzz11qJ6Re7LUjiATd4mLKAkzSGiSimV6elTWtf6DyaPCLQg%3D%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

clean_body: If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! | Fellow Conservative, I’ve been on a lot of teams. From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, I know what makes a good teammate. We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win. Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia. I am running against Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud Democrat who has voted for every idea that’s come across his desk in Washington. He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government. This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. Georgians deserve better.America deserves better. As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team. I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=1)
---
### November 1, 2021
Friend -- We hope you are enjoying the transition to fall! Despite the colder weather, things are heating up here at the Republican Party of Wisconsin. We continue to hold and participate in grassroots events across the state and meet with leaders in every corner of Wisconsin about how we can strategize and win together in 2022. Republicans also remain laser-focused on election integrity. The latest Legislative Audit Bureau report revealed a number of issues that need to be addressed, and the news out of Racine County is forcing Democrats to address the serious concerns that Wisconsinites have been raising. Republicans will always fight to secure the integrity of our elections, and we continue to support the measures taken to ensure that all Wiscosninites can have confidence that their vote counts. You can read more about some of the top issues below. \- Team WisGOP | Last week, the Racine County Sheriff’s Department released bombshell evidence of fraud in nursing homes. After WEC suspended requirements for special voting deputies and instructed staff at nursing homes to commit a felony by voting on behalf of vulnerable residents, the Racine County Sheriff's Department uncovered dozens of cases of fraud after a 10 month-long investigation. Read more from Dan O’Donnell [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=nV7BfVKeJi0zWKBWeoL2El5uI2cTAgHpDbS6q5lUu-vebymCRBYrWeyRpIyl2wezzjuraovZhQuJtROaiq5mnpr1fu_Af5iqRExNrwkigGToOWamyEjzAhfWkGoUsSe5Mhwih2sX6YhPjaALt-0EtTV6gfouoS0eMxAbehV1GK2IgrvkVAyvn0CYrdRI4-82afuOm5pieMMXJ6xl9gwpzg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=2). The Republican Party of Wisconsin released a [**statement**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAXmB4Iggy19d7tH3LbXcHQ544TYOyKq6S6ZvOKD-1QxwJ9H4i_QxxHqkzEtLiIvRSA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=3) calling on Democrats, the Department of Justice, and the media to now take election integrity concerns seriously. Assembly Speaker Robin Vos [**called**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvAxWlpAtVuj7yeh25EjXzfLN2Sf4xuipAlsXl-xVtw_cAzjgBw1Q9Ld5zAqKzNFrQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=4) for the resignation of WEC Administration Meagan Wolfe. After Racine County law enforcement bravely brought this issue to light, it is likely that more instances will be uncovered. Concerned citizens can check on the voting records of their loved ones using [**myvote.wi.gov**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=NuzoZ2n1207BlUl6yQ2Ei2ExezP-3nmxsJViPmfe8Lo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=5). The WisGOP recently hosted a grand reopening of our Milwaukee HQ located in the Bronzeville neighborhood on the city’s north side. Senator Tim Scott spoke at the event, encouraging grassroots activists to “go where you’re not invited” as Republicans work to spread the conservative message. This headquarters has allowed Republicans to forge relationships and make significant gains in the Black community. You can read more about the event in the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouNBHja3sfdY8_xeAgIvnS9TUR50HuAhheIQ5M2XGX3DtR1_thWWLYyH8_Jfyk-DZ5Fr_SQg2zt_dmn1AIRyQfFq5aIkW-Z3IAwlxuinREAMYMgCZ9ngu-b1u-9SWhNQTpQtpRyadFIOBw0qEAOxsQm82ks5KhoBz0accIuN9QTnmimrd2WoB9222ncNgOAsGqo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=6). | | The WisGOP Election Integrity Dashboard is continuously updated with information on Republicans’ efforts to secure election integrity in Wisconsin. In addition to updates on Democrats’ efforts to undermine confidence in our elections and links to important documents like the Legislative Audit Bureau’s 2020 report, the dashboard outlines how the WisGOP is fighting back to ensure our elections are free, fair, and secure. Visit [**wisgop.org/election-integrity**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eH7mQqnwg7TiRkzkxQsBEjYN0qYIVr_dl05xpqOQV0I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=7) to check out the latest information and view a summary of the election integrity bills that Republicans are putting forward in the Legislature. On Friday, WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow moderated a conversation between Congressman Mike Gallagher and northeastern Wisconsin manufacturers. These business owners discussed the impact of Joe Biden’s failed policies on their business, including widespread supply chain problems, inflation, and a crushing workforce shortage. Meanwhile, Democrats continue to push even more taxes and spending to the tune of $3.5 trillion that will only further hurt businesses and families. You can watch the full livestream of the event on our Facebook [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6pU3oVlzc5JzyubOWNnJo5ov2Qu25R9KdbJN1B7JlQdRe5JjA7tHlTqbleBuGYIIBiU_EgiFRFfJQUUeg-i-KdBg5BdjHaBNDKwTwYNaUhdXMk_dMfeto3WJjKw5hqPg4Ir83ifzmDHWEMhBzTEaYcSyKbVDF7QZDXgRqjnps6lbj1qzPb7bn1LW4-Fb3tP20huDDC9r7t4Fd7n9pPKli1NseSTxo9vjbYVElAYMK8yePjPwJQ1vp7AK_SdvIQiVPm0VeLeZguvg11CO8_WYP9q5P3_DuY_ToXgKi3OA4_twJWipGanH3nm1YezINs_QpkkUlRJ1L0ANbrP_mDLCS1o&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=8).
---|---|---

[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=9) | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our **[website](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=10)**.
---|---|---

### **In Case You Missed It...**
### _**[Teachers Union Tony Evers Fails Wisconsin Students](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0RNxilU3l3lzNwGsxbUXu0oVEuYuIK21M865pKlgD8BDTiNuC9LQlh_4MHE-Qy68cNUQMZxa4H6aQSCeE3iWDf8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=11)
**_
Student performance is cratering under self-proclaimed “education governor” Tony Evers. According to newly-released Department of Public Instruction data, standardized test scores are plummeting on Evers’ watch — despite the over $2 billion in state support added to K-12 education in recent years, on top of the over $2.6 billion in federal COVID-19 aid sent to Wisconsin schools.
### [_**What They’re Saying: Bidenflation Hits Wisconsin**_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0UUT5kNHhproYMsZ99i1s_pl4xQsuZX-Ek7W6dTAFJKOsGkQZQhj3dicXt0CbyAaEuEenqhCrNzdCOUfgg9z46g&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=12)
Wisconsinites are grappling with the costly impact of Bidenflation. While Democrats continue to push even more tax-and-spend policies that would only exacerbate the problem, Wisconsin families are already struggling to keep up with rising prices on everyday goods — with total costs amounting to an extra $175 a month per household. As inflation crushes sectors from energy to agriculture, the Joe Biden economy is failing Wisconsin families.
### [_**Statement on the Freedom to “Cheat” Act**_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAXsBpYmGXcc53q_dpJH7Og11NfGTAU6M9OksXcJImH-sboC-a6IwL86hMIXR419HVc&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_1_2021_v4&n=13)
Wisconsinites want election integrity, not a federal takeover of our elections. While Tammy Baldwin confirmed her loyalty to coastal liberals with her Freedom to ‘Cheat’ vote, we thank Senator Johnson for standing up for election integrity and rejecting Democrats’ dishonest attempt to seize control and slant elections in their favor.
* * *

In addition to updates on Democrats’ efforts to undermine confidence in our elections and links to important documents like the Legislative Audit Bureau’s 2020 report, the dashboard outlines how the WisGOP is fighting back to ensure our elections are free, fair, and secure. Visit to check out the latest information and view a summary of the election integrity bills that Republicans are putting forward in the Legislature. On Friday, WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow moderated a conversation between Congressman Mike Gallagher and northeastern Wisconsin manufacturers. These business owners discussed the impact of Joe Biden’s failed policies on their business, including widespread supply chain problems, inflation, and a crushing workforce shortage. Meanwhile, Democrats continue to push even more taxes and spending to the tune of $3.5 trillion that will only further hurt businesses and families. You can watch the full livestream of the event on our Facebook . ---|---|--- | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our . ---|---|--- In Case You Missed It... Student performance is cratering under self-proclaimed “education governor” Tony Evers. According to newly-released Department of Public Instruction data, standardized test scores are plummeting on Evers’ watch — despite the over $2 billion in state support added to K-12 education in recent years, on top of the over $2.6 billion in federal COVID-19 aid sent to Wisconsin schools. Wisconsinites are grappling with the costly impact of Bidenflation. While Democrats continue to push even more tax-and-spend policies that would only exacerbate the problem, Wisconsin families are already struggling to keep up with rising prices on everyday goods — with total costs amounting to an extra $175 a month per household. As inflation crushes sectors from energy to agriculture, the Joe Biden economy is failing Wisconsin families. Wisconsinites want election integrity, not a federal takeover of our elections. While Tammy Baldwin confirmed her loyalty to coastal liberals with her Freedom to ‘Cheat’ vote, we thank Senator Johnson for standing up for election integrity and rejecting Democrats’ dishonest attempt to seize control and slant elections in their favor. Worth the Read | | ---|---|--- Top Sharable Content

name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: Stop my uncle’s 2024 campaign in its tracks
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
This is critical | | |
---
| | Last year, we worked tirelessly to reject Donald Trump’s politics of hate and division. We stood up for our future and voted for progress. Now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump’s candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is appealing to Donald Trump’s base. He’s been endorsed by my uncle eight times. And he’s trafficking in right-wing extremism. If Glenn Youngkin wins in Virginia, Donald Trump will have all the momentum he needs to launch his 2024 comeback plan. **But, we can choose a better way.** We can choose to fight for Terry McAuliffe, a proven leader who can make tough decisions and get things done for the people he’s elected to serve. We can choose progress, inclusivity, and honesty. **[But only if we all do our part. So right now, please split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Steve Sisolak. clean_body: This is critical | | | | | Last year, we worked tirelessly to reject Donald Trump’s politics of hate and division. We stood up for our future and voted for progress. Now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump’s candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is appealing to Donald Trump’s base. He’s been endorsed by my uncle eight times. And he’s trafficking in right-wing extremism. If Glenn Youngkin wins in Virginia, Donald Trump will have all the momentum he needs to launch his 2024 comeback plan. But, we can choose a better way. We can choose to fight for Terry McAuliffe, a proven leader who can make tough decisions and get things done for the people he’s elected to serve. We can choose progress, inclusivity, and honesty. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being part of this campaign — now let’s finish strong! – Dr. Mary L. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Need your eyes on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
(hear me out)
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38208831/314431908/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.01_TM_10KW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk0MzA3My1iZjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ODQNqqGRY7Z4KAo3FVRHyBshBR-QOZPo06lbuIMLIKU=)

| | Derek, today is Election Day. **_[_(If you’re already up to date on the stakes in today's must-win race against a Trump acolyte, you can click here to rush a contribution before the polls open.)_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38208832/314431909/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.01_TM_10KW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk0MzA3My1iZjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ODQNqqGRY7Z4KAo3FVRHyBshBR-QOZPo06lbuIMLIKU=)_**

Last year, Democrats turned out in record-breaking numbers to defeat Donald Trump and choose a better path for the future of our country.

We voted _against_ hatred, lies and division. We voted _for_ democracy, unity, and truth.

But now, all of our progress is under attack.

Derek, consider this: one of Glenn Youngkin’s biggest backers helped fund the January 6th insurrection. Youngkin himself has made peddling the ‘big lie’ the signature issue of his campaign.

Friend -- Polls are open, and I would be honored to have your vote today. This Commonwealth needs fresh voices and ideas as we enter this new Virginia decade that reflect who we are, what we value, and where we're going. My commitment to giving a voice to those left behind is unflinching, and we will work tirelessly over the years ahead to make Virginia stronger and more just for every citizen. That starts with keeping our Democratic Majority in the House and securing another statewide sweep this year. **Polls are open until 7:00PM. Please visit [iwillvote.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/qET9Ye2upfu1W4_WiE-qK_4qglQAtH6eKWF0QWUnbxo=/hLa8z9IYN1NFxFX5-RKdwHHOSzNxawTl94m6cZiEM5o=) to confirm your polling location before you head to the polls today.** I hope I can count on your support for Democrats up and down the ticket! \- Jay Jones

name: Beth Van Duyne
subject: Biden and Harris’ planned invasion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden’s Border Crisis has gone on for far too long... and we have to build the wall to help stop it! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8931%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=8GeqHWKyX9urGLdJoknTpw&sysid=1)
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17535%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LWdMhRSJi1ROmKAsu08FXw&sysid=1)
---
| Friend, **Biden’s Border Crisis has gone on for far too long ... and we have to build the wall to help stop it!** Biden has shown he has no sympathy especially for border states. He has blocked our efforts to secure the border, and has ensured drug cartels and human traffickers are empowered to push an illegal immigrant invasion! Biden and Harris **_planned_** this border crisis and now they are doing all they can to draw it out. **They are packing America with illegal immigrants, attacking our border patrol agents, and allowing over 6.68 TONS of illegal drugs to enter our country, all in an effort to satisfy the Marxist Left!** When President Trump was in office we saw what a secure border can look like.** However, Biden’s policies are not meant to bring security to the American people - they’re meant to ensure a Democrat victory after he passes mass amnesty for the millions of illegals he has let in!** We have to come up with more effective enforcement measures before it’s too late. This is why I want to know where you stand. [_**Do you think our country needs a border wall?**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17536%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KalKmxRsT0suXbKpMBzP2A&sysid=1)
---
| [LET US KNOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17537%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uCEz2vtrZ3v09GVz4ZRDTw&sysid=1 "LET US KNOW")
---
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17535%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LWdMhRSJi1ROmKAsu08FXw&sysid=1)
---
| Biden has taken any effective means of enforcing our immigration laws and thrown them out the window. **Massive caravans of tens of thousands, being aided and supported by drug cartels, are on the move because they know Biden will let them in and then fly them around the country when he thinks no one is watching! ** Biden and Harris planned this from the start, and unless we take a stand soon, this trend will only grow worse. [_**I am counting on you to take the poll to tell us if you agree, we need the border wall!**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17538%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=frxdiyrWjJxyOhsvN407uA&sysid=1)
---
| [DO YOU SUPPORT BUILDING A WALL?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17539%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DWfolaCrpFYWOR0Oc2wlJg&sysid=1 "DO YOU SUPPORT BUILDING A WALL?")
---
| **For Texas and America, ** _Beth Van Duyne_

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpgnnv1nnatqhe2o9crd45g9hcpd3f2qnq58u950_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3gmeoj2cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdavsl06lbj78pro2j8uq7tsult86lcdnaq6o31g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3gmeoj2cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7l35m3l9epolu2r7ddc5ldsev88u3qjo22ivuf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3gmeoj2cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zbvlrs5r2h7gp7amdm0aag810fd0fq4th27r4pn0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2t4dd8fiheh7o8qa0naoqf8hm4pdg1q64au9a5o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6clge2pr2c9hm49fg)

While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z023b38cpv9gl2rse2iu9a89mgbqv5spa5pf6mt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3gmeoj4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: Remember to vote today, our children’s future depends on it.
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Em-4U_QvDkFDlmMJ-wzcllvXrn_GeOjQlL9A-5IRXCYlBIxXDbWhKv10h1fZxoU8tjk1vUqO5-GcOt_DsA7e-1Qw-eLdyvmTsXAiwz7ls9sTq0_JnhV1caKR5hjvA_EjiR4iUQfFXnqCkAXZYVU7qS80BRVw0PaQfI3nzMxVu4ts6OtjgPYhBA==&c=yIxre0GlgeHOYvXPip6g7eJWnG-DjomD5AvwM8K6ChXnKJkb5rXydw==&ch=UYvYI7H2rz4KFbL0JBAtyGJHHSiuO7oTiZ4SZJ78RFyAEig6rRmHfg==)
---
| Peter,
The left is determined to fundamentally change our country. We know this because they have stated it. And they are starting with our classrooms. They want to brainwash our children with the Marxist-based philosophy of Critical Race Theory (CRT).

---
|
---
|
In case you missed it, I recently wrote an [op-ed ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Em-4U_QvDkFDlmMJ-wzcllvXrn_GeOjQlL9A-5IRXCYlBIxXDbWhKjcksphTN5ESnyGxqyEiW80CuLyCa8cMF_-rUWis0pUxMX2GunuuLJJh9Trv7pH3HCa5JDO4OjJcZw4oBx176k7_X7RO2J7QR-8fUTF3n76eC4MYPWp_-yNrVGk9YAnW5T9aFmlOV0dEhdEAf2dwNw9eZp-Slnoa5rCTAVysLfX-J25weiBfbFVdEltcHpSzE41HcZia7bqE55YVaal1sDAdkcTNnCLT5BFwt5hED4nbLLLMj6Z-8kpbJ98wSiJ1ywa6qJT_-9no3cbWWWtpltLS1GkqlWnnog-fcEPYjpzs&c=yIxre0GlgeHOYvXPip6g7eJWnG-DjomD5AvwM8K6ChXnKJkb5rXydw==&ch=UYvYI7H2rz4KFbL0JBAtyGJHHSiuO7oTiZ4SZJ78RFyAEig6rRmHfg==)that the Cleveland Plain Dealer refused to run.
Recently the paper attempted to "cancel" the State School Board members who voted to repeal teaching CRT by printing their names and biographies. The CPD also reported that they removed the "anti-racism curriculum" from our classrooms.
In reality, the paper didn't "cancel" them, they let us know which school board members are standing firm against the anti-American wokeism being forced on our children. In the minds of most in America, these school board members are American heroes.
Like most on the left, I guess the editorial board isn't a fan of anyone who dares to disagree with them. However, some in the media, like the Ohio Press Network, will publish the truth regarding the leftist infiltration of our school systems. Read my full op-ed which appeared on their site [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Em-4U_QvDkFDlmMJ-wzcllvXrn_GeOjQlL9A-5IRXCYlBIxXDbWhKjcksphTN5ESnyGxqyEiW80CuLyCa8cMF_-rUWis0pUxMX2GunuuLJJh9Trv7pH3HCa5JDO4OjJcZw4oBx176k7_X7RO2J7QR-8fUTF3n76eC4MYPWp_-yNrVGk9YAnW5T9aFmlOV0dEhdEAf2dwNw9eZp-Slnoa5rCTAVysLfX-J25weiBfbFVdEltcHpSzE41HcZia7bqE55YVaal1sDAdkcTNnCLT5BFwt5hED4nbLLLMj6Z-8kpbJ98wSiJ1ywa6qJT_-9no3cbWWWtpltLS1GkqlWnnog-fcEPYjpzs&c=yIxre0GlgeHOYvXPip6g7eJWnG-DjomD5AvwM8K6ChXnKJkb5rXydw==&ch=UYvYI7H2rz4KFbL0JBAtyGJHHSiuO7oTiZ4SZJ78RFyAEig6rRmHfg==).

---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Em-4U_QvDkFDlmMJ-wzcllvXrn_GeOjQlL9A-5IRXCYlBIxXDbWhKjcksphTN5ESnyGxqyEiW80CuLyCa8cMF_-rUWis0pUxMX2GunuuLJJh9Trv7pH3HCa5JDO4OjJcZw4oBx176k7_X7RO2J7QR-8fUTF3n76eC4MYPWp_-yNrVGk9YAnW5T9aFmlOV0dEhdEAf2dwNw9eZp-Slnoa5rCTAVysLfX-J25weiBfbFVdEltcHpSzE41HcZia7bqE55YVaal1sDAdkcTNnCLT5BFwt5hED4nbLLLMj6Z-8kpbJ98wSiJ1ywa6qJT_-9no3cbWWWtpltLS1GkqlWnnog-fcEPYjpzs&c=yIxre0GlgeHOYvXPip6g7eJWnG-DjomD5AvwM8K6ChXnKJkb5rXydw==&ch=UYvYI7H2rz4KFbL0JBAtyGJHHSiuO7oTiZ4SZJ78RFyAEig6rRmHfg==)
---

In addition to trying to take over our schools, the left is letting our border be overrun. Why? Because they want the votes of illegal immigrants. Our latest television ad addresses this very issue.

The polls are now officially OPEN in Virginia and it’s time to get out and VOTE.** Today, with the eyes of the nation upon us, we have a chance to send a message about who we are as a Commonwealth, what we believe in and where we are going as a country. | | [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38210036/314437464/852988634?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWI1ZjMxZC1jZTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_W4KURdlQku07XJr_JPP4eaZR5ikhOUpG7aGA-1Htww=&emci=aa9aefe7-4c3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6ab5f31d-ce3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9499186)
---
We vote today because we believe in justice, equality and opportunity for ALL Virginians. We vote because affordable healthcare and reproductive rights are on the line. We vote to protect the common-sense gun reforms we’ve already passed and keep our communities safe. We vote for criminal justice reform, supporting teachers and public education, and we vote because dangerous Trump extremism has no place here in our Commonwealth.
**Today, I am asking you to believe in what we can accomplish together. Believe in the future of Virginia and vote to keep us moving forward.** Imagine a Commonwealth that is freer, fairer, and more equitable. Where good-paying jobs, affordable healthcare and great schools are available to every family. A Virginia that actually prioritizes _you_.
This can be our future if you show up today! Voting is easy here in Virginia, and it has never been more important that you make your voice heard before the polls close at 7:00 pm.
| [FIND OUT HOW TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38210037/314437465/852988634?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWI1ZjMxZC1jZTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_W4KURdlQku07XJr_JPP4eaZR5ikhOUpG7aGA-1Htww=&emci=aa9aefe7-4c3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6ab5f31d-ce3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9499186)
---
Thank you for all your support, and remember to VOTE for Virginia’s future today!
Sincerely,
Mark Herring

**Attorney General Mark Herring is fighting every day for justice, equality, and opportunity for ALL Virginians.** _"Serving as your Attorney General has been the honor of my life. I've proudly worked on your behalf to expand and secure the rights of our fellow Virginians, and to show Virginians a new vision for what their Attorney General can do for them. The progress we’ve made has been historic, but the work isn’t done."_ **[Will you contribute now to help Mark win re-election and get back to work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38210041/314437469/724836884?refcode=Efooter-SL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWI1ZjMxZC1jZTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_W4KURdlQku07XJr_JPP4eaZR5ikhOUpG7aGA-1Htww=)** | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38210042/314437470/724836884?refcode=Efooter-SB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWI1ZjMxZC1jZTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_W4KURdlQku07XJr_JPP4eaZR5ikhOUpG7aGA-1Htww=)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdcgmcg7b8pm8ghbr6im6qb7u54ltepf86qu36u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im0o74c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5dmdgp7buvg37d30lpvcrautrsbtontv4ejnit8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im0o74c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7n6eig9cko1ss3tlfvkp7njcq2608ls77b0u0q0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im0o74c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: GOP Presidential
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zptf9hpk85brgogd6iku5mtu7raqok3inh8vinl8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im4or6c3h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj3qlr3o8es9m0vp0eeua9stpijjkuc2a40cujoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im4or6c3h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9iunolhsidpksmstl9b4v8iieujt57ca3gdiil8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im4or6c3h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: NextGen Pennsylvania
subject: It’s time to vote!
body:
Election day is here!

| | Friend, **Today’s the day! If you haven’t voted already, you get to head to the polls and help build a Pennsylvania that reflects all of us. ** Elections like the one happening today for Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court directly impact the daily lives of everyone in our community, so it’s crucial we all do our part and *literally* get out the vote. **[Act now: Find out where to vote today with our polling locator!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38210635/314440317/-1583566188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjFlNDI2ZC1kNDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap5dj4nmeS_D7VmPpwuek94ZEzck60KX_8QMcmRcHkU=&emci=9745db04-2c3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ff1e426d-d43b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172)** **Remember, voting takes place today from 7:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m ET, and if you’re in line by 8:00 p.m., you can still vote.** Young voters made history in 2020, and we want to keep that momentum going. name: Roger Misso
subject: BREAKING: FEC rules foreign money can fund political campaigns - HELP US FIGHT BACK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

In a shocking, puzzling decision, the Federal Election Commission ruled this week that [foreign donors can funnel money to American political campaigns.](https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/eekTRRiVMTIY84ZM4og-lhGEafbTCqPIMyj7d6PLPYE=?amp=1) Though the ruling was limited to ballot measures, **it opens the door to unlimited foreign influence in our elections** , and will make it easier to fund campaigns supporting gerrymandering, restricting a woman's right to choose, and denying civil rights to all Americans.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/vMsFR2a45jANuGgkINPRY2gXb3he8HGtXaMKxT1KoYo=)
Make no mistake - [_**this is a MAJOR disaster-waiting-to-happen and a national security issue of the highest magnitude.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/vMsFR2a45jANuGgkINPRY2gXb3he8HGtXaMKxT1KoYo=) **WE MUST FIGHT BACK.**

At Taking the Hill, we work to elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress. Each of our candidates backs strong and immediate action on campaign finance reform - [_**and w**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/vMsFR2a45jANuGgkINPRY2gXb3he8HGtXaMKxT1KoYo=) _**[e need them to get elected ASAP to put an end to foreign influence in our elections!](https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/vMsFR2a45jANuGgkINPRY2gXb3he8HGtXaMKxT1KoYo=)**_

**That 's why we need you. **[_**Can you chip in a donation right now to help us raise $15,000 today to launch a video and voter information campaign against this horrific decision? When we create this video, we will provide it free for our candidates so that it reaches voters all over the country - to show the FEC that their decision will not stand in America.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/vMsFR2a45jANuGgkINPRY2gXb3he8HGtXaMKxT1KoYo=)

Do not let foreign interference in our elections go unanswered. **Let us stand strong and united in defense of our democracy!**

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/KXI2iyutkIOGy6zJTDMlOyvM-MFvZOowcpIQe1d6N3s=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/9FRwzWp45NowHilsu-T2tTv7I1r72aGGvA8P2VoZHiA=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/H3dpmbd7ryKcJIwmqi1rAjck43_-hXPLpfMjtHArz8M= "https://act.myngp.com/el/i6CyX1o0JmVxY2bOY1jaPagosVGixS_FaP3P5eJM9cU=/H3dpmbd7ryKcJIwmqi1rAjck43_-hXPLpfMjtHArz8M=").

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Help Geoff Diehl Become Governor!
body:
Build the Movement
| | | |
---
---
|
---
Friends,
I am thrilled to let you know that our campaign has experienced an incredible outpouring of support from voters across the state since we announced in July of this year!
So how can you get involved to support Geoff Diehl to be your next Governor of Massachusetts?
Join Your Local Republican Town or City Committee
The first hurdle to cross for the Diehl campaign is winning at the Massachusetts Republican State Convention, which will be held on May 21, 2022, in Springfield, MA. If you are a member of your local city or town committee, you are eligible to be a delegate to the state convention, where you can cast your vote to nominate the candidates to best represent the MassGOP.
If you want a voice in this election, you can have it! But you must be listed as a member of your town or city committee by DECEMBER 31, 2021, and you must be registered as a Republican.
Please check whether you are currently a member of your local committee here: [OCPF Filers Page ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ytspch9FVfPf1_quiW_qL84fh5tgY5st9U8REB5pDKYY_I10X0CffcvL98Fy1MRSqweoZK_gDRFtEo1sxluhdN1iYRq3EMM3qHetEUyTJv7Oeywm9qyEEzguzHUDVzmzvuKrxNAduSx9vrzP-1RW_VDF_LhTCVCW&c=UeudK1BdO6Xms2jfYJgN9bGe4uwNNFDAkAmvufOGHCyArpkMrxMg6w==&ch=5q1hMKn8pSZ2ymO6PIlhI5-ygCMyNcVYM2JLH5IO1OvyK8g-e-X8zQ==). Select "Local Party Committees/Republican," and type in your town/city's name.
If you'd like to become a member and be eligible to be a delegate, please contact the Chairperson of that committee, attend their next meeting, and ask to be voted in and added to the member list. Then, follow up with them to ensure they file their committee paperwork with your name as a member with OCPF before DECEMBER 31, 2021.
If your town does not have a Republican committee registered on OCPF, please contact us, and we will assist you in forming one.
If you have questions about this important step you can take to ensure a Diehl victory, please contact our campaign: [info@geoffdiehl.com](mailto:amanda@geoffdiehl.com).

---
|
---
|

---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
[Diehl for Massachusetts ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ytspch9FVfPf1_quiW_qL84fh5tgY5st9U8REB5pDKYY_I10X0CffdkeL9TCiWsW4URYeN7Gi30QKkgGffmxoCs1qi1GXDs8f2R5B_Rp7zZV4FkiNB5qbQbRA4OIrIa9Wv8-jHFIDFJVD-GY_RClr8OQroKJ4dkqZLIoN7TtsPvkO8FuOItpCw==&c=UeudK1BdO6Xms2jfYJgN9bGe4uwNNFDAkAmvufOGHCyArpkMrxMg6w==&ch=5q1hMKn8pSZ2ymO6PIlhI5-ygCMyNcVYM2JLH5IO1OvyK8g-e-X8zQ==)

name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: LAST CHANCE: VA LT GOV Winsome Sears
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58670586:6vhUIM2AN:m:1:3298722022:222C644E53D3C0D4C13E727ECC491362:r "Winsome Sears") Peter: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58670586:6vhUIM2AN:m:1:3298722022:222C644E53D3C0D4C13E727ECC491362:r "Winsome
Sears")Old Joe isn't going to like this one. **That is because the Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor in Virginia is:**
* A Marine
* A Conservative
* A Woman
* Black
* **And LEADING IN THE POLLS BY 5 POINTS**

Her name is Winsome Sears, and the New Journey PAC is doing all we can to make sure she wins on Election Day, **[but we still need your help to fund our final ad effort to make sure she wins and sends a shot across Joe Biden's desk that he won't be able to ignore.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58670586:6vhUIM2AN:m:1:3298722022:222C644E53D3C0D4C13E727ECC491362:r "but we still need your help to fund our final ad effort to make
sure she wins and sends a shot across Joe Biden’s desk that he won’t be able to ignore.")** This race will have NATIONAL implications - Joe Biden is in the White House, and his numbers are tanking, especially with black voters. If we win here, it will be PROOF that the Democrat party no longer has a lock on Black American voters - even Black Democrats here aren't happy with the Democrat nominee for Governor. **_It will drive Joe Biden CRAZY._** I started the New Journey PAC to support candidates like Winsome - Black Conservatives who understand that the modern Democrat Party doesn't care about Black America and does nothing to help us. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58670586:6vhUIM2AN:m:1:3298722022:222C644E53D3C0D4C13E727ECC491362:r "Rush")You may not recognize my name, James Golden, but you probably know me as Bo Snerdley, the one-time producer and call screener for Rush Limbaugh. **Working with Rush for nearly two decades has confirmed the truth about liberals:_they HATE it when a Black person in America dares to think for themselves._** To them, we are supposed to be quiet and vote Democrat. **That simply isn 't who I am, _and it 's not Winsome Sears either._** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58670586:6vhUIM2AN:m:1:3298722022:222C644E53D3C0D4C13E727ECC491362:r "Headline")The Democrats are watching this race just as closely as we are, and we know how they act when desperate. In California's recall election, when a Black Republican - Larry Elders - gained momentum, The Los Angeles Times called him the _" new face of white supremacy."_ **_Who knows what tricks they will use on Winsome in the closing days._** We have to be ready to FIGHT BACK. **[The New Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your last-minute EMERGENCY donation to help win this race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58670586:6vhUIM2AN:m:1:3298722022:222C644E53D3C0D4C13E727ECC491362:r "The New
Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your last-minute EMERGENCY donation to help win this race.")** **Winsome Sears faced down a Marine Corps drill instructor - do you think she will be intimidated by liberals in Richmond or Washington?** **We can change history by supporting Winsome Sears, but we need your help to make it a reality.** **[Please join us today and help deliver a victory for Winsome.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58670586:6vhUIM2AN:m:1:3298722022:222C644E53D3C0D4C13E727ECC491362:r "Please join us today and help deliver a
victory for Winsome.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58670586:6vhUIM2AN:m:1:3298722022:222C644E53D3C0D4C13E727ECC491362:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Your Election Day checklist. Vote today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Here’s what you need to know to vote in today’s municipal election:

- Polls are open from 7 a.m. - 8 p.m.
- Find your polling site here.: [https://www.vote.pa.gov/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Voting-at-a-Polling-Place.aspx]
- If you want to return your mail-in ballot in person, you have until 8 p.m. Here’s where you can bring it: [https://www.vote.pa.gov/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Return-Ballot.aspx]

We have been working to mobilize voters around the state to preserve our democracy — despite so many attacks from lawmakers dead set on tearing it apart. When our democracy is undermined and when we don’t vote, it makes it easier for them to manipulate the outcomes.

We cannot let that happen. That's why we're asking you to head out to participate in upholding our democracy today.

If you want to help us in our efforts to empower voters and organizers around PA to make this a more progressive state, please donate below.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=110221M [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=110221M]

See you at the polls!

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund

Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

name: Candace Owens
subject: The Left just canceled another American hero and you’ll never guess who it is…
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58671554:61SLvM2NL:m:1:3298722022:FED4EE1512203E694BC86DC43A6139A7:r)
---
Peter,
---
| The Left **canceled THOMAS JEFFERSON.**

New York's "Public Design Commission" voted **unanimously to REMOVE a 100-year-old statue** of our 3rd President from the City Council building.

And here's how **Leftist politicians disgustingly cheered it on:**
* "Jefferson embodies some of the **most shameful** **parts of our country 's history.**" --NYC Councilwoman Adrienne Adams,

* "A **slaveholding pedophile** who**should not be honored** with a statue." --NY State Assemblyman Charles Barron

This is _Thomas Jefferson,_ Peter... literally the _sole reason_ we have **religious liberty and equality** under the law today.

Tearing down statues was **_never_ about the Confederacy,** Peter. It was always about the **systemic erasure of American history** , patriotic symbols, and conservative values.

And believe me: the Left will **NOT** stop with Jefferson. **They will****NOT** **stop until the conservative majority rises up** against the Leftist tyranny and fights to preserve who we are as a nation.

**I 'm not letting conservative values die, Peter**. _**[If you won't either, then I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58671554:61SLvM2NL:m:1:3298722022:FED4EE1512203E694BC86DC43A6139A7:r "If you won’t either, then I need your help.")

name: Josh Hawley
subject: VIDEO: Garland Should Resign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58670204:62SRKM2NN:m:1:3103520637:62A1AEFDDD83AFCD453EB3F0BAE91A89:r "Headline") Peter, This cannot be allowed to continue, not in America. Parents who want a say in their children's education are subject to threats of an FBI investigation. **A father who objects to the rape of his daughter at her high school is tackled by police and labeled a domestic terrorist.** Attorney General Merrick Garland has weaponized the federal government against American parents, **and for the good of the nation,** **he should resign immediately.** **[I said it directly to his face- you can see the full video here.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58670204:62SRKM2NN:m:1:3103520637:62A1AEFDDD83AFCD453EB3F0BAE91A89:r "I said it directly to his face – you can see the full video
here.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58670204:62SRKM2NN:m:1:3103520637:62A1AEFDDD83AFCD453EB3F0BAE91A89:r "Video") **Barack Obama weaponized the IRS against conservative political and social organizations, and now Joe Biden is doing the same with the FBI.** Each liberal President pushes the envelope of power a little more each day and tramples on our Constitution. **[It is up to us to end this right now- I need you on my team.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58670204:62SRKM2NN:m:1:3103520637:62A1AEFDDD83AFCD453EB3F0BAE91A89:r "It is up to us to end this right now – I need you on my
team.")** We cannot win if we don't hold the line right here. **_No more_** government threats against American citizens who question our government. **_No more_** parents physically assaulted by government agents for standing up at school board meetings. **_No more_** children attacked and ignored in the name of "social justice." This treatment of American parents ends now. **[If you are fighting with me, I need you to make your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a big difference.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58670205:62SRKM2NN:m:1:3103520637:62A1AEFDDD83AFCD453EB3F0BAE91A89:r "If you are fighting with me, I need you to make your donation of
$1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a big difference.")** If we want a better nation, we have to fight for it. Which side of the fight are you on? I hope it's on the side of freedom. For a better future,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58670204:62SRKM2NN:m:1:3103520637:62A1AEFDDD83AFCD453EB3F0BAE91A89:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58670204:62SRKM2NN:m:1:3103520637:62A1AEFDDD83AFCD453EB3F0BAE91A89:r "STAND WITH
JOSH")

This is just a quick note to say _THANK YOU_ , Peter!
Because of supporters like you, we hit our grassroots fundraising goal for October, which means we can continue to push full steam ahead and keep the pressure on Bill Lee.
While the election might still feel like a long way away, the truth is that every dollar and conversation with a voter is critical to our mission to restore honest, compassionate leadership to Tennessee. Supporters like you make that possible, and we’re grateful at every step of the way.
Even though our campaign has just over a year to go, many other localities across the state and country are holding elections today — [**enter your address here on ballotready.org**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38212507/314448156/1202737924?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQwNTA3Yy1kZDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8vvyUdhioBgi0vU14sJgLP5saHvCjA0FZklYmrLfsM=&emci=ebdab120-333b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=df40507c-dd3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9304149) to see if there’s an election happening in your area. Thanks again for being a part of our movement.

**For Terry to win, he’ll need the biggest grassroots army in the history of Virginia politics to show up today. He can do it, but he needs our help.**

****
Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins today, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry today, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

**[Please, rush a last-minute donation to Terry’s campaign before polls close and help him turn out every Democratic voter in Virginia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38212405/314447525/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.04_SA_10KZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2MyNTFjOS1kYzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PMZhfTqBPsf7-JEzWJ-qdciDI2WkvxGOZ4sT44i7eBc=)**

I’m counting on you, Derek.

Stacey Abrams

name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zscsv445ujrqsc58mnfeup78c71brdl8efk7k2d0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im1o34cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t31emqj1dr4cerjed3m6ji35cpictgrccpkehgn6tbicsr38objm4qrcodmcuoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbaphmciqr8ptmc5j30s5ic8r749fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhkoo45qph3kjqou1774cvc3add8d8ektstbdkao_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im1o34cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqbhbsijcjajv5v25mkenrihg8oehbmu7ema5lf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im1o34cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zld79d9bl473h5ojqp6tjtg8effeo2eu4uvqh2ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3im1o34cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families.

But now, our progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for.

And right now, **the polls are tied.**

But, Derek, we know that if we turn out every Virginia Democrat today, we will win.

_**[So right now, will you chip in $30 to my campaign? clean_body: read this, it’s important | | | = | | Let me lay it out for you, Derek: today’s election is the most important in the country this year. Virginia is a must win for Democrats. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. But now, our progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. And right now, the polls are tied. But, Derek, we know that if we turn out every Virginia Democrat today, we will win. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Derek, Donald Trump wants to use this election as the launchpad for his 2024 campaign — and Glenn Youngkin has already said he supports four more years of Donald Trump. If a Trump-wannabe like Youngkin can win in Virginia, a guy like him can win anywhere. We have to send the message that we’re ready to end Trumpism in this country once and for all. = Thank you, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Friend,

Are you ready for another **TRUMP RALLY?**

My favorite part about being YOUR President was always traveling the Country and meeting hardworking, American Patriots.

I've LOVED getting to do just that the past few months, but when my team asked me where we should go next, I immediately said, _" Why don't you ask the American People? They ALWAYS know best."_

So, Friend, I need to know _\- where do you think I should hold my next Trump Rally?_

I'm going to announce the location very soon - make sure I see your response in time.

What's your plan?

[COMMIT TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38219324/314477557/1689728213?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzkxZDk5Yi1lNzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=La8Dzcy0o39gxMpwyPRqyp2Xw79qJOhLNWMu-6qA1TI=&emci=bc03b112-e73b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6791d99b-e73b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3583156)

We’d love to tell her we turned out thousands of voters to cast their ballots! **[We need [30] more voters committed to voting today. Sign your name and commit to vote now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38219325/314477560/1689728213?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzkxZDk5Yi1lNzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=La8Dzcy0o39gxMpwyPRqyp2Xw79qJOhLNWMu-6qA1TI=&emci=bc03b112-e73b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6791d99b-e73b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3583156)**

body:

body:
Make sure your friends and family have a plan to vote! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b9612e1ce500/rally-with-allison-russo-rep-joyce-beatty-and-more-this-weekend-5030621?e=400a181d5a)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# _It's Election Day, team!_

**Polls are open until 7:30 PM. Go vote -- and bring three friends with you!**
---
| [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=9e6454b6ff&e=400a181d5a "FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION")
---
| | In a special election like ours, turning out every single registered voter is CRITICAL to our sucesss.

Can you text 10 friends and family members RIGHT NOW and help them make a plan to vote?

_Copy & Paste_: "_Hey! It’s Election Day, and it’s so important that you make time to vote today! Allison Russo is running for Congress in a special election, and I am so excited to vote for her. Do you have a plan to vote?"_
---
| | | | | | [](http://us6.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f49fabd234&e=400a181d5a) | [FORWARD THIS EMAIL TO FRIENDS AND FAMILY](http://us6.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f49fabd234&e=400a181d5a)
---|---
| | [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e91549a8ab&e=400a181d5a)
---
_**Help spread the work on social media**_! You can go to [AllisonRusso.com/vote](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e00642dd64&e=400a181d5a) for all the information you'll need to help your friends and family vote.

You can also check out this open [Google Drive folder](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7d3d43e833&e=400a181d5a) to **download fun social media graphics** to set as your profile pic, like this one ⬅️
---
|
---
| We're going to be knocking on doors until 3PM to remind Democratic voters to come out an be heard! We'll also be poll standing and phone banking until polls close at 7:30!
---
| [STAND AT THE POLLS ON ELECTION DAY](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=93c4967fe2&e=400a181d5a "STAND AT THE POLLS ON ELECTION DAY")
---
| [GOTV PHONE BANK](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0ac1304465&e=400a181d5a "GOTV PHONE BANK")
---
| |

body:
This is it

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38220691/314485322/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE1YjY5MS1lZDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2p-k1dUayWOwKituet90GyVjhrWZT9YfdMLEA9EwB2Q=&emci=0c8b422d-e13b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ec15b691-ed3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15759664)

| | Friends We’ve been sending you emails all campaign long building toward this moment — this is it. This is the day we turn out and elect Democrats all around the Commonwealth! I’m writing to you this today for two reasons:
1. To send you some election day resources so you know what to bring and expect at the polls today.
2. To remind you to vote for Democrats across Virginia up and down the ticket.

Please go to **[iwillvote.com/va](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38220697/314485327/-2099149062?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE1YjY5MS1lZDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2p-k1dUayWOwKituet90GyVjhrWZT9YfdMLEA9EwB2Q=&emci=0c8b422d-e13b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ec15b691-ed3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15759664)** to find your polling place and learn what you need to bring with you to the polls today. The future of our Commonwealth is on the ballot today — I hope you’ll go support Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, Mark Herring, and your Democratic candidate in the House of Delegates! If you have any questions or concerns please, call the Virginia Voter Hotline at (844) 482-8683. Thank you for being a voter and making your voice heard in your community. Take care, Ralph Northam
---
