name: Team Franchot
subject: PHOTOS: On the Campaign Trail in October
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Hi Peter,
October was an incredibly action-packed month for Team Franchot, and we’re very excited to share with you our photo recap of everything that Peter Franchot has been up to. Though they say that pictures are worth a thousand words, it’s clear that they capture only a small fraction of the energy that supporters are bringing to our people-powered movement on the campaign trail every day.
If you’ve joined us in the past month, then make sure to keep reading below -- you just might see yourself in one of our photos! If you haven’t had a chance to join us yet, you’ll have ample opportunity to do so in the weeks and months to come as we continue to take this movement to new heights.
Will you chip in to help Peter Franchot stay ahead in this competitive race? Starting off our November fundraising period with a groundswell of grassroots donations is precisely the boost we need to make sure we can hit our November fundraising goal. We’re looking to get 99 new grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]Thank you,
Team Franchot
Here’s our recap of October:
On October 2, Peter was proud to join the Women’s March in Annapolis to rally in defense of a woman’s right to choose. Texas’ extreme abortion law is a shameful and unconstitutional attack on the rights of women. As Governor, Peter will oppose any attempts to restrict reproductive freedom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, Peter joined the West County Democratic Club for their Annual Fish Fry in Glen Burnie, where he had a great time speaking with voters about his vision for the future of Maryland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]He finished off the day at an excellent event with supporters in Annapolis.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 3, Peter had a blast attending an action-packed festival circuit in Baltimore. He was thrilled to chat with voters and celebrate the wonderful diversity of our state at the Italian Heritage Festival, the Fell’s Point Fun Festival, and the Fiesta Baltimore Festival.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 5, Peter was honored to join educators, lawmakers, and advocates at The University of Baltimore to announce the expansion of three low-income taxpayer clinics that will provide much-needed legal assistance to Marylanders at no cost.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, he attended an action-packed event with supporters in Cockeysville.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 6, Peter had the honor to speak with the Professional Fire Fighters of Maryland at their convention in Ocean City, and discussed how he’ll partner with them to secure a better future for all of our union brothers and sisters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 7, Peter was delighted to share his vision for our future at the Anne Arundel County Democratic Central Committee’s Fall Democratic Gubernatorial Candidates Forum.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]The next day, he headed to District Heights to support Delegate Darryl Barnes, Chair of the Legislative Black Caucus, at his Fish Fry with voters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 9, Peter enjoyed a brunch with supporters in Marriottsville.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that afternoon, he headed to Bowie to speak with voters at Team Franchot’s campaign headquarters grand opening. We had an amazing turnout, and Peter had a great time speaking with everyone about the steps he’ll take to ensure that no family is left behind in 2022.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 12, Peter was delighted to speak to the Howard County Senior Men’s Group about the steps he’ll take to improve the quality of life for our state -- including creating a groundbreaking mentorship program that connects our seniors with our youth. Later that day, he shared his vision for the future of our state with the Prince George’s County South County Democratic Club.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 13, Peter had an excellent afternoon with friends, volunteers, and fellow elected officials at the Tawes Crab and Clam Bake in Crisfield. Peter’s been to Tawes more than any other candidate in the race -- and he will continue to deliver results for the Eastern Shore as Governor.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, he headed to Berlin to speak with allies and supporters at an action-packed reception.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 14, Peter went to Linthicum Heights to attend the Maryland Black Caucus Foundation’s Fall Gubernatorial Candidates Forum to discuss his plan to achieve social, economic and political equity for Black Marylanders.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]The next day, he was delighted to speak at the Inaugural Ball for Glenarden Mayor Cashenna A. Cross.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 17, Peter attended the Montgomery County Democratic Party's Annual Gala, where he had a great evening with fellow elected officials, community activists, and supporters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 18, Peter had an excellent time speaking with voters at our Meet and Greet in Towson, where he was also joined by friends like Delegate Michele Guyton.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]The next day, Peter went to Bel Air for an exciting event with friends, supporters and allies.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 20, Peter headed to Easton to share his bold vision for the future of Maryland at an event with supporters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 21, Peter had a great Meet and Greet at the Windsor Crossing Senior Center in Suitland, where he discussed a wide range of topics including senior housing, preventing evictions, and empowering our communities to achieve public safety.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that evening, he headed to Columbia to support Howard County State’s Attorney Rich Gibson for his event with voters, and got to catch up with friends like Congressman Kweisi Mfume.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 22, Peter had a blast at the Morgan State University Homecoming Gala in Baltimore. As Governor, he’ll make sure that we proactively fund our HBCUs with the resources and investments they deserve.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 23, Peter headed to Hunt Valley to attend a wonderful evening event with supporters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 24, Peter visited the Bethel A.M.E. Church in Baltimore. He had a wonderful conversation with Rev. Dr. Patrick Clayborn about spiritual health, and had a great time sharing his vision for Maryland’s future with congregants.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 27, Peter was delighted to announce that he had selected Monique Anderson-Walker as his running mate. As the first Black Woman to ever be elected to the Prince George’s County Council from District 8, Monique has championed innovative programs to improve the quality of life for Prince George’s residents. She’s precisely the kind of consummate public servant that we need now more than ever, and she will make an excellent Lt. Governor.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, Peter had an excellent event with supporters in Catonsville.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 28, Peter headed to Owings Mills to attend an event with friends, allies and supporters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 29, Peter had a great Meet and Greet with voters at an event in Annapolis.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 30, we hosted our first ever Meet and Greet with Peter’s running mate. The event was an incredible success, and Peter had an excellent time sharing his vision for our future with voters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]Team Franchot was also on the ground that day with Delegate Heather Bagnall to knock on doors in Severna Park.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]On October 31, Peter rounded out an action-packed month by attending the Maryland Democratic Party’s Afternoon of Elegance.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021inreview?amount=20.22]

body:
We need to step it up
| | |

| | Derek, when I heard how many Virginians have already cast their ballots in this race, I was stunned.

Enthusiasm is soaring because Virginians are ready to reject Trumpism and continue on the path of progress.

But with polls closing in just a few hours and every pundit in the country calling this a “toss up,” we still have work to do.

Our Voter Mobilization Team is texting and calling voters today. They’re knocking doors. And they’re making sure our ads are served in every corner of the Commonwealth.

_**[That means YOU can still have an impact on the outcome of the most important election of the year. What do you say? Will you step up in the final hours of this race and make a contribution so we can surge voter turnout before polls close?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38221011/314487044/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.06_TM_10LB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTE1YjY5MS1lZDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pi_HD5iaH51yZvEj3qxUXRkocy5j8bz_RCCVj1IJm60=)**_

If I haven’t been direct about this, let me be direct right now: **I need you, Derek.**

Glenn Youngkin used his bottomless bank account to flood the airwaves in the final weeks of the campaign. Donald Trump has endorsed him TEN times and promised to turn out his extremist supporters.

This one’s going to come down to the wire — so let’s finish strong.

Game on!

subject: Thank you, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38222382/314493519/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjlkYTY3MS1mMjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8569pWYK4q_DzAcHfO3s5VbPOD8Y1nQSjwio4A8cPew=)
Friend,

I'll keep this brief since I know today's election day here in Iowa (and in New Jersey and Virginia too -- fingers crossed!) 🤞 I'm pleased to report that we were able to meet, and even exceed our digital fundraising goal for October. _Thank you!_

In other news, **John Deere and the UAW announced they had a tentative agreement** to raise worker wages and preserve the pension. Our entire community played a big role in demanding concessions from Deere, and you should be proud of what you did.

It's been hard at times trying to cut through the noise with everything going on in Washington DC -- it's always been my goal to keep you informed about the important issues here in Iowa like the Deere strike.

That said, I value your feedback about the issues you're dealing with personally. In order to bring us together around solutions, I need to know what's on your mind. That's why I'm asking:

**[Will you take my one-minute survey to let me know your thoughts: What issues are you thinking about right now and what can our campaign do to better reach voters? Your answers help guide our next steps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38222383/314493520/1401491231?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjlkYTY3MS1mMjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8569pWYK4q_DzAcHfO3s5VbPOD8Y1nQSjwio4A8cPew=&emci=b3461f6b-f23b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2f9da671-f23b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21044445)**
| **[Take the survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38222384/314493521/1401491231?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjlkYTY3MS1mMjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8569pWYK4q_DzAcHfO3s5VbPOD8Y1nQSjwio4A8cPew=&emci=b3461f6b-f23b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2f9da671-f23b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21044445)**
---

With the nation's attention on Virginia -- today is a big day. I'm looking forward to seeing what happens later tonight, and will be in touch with more information about our campaign soon.

Together, we can make Iowa a place that welcomes everyone and gives everyone the opportunity to not just survive, but thrive. That alone makes everything worth it.

\- Ras

PS. If you're voting in Iowa and need to find your polling place, [you can do so here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38222385/314493522/-171009025?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjlkYTY3MS1mMjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8569pWYK4q_DzAcHfO3s5VbPOD8Y1nQSjwio4A8cPew=&emci=b3461f6b-f23b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2f9da671-f23b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21044445).

name: Chelsea Clark
subject: We're in this together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
I could not be more honored to have supporters like you with me every step of the way in this election.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38222560/314494403/-939985431?refcode=EM_C_211102thanks_N_CC_90D_4_NG_N_Logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjdjMWViMS1mMzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2oket3q5IbP2OQe4RTnQSVlYnje6Olgq9bifYZaiFo=)
---
Thank you for everything you have done for this past month, team. Not just for me, but for Democrats up and down the ballot. We've wrapped up another month on solid financial ground, and we couldn't have gotten there without your help.

This past month, I've been so amazed by the commitment of this team to protect the foundations of our democracy at all costs. I could not be more honored to have supporters like you with me every step of the way in this election.

Speaking of elections, today is Election Day here in Ohio. If you've already voted, thank you for participating in our democracy! But if you haven't...then what are you waiting for!! Check where you can make your voice heard at **[iwillvote.com.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38222561/314494404/327637188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjdjMWViMS1mMzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2oket3q5IbP2OQe4RTnQSVlYnje6Olgq9bifYZaiFo=&emci=cdd45d6f-203b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=627c1eb1-f33b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14488557)**

More challenges will come throughout the course of this campaign, but I know one thing is for sure, and that is that we'll face them standing strong together. And when Democrats work together, nothing can stop us.

Thank you for being with us every step of the way,

Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

name: Danielle Allen
subject: VOTE!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN
body:
Peter Willis,
It’s Election Day across Massachusetts!
One of the most important rights and responsibilities we have as citizens is our vote.
Fellow citizens in your community are stepping up and running for office. Whether you agree with their viewpoint or not, they are willing to get into the political arena and make a difference.
These candidates deserve your attention and the time it takes to cast your vote. How you and your friends and neighbors vote determines the direction of your community.
Please take the time today to vote. Your vote counts — and it makes a difference.
If you’re looking for polling hours and other information — we have you covered! [https://iwillvote.com/]
Make a Plan to Vote [https://iwillvote.com/]
Sincerely,
Danielle

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_vote_2021.11.2_b1_DA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_vote_2021.11.2_b1_DA_all&amount=25]
Danielle is a nonprofit leader, policy innovator, educator, and mom. Over the last twenty years, she has led organizations at all scales from local civic education providers to the $6 billion Mellon Foundation. Her leadership is characterized by listening, collaborating, and innovating– as in leading a multi-disciplinary COVID response team that led to the Biden-Harris Pandemic Testing Board and an interstate compact to build out COVID testing resources.

With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

| | Derek, we are almost out of time in this race, and we urgently need your support to power this final day of GOTV. **_[I’m about to ask you to donate $15 to my campaign,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38225265/314500621/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.07_TM_10LC&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGEwZTdlZi1mNTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XniMnGGPq7cdAOcPmeWYufqYMr7Or2Gr-U6gtsttVJ8=)_ but first, let me explain why your $15 makes a difference at this point in the race.**

For $15, we can reach 1000 Virginians with an online Election Day voter mobilization ad.

Or, we can text 100 voters with their polling location to make sure they know when, where and how to cast their ballot today.

subject: Sean Casten Contrast - Religious Freedom
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/29519cc5595a/conforti-for-congress-5028509?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Our great country was founded on religious freedoms.

Now, Sean Casten is pushing the current administration to strip this nation of all Christian influence and any reference to 'Judeo-Christian values'.

According to an Illinois Review article dated January 15, 2021, Casten has presented a 28-page document invoking a long list of changes. Those changes include, but are not limited to the following:

1\. Deny free speech and religious liberty based on certain religious beliefs
2\. Strip parents of all non-medical exemptions to mandatorily vaccinate children of all ages
3\. Appoint officials that will support emergency orders to restrict gatherings at houses of worship
4\. 'Fully and robustly fund' comprehensive sex education to elementary and middle school children

This direction does not represent the people nor the values of the constituents of the 6th district.

When I am in Congress, I will work to preserve all freedoms for the people of my district and across America.
[Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=c15ae6ce39&e=25f4fa3311) to donate to my campaign and bring common sense to Congress.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

subject: The radical Left wants total control.
body:
Critical Race Theory has no place in our children’s schools.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jt-PgIbDVTCA8Kna2s3YRnbrUSk62oymTkshuC19FWmGy2S4kE0zG7jYNVZQSXIEyFEI6U1TWG8_C72mxRp1gahechFPCzc5ODYtjjIWxTKbyW5-LGj2E3sAkzg8kWC1X4kC5z_RFl715jmKC-LmPkyGb61HJcDQieGX1-JJSstYcTcZUHjPPKe5gXwFugZ5Cn4mpKrlqkTsH8scS-iz9w==&c=SBNUYV4iIWqwGlaRra8bSBfs5XVEXVWMM-F2OtzPt2hR5N2sEPQnyg==&ch=n_I3CMphr2XUQfotDu0uyr1KofXT5Vnm40saZw92_o9T5PAeIetBfw==)
---
| Friend,
Critical Race Theory has no place in our children's schools.
After the understandable outcry from concerned parents across America, the radical Left has decided to double down on their indoctrination. The radical Left is now using the FBI and DOJ to go after parents who disagree with the way their kids are being taught in school.
Kat is appalled by the Left's consistent use of force for their tyrannical agenda. That is why she signed on to an open letter to Attorney General Garland demanding answers.
---
| | | [FIGHT BIG GOVERNMENT CENSORSHIP](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jt-PgIbDVTCA8Kna2s3YRnbrUSk62oymTkshuC19FWmGy2S4kE0zG7jYNVZQSXIEyFEI6U1TWG8_C72mxRp1gahechFPCzc5ODYtjjIWxTKbyW5-LGj2E3sAkzg8kWC1X4kC5z_RFl715jmKC-LmPkyGb61HJcDQieGX1-JJSstYcTcZUHjPPKe5gXwFugZ5Cn4mpKrlqkTsH8scS-iz9w==&c=SBNUYV4iIWqwGlaRra8bSBfs5XVEXVWMM-F2OtzPt2hR5N2sEPQnyg==&ch=n_I3CMphr2XUQfotDu0uyr1KofXT5Vnm40saZw92_o9T5PAeIetBfw==)
---
| The recent censorship and bullying of America's parents are completely unconstitutional. Garland should be ashamed for even considering restricting these parents' First Amendment rights.
The woke school boards are wrong. America's parents do have the right to tell them what they can and can't teach their children.
We need to get them out of our schools and the socialists out of our government. They have proven they will try to bully and harass the American people into submission. But they can't bully Kat or the conservative movement. Kat will always fight for your rights as a parent and American citizen.
It's time to give the woke socialists the boot. [Can Kat count on your support in her fight?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jt-PgIbDVTCA8Kna2s3YRnbrUSk62oymTkshuC19FWmGy2S4kE0zG7jYNVZQSXIEyFEI6U1TWG8_C72mxRp1gahechFPCzc5ODYtjjIWxTKbyW5-LGj2E3sAkzg8kWC1X4kC5z_RFl715jmKC-LmPkyGb61HJcDQieGX1-JJSstYcTcZUHjPPKe5gXwFugZ5Cn4mpKrlqkTsH8scS-iz9w==&c=SBNUYV4iIWqwGlaRra8bSBfs5XVEXVWMM-F2OtzPt2hR5N2sEPQnyg==&ch=n_I3CMphr2XUQfotDu0uyr1KofXT5Vnm40saZw92_o9T5PAeIetBfw==)
---
| | | [GET THE WOKE OUT OF OUR SCHOOLS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jt-PgIbDVTCA8Kna2s3YRnbrUSk62oymTkshuC19FWmGy2S4kE0zG7jYNVZQSXIEyFEI6U1TWG8_C72mxRp1gahechFPCzc5ODYtjjIWxTKbyW5-LGj2E3sAkzg8kWC1X4kC5z_RFl715jmKC-LmPkyGb61HJcDQieGX1-JJSstYcTcZUHjPPKe5gXwFugZ5Cn4mpKrlqkTsH8scS-iz9w==&c=SBNUYV4iIWqwGlaRra8bSBfs5XVEXVWMM-F2OtzPt2hR5N2sEPQnyg==&ch=n_I3CMphr2XUQfotDu0uyr1KofXT5Vnm40saZw92_o9T5PAeIetBfw==)

After the understandable outcry from concerned parents across America, the radical Left has decided to double down on their indoctrination. The radical Left is now using the FBI and DOJ to go after parents who disagree with the way their kids are being taught in school. Kat is appalled by the Left's consistent use of force for their tyrannical agenda. That is why she signed on to an open letter to Attorney General Garland demanding answers. | | | == | The recent censorship and bullying of America's parents are completely unconstitutional. Garland should be ashamed for even considering restricting these parents' First Amendment rights. The woke school boards are wrong. They have proven they will try to bully and harass the American people into submission. But they can't bully Kat or the conservative movement. **Chris Christie: NJ Governor Phil Murphy Is Running For President & If Anybody Tells You Anything Differently Is Not Telling You The Truth**

Chris Christie spoke to Brian Kilmeade about the latest on President Biden’s push for an infrastructure bill. Christie feels President Biden not getting this done before heading to Europe makes him look weak and is not good for America. Christie also discussed the latest Fox News Poll showing Republican Glenn Youngkin ahead of Democrat Terry McAuliffe in the Virginia governor’s race. Christie feels McAuliffe is getting nervous which is why he brought in national democrats Obama, Harris and Stacey Abrams.

name: Tom Nelson
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | I wanted to reach out and share my gratitude for all you’ve done to help power our grassroots movement.

We started this campaign with an atypical approach – _refusing_ to take any money from Wall Street, Big Pharma, or Big Oil. **That’s because we aren’t doing this for them, we’re doing it for the American people.**

It’s thanks to folks like you we were able to meet our goal and continue moving strongly into election season. We’re nearly one year out from Election Day, and everything you’ve done this far has helped contribute to our mission to bring bold, progressive leadership to Washington.

Thank you again for everything! I’m so grateful to have your support.

We need 1,500 more Republicans to show Democrats that our victories start TODAY.

body:

| | |

| | Derek,

Today’s election is 2021’s most important race, so I want to tell you directly why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Governor.

We are running a historic campaign here in Virginia. Not only have we built the largest grassroots movement in Virginia history, but we’ve run a campaign that speaks to the issues that matter most to Virginians.

I’m running because every single Virginia child deserves a **quality education** — which is why I will make the largest-ever investment in education in the Commonwealth’s history.

I’m running because every Virginian has a right to **affordable, quality health care** and prescriptions medications.

I’m running because we need a leader who will champion initiatives to **curb gun violence** in Virginia.

I’m running because the time has long passed for innovative strategies to secure our **clean energy future.**

**And Derek, I’m running because every single person in our Commonwealth deserves to live in a state where they have opportunities for success.**

**_[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll support my campaign in the final hours of this race by chipping in whatever amount makes sense for you. subject: We are losing in Virginia - help us keep the lights on!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

You may have heard us talk about our friend, Terry McAuliffe, and his life-saving work to help Virginia's veterans. Now? [_**Terry needs our help.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OgfoqQ6G9ZZuZVkck3_q7YJNXnwkSXCgcePPhKAROyI=/lnrObS2wOozXi69gSqFdrpyWageZeDh8JcLIK51Gsag=)
Election Day is TODAY, and [_**the latest polls show Terry trailing his anti-choice, anti-vaccine opponent.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OgfoqQ6G9ZZuZVkck3_q7YJNXnwkSXCgcePPhKAROyI=/lnrObS2wOozXi69gSqFdrpyWageZeDh8JcLIK51Gsag=) Terry and his team are knocking on every door in Virginia today to try to win this election and keep Trump from gaining a foothold in the commonwealth. [_**We cannot afford to lose!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OgfoqQ6G9ZZuZVkck3_q7YJNXnwkSXCgcePPhKAROyI=/lnrObS2wOozXi69gSqFdrpyWageZeDh8JcLIK51Gsag=)
This election is close, and with Terry focused on turning out voters, **WE need YOU.** [_**Will you split a donation between Taking the Hill PAC and Terry McAuliffe 's campaign right now? Your support is crucial to build the resources we need to fight the Trump-style dirty tricks coming our way once the polls close.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OgfoqQ6G9ZZuZVkck3_q7YJNXnwkSXCgcePPhKAROyI=/lnrObS2wOozXi69gSqFdrpyWageZeDh8JcLIK51Gsag=)
We want to share Terry's closing message with you:
**What happens in Virginia on November 2nd doesn 't just impact the future of our Commonwealth, it impacts the future of our entire country.**
Terry has fought for us. Now it's our turn to fight for him. [_**WE NEED YOU to**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OgfoqQ6G9ZZuZVkck3_q7YJNXnwkSXCgcePPhKAROyI=/lnrObS2wOozXi69gSqFdrpyWageZeDh8JcLIK51Gsag=) _**[ show your support by rushing a donation to Terry and Taking the Hill right now](https://act.myngp.com/el/OgfoqQ6G9ZZuZVkck3_q7YJNXnwkSXCgcePPhKAROyI=/lnrObS2wOozXi69gSqFdrpyWageZeDh8JcLIK51Gsag=)**_[ _**!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OgfoqQ6G9ZZuZVkck3_q7YJNXnwkSXCgcePPhKAROyI=/lnrObS2wOozXi69gSqFdrpyWageZeDh8JcLIK51Gsag=)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Now that we've closed the books on month 1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter, On Sunday night, we closed the books on the first month of my re-election campaign. Peter,

On Sunday night, we closed the books on the first month of my re-election campaign.

Despite it being Halloween, this team delivered. **I just got word that, because of you, we reached our $20,000 end-of-month fundraising goal.** Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

This deadline was the first major test our campaign faced. It's clear to me that we came out stronger than ever, which is a great sign for all that's to come.

I know that with you on board this team, Kentucky's future is bright.

Thank you for your support,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. name: Rabine for Governor
subject: Your Invitation to a Special Event with Charlie Kirk
body:
Join Charlie Kirk & Gary Rabine for a special event in paving the way to victory and securing Illinois' freedom.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charlie_kirk_rally_invite&n=1)
---
Peter, The Rabine for Governor campaign is excited to announce **[a special event](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWc8WijxjIHw9UsAPsJ4x-UEIIAcv2q7BNYwZ3TJ7FhbbQpda47-LgfHu-nz5J5JPD7Qhm_XeIeDDKl4gKagMSUQ_yFeUtuhoubPhkku5rTSsyoVfaM5WeHF7QoS7oL7-OenXJ3q2ePYuUalW6Getl7k_2oWzuhrCqxkq0J_CL5VDr2RZcZlx6DvKtu_xVGdZlDyJq8Gjpa7Ub93VfkKvZnI&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charlie_kirk_rally_invite&n=2)** planned with Charlie Kirk on Sunday, November 14th at the Renaissance Schaumburg Convention Center. [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWc8WijxjIHw9UsAPsJ4x-UEIIAcv2q7BNYwZ3TJ7FhbbQpda47-LgfHu-nz5J5JPD7Qhm_XeIeDDKl4gKagMSUQ_yFeUtuhoubPhkku5rTSsyoVfaM5WeHF7QoS7oL7-OenXJ3q2ePYuUalW6Getl7k_2oWzuhrCqxkq0J_CL5VDr2RZcZlx6DvKtu_xVGdZlDyJq8Gjpa7Ub93VfkKvZnI&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charlie_kirk_rally_invite&n=3) Gary Rabine is proud to have been a key catalyst for Charlie and Turning Point USA over 9 years ago, helping to build the movement that is the voice for capitalism, free speech, and family values on over 1000 college campuses across the country. Now, Gary's focus is the campaign to pave the way for freedom in Illinois as Governor. **If you would like to buy a ticket to attend what will be a patriotic and inspirational evening,[please do so here or using the "buy your ticket" button below.](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWc8WijxjIHw9UsAPsJ4x-UEIIAcv2q7BNYwZ3TJ7FhbbQpda47-LgfHu-nz5J5JPD7Qhm_XeIeDDKl4gKagMSUQ_yFeUtuhoubPhkku5rTSsyoVfaM5WeHF7QoS7oL7-OenXJ3q2ePYuUalW6Getl7k_2oWzuhrCqxkq0J_CL5VDr2RZcZlx6DvKtu_xVGdZlDyJq8Gjpa7Ub93VfkKvZnI&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charlie_kirk_rally_invite&n=4)** | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWc8WijxjIHw9UsAPsJ4x-UEIIAcv2q7BNYwZ3TJ7FhbbQpda47-LgfHu-nz5J5JPD7Qhm_XeIeDDKl4gKagMSUQ_yFeUtuhoubPhkku5rTSsyoVfaM5WeHF7QoS7oL7-OenXJ3q2ePYuUalW6Getl7k_2oWzuhrCqxkq0J_CL5VDr2RZcZlx6DvKtu_xVGdZlDyJq8Gjpa7Ub93VfkKvZnI&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charlie_kirk_rally_invite&n=5 "Buy your Ticket") [Buy your Ticket](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWc8WijxjIHw9UsAPsJ4x-UEIIAcv2q7BNYwZ3TJ7FhbbQpda47-LgfHu-nz5J5JPD7Qhm_XeIeDDKl4gKagMSUQ_yFeUtuhoubPhkku5rTSsyoVfaM5WeHF7QoS7oL7-OenXJ3q2ePYuUalW6Getl7k_2oWzuhrCqxkq0J_CL5VDr2RZcZlx6DvKtu_xVGdZlDyJq8Gjpa7Ub93VfkKvZnI&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charlie_kirk_rally_invite&n=5)

name: Marisa Wood
subject: feedback. (survey)
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38233087/314518125/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTllYTA0Mi0wNDNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xke7L7nnIK43YlciGu6PD3Twy_H5ReDC55JG6en3KUg=)
Friend,

Thanks to your support last month, I'm pleased to report that we met our online fundraising goal. _Thank you!_

With Kevin McCarthy continuing to block President Biden's agenda that delivers critical aid to working families in the Central Valley, the stakes in our race have never been higher. We're doing our part to hold him accountable, and I'm humbled that thousands of grassroots donors in California and across the country have joined in.

**Grassroots support is important for any campaign, but especially ours. Every moment Kevin McCarthy spends defending himself here in the Central Valley is time he's unable to spend taking back the House to enact his cruel agenda.**

I'm running for Congress because there are important issues we need to deliver on for this community -- expanding the child tax credit permanently, making healthcare more accessible and affordable, and solving our climate crisis. But in order to plan our next steps, I want your thoughts:

**[As Democrats work to pass major legislation, I want to get your take on what issues matter to you and how we could better connect with voters. What do you think we should focus on? Please take my one-minute survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38233088/314518126/-1075126933?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTllYTA0Mi0wNDNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xke7L7nnIK43YlciGu6PD3Twy_H5ReDC55JG6en3KUg=&emci=e99ea042-043c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ea9ea042-043c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21170704)**

body:
I am proud of what we have done this past month
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38233307/314519007/-135374765?refcode=em_msg_2021.11.02_b1_TOH_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGFlYTU3NC0wNTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9EUrWVNV9Ou2te6XYayJkvd0V-G5f5EUqjwP7EF8hn4=)** Hey friends, I asked my team to clear this time for me so that I could reach out and thank you for your support this past month. **Thanks to you, we were able to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal for October.** As long as we keep our momentum up, this campaign is in a good place to take on our far-right opponents. Everyone chipping in what you could -- $5, $10, whatever you were able to give -- brought our team the support we need to keep doing great work in Arizona. Even though we just closed out October, I’m already looking ahead to November. We’re just about one year away from the election, and I’m so grateful to have the support of this incredible grassroots team. Thank you so much, Tom
---
****_Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today._**

clean_body: I am proud of what we have done this past month = Hey friends, I asked my team to clear this time for me so that I could reach out and thank you for your support this past month. Thanks to you, we were able to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal for October. As long as we keep our momentum up, this campaign is in a good place to take on our far-right opponents. Everyone chipping in what you could -- $5, $10, whatever you were able to give -- brought our team the support we need to keep doing great work in Arizona. Even though we just closed out October, I’m already looking ahead to November. We’re just about one year away from the election, and I’m so grateful to have the support of this incredible grassroots team. Thank you so much, Tom **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

We need all hands on deck today to win this election and keep Virginia blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Our Commonwealth is worth the fight, and I hope you’re with me today! body:
And Trumpism is winning. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGFucduwYXIrP3YeIqmCgGJrqeyB2R1osjZ43iizIdGR3fw5uCVFJBQ-wgBLoTbuPoMB2AERN78hXywlKe554ocrUyaxICSA6_txzCKz7jr5071SwHfxuEU9lWlfuQwKqa0qNa3CFOyYirYW9u9Oq7D7tj8CfZ87T2wduFvhERH4kGkOoxXfmd_VJ-yymjBQluzsCzylgr8F-ppPea9dW8QCQUfoHqjA5qwTNcRmH7wRlSNKu2UhhIKp50fLYua-m8ArYOvpBfnUlqruf-GueYsz9PNBeaOn0AIyvqyX73IfEfuHGb5wANvLSJDmMdiAPAQ/3go/gAqRebKmTRWpFYCxjjkHDg/h0/mJE1uqFR0R4ehhOKQw-TRd3g0sHHNFIIMtjH2E6lJlY)
Derek, Virginia's elections are TODAY, and right now _**Trumpism is on the move.**_

After Steve Bannon came to Virginia for a rally with Donald Trump, we expected a massive response, but honestly, we didn’t get a peep.

After Donald Trump's tele-rally, we expected Democrats to come out and decry the impeached President -- but nothing happened.

Instead, Trump’s supporters are FIRED UP.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: VOTE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
TODAY is Election Day, and here’s what you need to know:
#
It's Election Day in Pennsylvania!
**If you’re voting TODAY, Tuesday, November 2, we want to share one last time which four Democratic statewide judicial candidates John + Gisele are voting for.**
(And if you’ve already turned in your mail-in ballot, forwarding this email to another friend in Monroe County would be pretty cool 🙏)
[**Click here to confirm your polling place to vote in-person or turn in your ballot ASAP if you haven’t already!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=1&akid=3303%2E434096%2EE_0p0Y)
Now, without further ado — here are some fantastic Pennsylvania Democrats who are committed to protecting our fundamental rights. 👇
First up in ballot order,**Judge Maria McLaughlin** has focused her life’s service to fighting for our children on Philly’s Court of Common Pleas, Family Division, and now on our Superior Court. There’s no one better than Judge McLaughlin for our state Supreme Court.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=2&akid=3303%2E434096%2EE_0p0Y)
**Judge Timika Lane** has a proven record fighting for fundamental rights, such as her time fighting voter suppression laws. We hope you’ll join John in voting for her for Superior Court.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=3&akid=3303%2E434096%2EE_0p0Y)
As part of Philadelphia’s Family Court, **Judge Lori Dumas** is dedicating her career to fighting for Pennsylvania’s most underserved communities. Electing her to the Commonwealth Court is a no brainer.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=4&akid=3303%2E434096%2EE_0p0Y)
Last but not least, **Judge David Spurgeon** served in the Allegheny County District Attorney’s Office, and now serves on the County Court of Common Pleas. His expertise in the fight against family violence will be vital in our Commonwealth Court.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=5&akid=3303%2E434096%2EE_0p0Y)
Make no mistake: The fights for many fundamental rights in PA take place in our court system, and it’s never been more important that we elect judges who we can trust to fight for us.
We hope you’ll join John + Gisele in casting your ballot for these four terrific judges TODAY, Peter. **[You can find your in-person polling place and ballot drop-off locations here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=6&akid=3303%2E434096%2EE_0p0Y)**
Happy voting!
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211102-3303-footer&t=7&refcode2=3303_434096_E_0p0Y&akid=3303%2E434096%2EE_0p0Y)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=8&akid=3303%2E434096%2EE_0p0Y)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=3303%2E434096%2EE_0p0Y)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
Dear Friend,

There are only a few hours left until the polls close...

Please don’t sit this one out -- our democracy is counting on YOU.

You have until 8 p.m. to vote today. Find your polling site here, [https://www.vote.pa.gov/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Voting-at-a-Polling-Place.aspx] or if you want to return your mail-in ballot in person, here’s where you can bring it [https://www.vote.pa.gov/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Return-Ballot.aspx] before 8 p.m. today.

Too many PA lawmakers are working to destabilize our democracy by pushing the Big Lie and casting doubt on our free and fair elections. Let’s fight them by turning up today at the polls

TODAY and making sure they know that we stand for a more progressive PA!

If you want to help us as we work to uphold our democracy and mobilize voters, please donate today.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=110221A [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=110221A]

See you at the polls!

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

subject: Can’t sit still
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Have you done all you can do?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38234861/314526913/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.10_TM_10LF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2YzMGJkZC0wYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8Ma5ygTQFXlDQNntbSzVKUf5guW4ZNOR6Tbjsb799A=)

| | Derek,

Polls are closing in just a few hours and I’m a nervous wreck.

Virginia Democrats have shown tremendous enthusiasm over the last few days and things are looking good for us. But with a race that some pundits have said is within a tenth of a percentage point, _I just can’t sit still._

If you question for even a split-second whether you’ve done everything you can do to keep Virginia blue, _**[please rush a last-minute contribution right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38234862/314526914/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.10_TM_10LF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2YzMGJkZC0wYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8Ma5ygTQFXlDQNntbSzVKUf5guW4ZNOR6Tbjsb799A=)**_

This is it, Derek. The entire country is watching to see what we do today. Will we reject the politics of hate and division or will we give Trumpism a platform in the Commonwealth?

Will we choose to be the best of who we can be and continue the drumbeat of progress or will we let Youngkin usher in four years of conspiracy theories and extremist politics?

It’s now or never. I’m asking you to have my back — to have Virginia’s back — and leave it all on the field today.

The last-minute resources go straight to our Voter Mobilization Team’s ad budgets and allow us to remind every last Virginia voter how and where they can make their voice heard today. _**[Rush your final contribution here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38234863/314526915/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.10_TM_10LF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2YzMGJkZC0wYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8Ma5ygTQFXlDQNntbSzVKUf5guW4ZNOR6Tbjsb799A=)**_

Thanks for everything you’ve done. Let’s finish strong!

Terry | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38234864/314526916/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.10_TM_10LF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2YzMGJkZC0wYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8Ma5ygTQFXlDQNntbSzVKUf5guW4ZNOR6Tbjsb799A=)**
---

Terry McAuliffe for Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

**Find your polling location here:[https://www.ohiosos.gov/elections/voters/toolkit/polling-location/](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPQS8AZ4gGC8Zy6SR9ykXqS2FC0w34arbb9IHIv-VbBY44Uts9ckdOuXDe2XoQ-i-NdvqK6abCrTluIuRMY3zjSwULYro57v_Ukm9ySIwIpwjuPDT3PI_zIX4pe3ynLq3qWSMEyTgzF5Kqs9JIaKJJ_H4yWuRkjXNvMRIBuhCifGX5aO5kKHO4dQ-xGvoZ1uwKdzeRRl6uTVokZusm4XzMZd4u4bQY6xTIAOfmK95x-Jt4t2YiFrDXnbG04PhItV-9OBKNBuwGic2kuxQWS3M1vsDctQwzqVZTtLLW2e3VMr-cPBiQja22HdWXRWFSYfLA/3go/StDEfB6gSA2RdVLfCfwJVA/h2/DteNWltI2G1JoFc5p5VFwH61uCmbvHnKuzHaJn9eTh8)**

Thank you,
Team Kaptur

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Every county and town matters in this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I just wrapped up a great trip to the Upper Peninsula where I talked with numerous voters who are fed up and ready for a change. | | | |
---
| | |
#### CAMPAIGN UPDATE
# Every county and town matters in this election!
### The Energy to Win.
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter:

I just wrapped up a great trip to the Upper Peninsula where I talked with numerous voters who are fed up and ready for a change. This election is important, and it'll take support from all corners of the state.

I had an incredible time at the **Crystal Falls VFW**. My message of optimism for the future of Michigan was well received. **Thank you veterans for your service.**
---
|
---
---
| In the **Iron River** area I met with citizens, community leaders, and business owners. Fixing Michigan was the focus of our discussion as we talked about taxes, regulations, education, individual liberty, Line 5, and many other topics. **Stambaugh airport** was a great spot to have this meeting and see everyone.
---
|
---
| |
---

I also had the privilege of meeting **Dave Smith** , the gentleman who harvested the state Christmas tree 🎄 in Iron River.

He even had the antique crosscut saw he used.

**It’s great to be out in every area of Michigan meeting citizens and earning support.**
---
| The**Baraga County Republican Party** hosted me Friday night. Really appreciated the reception and great questions.
---
|
---
| Timber is an important industry in Michigan and the UP with over 20 million acres of forest land and some of the best hard maple, red pine, and red oak timber in the world. There are more than 150 registered foresters in the state and over 800 logging and trucking firms.

I spent time with Eric Shamion of **Shamco, Inc** discussing the timber industry. Educational and extremely fascinating.
---
|
---
---
| I also had a great visit to **Rapid River Knifeworks** where the craftsmanship of their knives is incredible. Their showroom is unbelievable – great products and wonderful employees. I have one of their knives in my deer hunting pack. If you are in Rapid River stop in. You will be impressed!
---
|
---
| While I was one of the last to enter this race, Peter, I want you to know I'm in it for the long haul. _I'm committed to win. That's why I'm campaigning in every corner of the state_. It'll take support from throughout Michigan to win this Primary Election, and more importantly to defeat Gretchen Whitmer in November.

I have the energy. I have the fight. _**Together we can win this!**_

If you have any questions about me, my positions, or my campaign, please reach out to me at [mike@captainmikeformichigan.com](mailto:mike@captainmikeformichigan.com).

>From the campaign trail,

Michael Brown
_Candidate for Governor_
---
|
---

subject: disappointed

In the Battleground State of Virginia, Republicans have a HUGE opportunity to flip a deep blue state into the red column. Momentum is on our side! But the Election is going to be very, very close, Peter. And we need to push hard until every vote is counted. If we win, we’ll have the momentum we need to win back the Republican Majority. If we lose, the Democrats will double down on their socialist agenda. It’s essential that every Republican Patriot -- in every state \-- steps up to help in these final hours, Peter. Thank you. State Republicans Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

body:
There isn’t a more dedicated group of supporters anywhere! |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38235992/314532780/1778545203?refcode=20211102_f_1_fl_nd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjA1MDcyYy0xMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEYTxK67TzRo0lzBmkqNlzEF7xEmdD4N2-ZcfLPyPLk=)

Friend,

From the bottom of my heart, I wanted to say thank you for all your help in October. I was just blown away by the outpouring of support. And just yesterday, a poll from Sachs Media shows that I'm the best candidate to beat Gov. DeSantis.

I say it all the time, but it’s 100% true: **_There isn’t a more dedicated group of supporters anywhere!_**

As a token of my appreciation, I’ll be calling a handful of donors to personally say thanks. Honestly, friend, it's one of my favorite things to do. I see my team working so hard to raise the money we need, and I know that on the other end are supporters like you, always ready to lend a hand when we need it.

_So thank you again._

What's next?

Well, tonight, I’m going to be closely watching the results in the Virginia governor’s election and rooting for my friend Terry McAuliffe!

But regardless of what happens, **[here in Florida, we have a year to build the campaign we need to defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis and get our state on the right track. If you’re able to make your first donation to my team, I’d really appreciate it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38235993/314532781/1778545203?refcode=20211102_f_1_fl_nd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjA1MDcyYy0xMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEYTxK67TzRo0lzBmkqNlzEF7xEmdD4N2-ZcfLPyPLk=)**

God bless,
Charlie Crist

| | Derek, this is it. **These next few hours will be make or break for this campaign.**

A _Washington Post_ poll shows we’re up 49-48 against Glenn Youngkin. If we can get our voters out between now and polls closing at 7pm, we will win this race. _**But we can only get our voters out if we keep our GOTV efforts going strong all the way through the finish line.**_

This is urgent because _every single dollar_ will go directly toward our voter mobilization efforts.

_**[If you don’t have time to read the rest of this email, will you rush a donation right now? We need your support if we’re going to pull this off.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38236025/314533037/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.11_TM_10LG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDA1MDcyYy0xMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kqVxHsCTMzPBX0Kovk6rvgnMIwKDKen1Kspux3mK0qo=)**_

Virginia is a must win for Democrats here in Virginia and across our country.

My opponent is peddling lies about the 2020 election. He wants to ban abortion. He opposes marriage equality.

And if my Trump-backed opponent manages to win this race, I can promise you: extreme, Trumpian guys like him will start popping up in every election in the country.

**It’s this simple: if Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we will win. But if we don’t have the resources to turn out our voters, we will lose.**

body:
Our campaign’s strong start is all because of your support.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38236297/314534472/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2021.11.02_b1_ty_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2021.11.02_b1_ty_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjkwZjE0Ny0xMzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERHJbRYiTso8FIigGr8u3OQp22ChGHNlxTrIHvEAmu0=)
---
Friends,

I wanted to take a minute today to say thank you for helping us smash our first month’s fundraising goals.

Our campaign’s strong start is all because of your support and the support of grassroots donors like you that chipped in $5, $10, or whatever they had available. I’m humbled and honored that we’re in this race together.

The only way that we’re going to defeat my extreme Republican opponent is by working together and spreading our message to WI-03 voters.

With that said, I’d like to hear what issues matter most to you.

**If you have a couple of minutes, I’d love to hear what issues matter most to you in this upcoming election, and what you’d like to hear from me on the campaign trail.** | [TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38236299/314534473/-1774189801?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2021.11.02_b1_ty_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2021.11.02_b1_ty_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2021.11.02_b1_ty_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjkwZjE0Ny0xMzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERHJbRYiTso8FIigGr8u3OQp22ChGHNlxTrIHvEAmu0=&emci=10ff86a4-f33b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d690f147-133c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3200050)
---
I wouldn’t be doing my job as a candidate if I didn’t listen to the people supporting me and the people I aim to represent in Washington.

So if you have a moment, I’d love to find out what’s on your mind. **[Will you fill out this survey about our race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38236301/314534476/-1774189801?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2021.11.02_b1_ty_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2021.11.02_b1_ty_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2021.11.02_b1_ty_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjkwZjE0Ny0xMzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERHJbRYiTso8FIigGr8u3OQp22ChGHNlxTrIHvEAmu0=&emci=10ff86a4-f33b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d690f147-133c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3200050)**

Forward,

Brad Pfaff

name: Team Collier
subject: SB8 at the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
This is a critical moment, team. **This week, the Supreme Court begins hearing oral arguments for Texas’ SB 8.** SB8 mocks women, mocks the rule of law, and mocks the Constitution. As a refresher, SB8 — championed by Dan Patrick — cancels already guaranteed constitutional rights and robs a woman of her reproductive rights, even in the case of rape and incest. It seems that even conservative justices, like Kavanaugh and Barrett, are concerned about how this bill cancels constitutional rights. Molly Ivins once said that under Republicans, Texas is the national laboratory for bad government. That is especially true with SB8 and the outcome of this case will have a huge impact on women not only in Texas but all across the country for years to come. **[We cannot allow the Supreme Court to overturn years of precedent. Add your name next to Mike’s if you agree that we need to elect leadership that will protect our constitutional rights and allow every woman to control their own body:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38236371/314534608/2067427996?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTkwZjE0Ny0xMzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7RTO43aGpzQAVqy-HIehxeHxFpIw1hzxKEijGpsRic=&emci=ea753844-0b3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ce90f147-133c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7689298)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38236374/314534610/2067427996?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTkwZjE0Ny0xMzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7RTO43aGpzQAVqy-HIehxeHxFpIw1hzxKEijGpsRic=&emci=ea753844-0b3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ce90f147-133c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7689298)

clean_body: | This is a critical moment, team. This week, the Supreme Court begins hearing oral arguments for Texas’ SB 8. SB8 mocks women, mocks the rule of law, and mocks the Constitution. As a refresher, SB8 — championed by Dan Patrick — cancels already guaranteed constitutional rights and robs a woman of her reproductive rights, even in the case of rape and incest. It seems that even conservative justices, like Kavanaugh and Barrett, are concerned about how this bill cancels constitutional rights. Molly Ivins once said that under Republicans, Texas is the national laboratory for bad government. That is especially true with SB8 and the outcome of this case will have a huge impact on women not only in Texas but all across the country for years to come. | Thanks for everything you do. Together, we will bring forth compassionate and honest leadership that represents ALL Texans. Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

During CNN’s Presidential Town Hall, Joe Biden said he was open to altering the filibuster to pass voting rights legislation (and maybe more!).
**To be clear:** The filibuster allows 41 Republican Senators to STOP Joe Biden’s agenda in its tracks. And since Democrats only have 51 votes in the Senate, Mitch McConnell’s minority holds a lot of power.
Republicans have already blocked the Freedom to Vote Act and threatened to kill the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. Meanwhile, Republican state legislators are pushing over 400 voter suppression bills in 49 states!
The clock is ticking, and we can’t let Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies stand in the way of progress, Peter!
But we want to know if you would support a Biden push to eliminate the filibuster. So before midnight:
**Do you think Democrats should eliminate the filibuster to pass historic voting rights legislation?**
**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38236450/314534967/700585013?refcode=em_UTC_PET_FilibusterPoll_110221_ButtonYes2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZmNjY2Q5LTEzM2MtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0fVz7chxOEuZoc0xuY-3F_o7JNKgNcSzVw_Do0l_F48=)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38236451/314534968/700585013?refcode=em_UTC_PET_FilibusterPoll_110221_ButtonNo2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZmNjY2Q5LTEzM2MtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0fVz7chxOEuZoc0xuY-3F_o7JNKgNcSzVw_Do0l_F48=)**

Folks – the 2022 elections are one year away. **With the Senate majority on the line, all eyes will be on this race.** News outlets across the country are already calling this seat one of the most competitive in the country. Most recently, CNN reported that New Hampshire is likely to be **"the marquee Senate race of the 2022 election."** Republicans are one seat away from flipping the Senate, and Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have made Maggie Hassan their number one target. **They've already spent over $4 million attacking Maggie, and there are millions more on the way.** We can't afford to wait around as GOP super PACs raise millions of dollars to put Mitch McConnell back in power. That's why we're starting earlier than ever before to get staff on the ground, reach every Granite Stater, and build a winning campaign. **[I'm reaching out today to ask if you can chip in $5 to help us build the resources needed to compete. My end-of-month fundraising campaign just ended and I wanted to thank you for your support.

2. It allows us to make sure we talk to the people who need to hear our message.

**Most importantly, it allows us to win. It allows us to send Mike Garcia packing.**

name: Team Jayapal
subject: [SURVEY] Build Back Better Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We want to hear from you before voting on the Build Back Better Act.
#
Peter,
We wanted to get your input on the Build Back Better Act before Congress votes on it. Thanks to Pramila’s leadership and our progressive movement, we’re on the verge of passing this historic piece of legislation that will invest in working people, families, and our communities.
This transformative legislation provides funding for childcare, universal pre-K, home and community based care, affordable housing, health care, climate action, an extension of the Child Tax Credit, humane immigration reform, and much more. And it’s going to be funded by finally taxing the biggest corporations and wealthiest Americans so they begin to pay their fair share.
**[Can you take just two minutes to let us know which of these priorities are most important to you? Pramila is on the verge of passing President Biden’s agenda and we need to know if you’re on board before the big vote.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/build-back-better-survey/?source=em20211102-769&t=1&akid=769%2E420207%2EBfvy_m)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/build-back-better-survey/?source=em20211102-769&t=2&akid=769%2E420207%2EBfvy_m)**
Thanks for taking a few minutes to let Pramila know where you stand!
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211102-769-footer&t=3&refcode2=769_420207_Bfvy_m&akid=769%2E420207%2EBfvy_m)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: I’m grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I just wanted to send a note of gratitude to everyone on this team.
#

Friends -
I’m tremendously grateful to everyone who helped us make October a fantastic month for our campaign — perhaps our best yet!
I was thrilled to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund and End Citizen United // Let America Vote. They are leading voices in the fight for our progressive values, and it means the world that they know our campaign is best positioned to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat for Democrats!
We continued to travel the state meeting with voters — including the Raleigh Women’s March, the AFL-CIO’s candidate forum in Wilmington, and numerous stops on college campuses from the mountains to the coast.
And finally, we found out that our campaign outraised every other candidate in this race for the second quarter in a row — including failed former Governor Pat McCrory and Trump’s candidate Ted Budd.
All of this news and momentum is why the Charlotte Observer’s headline about our campaign said, “In NC race for Senate, one Democrat had a winning quarter.” A North Carolina political analyst added that we “can claim front-runner status.”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38237442/314542921/-1761473262?refcode2=277079d0-183c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211102-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcwNzlkMC0xODNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yedeeJfJZgq_iR56njlPTGgKxchkDtD3VYAUKFCjijw=)
That is a testament to what we’ve built together. The thousands of people who help power this work — whether you’re donating, volunteering, amplifying our posts on social media, or telling your family and friends about our campaign — are the backbone of our campaign.
Thank you so much for your support.
\- Cheri Beasley
Winning North Carolina’s Senate seat in 2022 will take all of us playing a role. But with many hands doing the hard work together, we can accomplish anything.
So if you’re all-in to help Cheri keep up this momentum and flip North Carolina, then **[please consider making a donation today. Each donation sends a powerful message about the grassroots enthusiasm for Cheri’s historic candidacy and puts us one step closer to victory!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38237444/314542923/-1758524142?refcode2=277079d0-183c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211102-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcwNzlkMC0xODNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yedeeJfJZgq_iR56njlPTGgKxchkDtD3VYAUKFCjijw=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38237450/314542927/-1761473262?refcode2=277079d0-183c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211102-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcwNzlkMC0xODNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yedeeJfJZgq_iR56njlPTGgKxchkDtD3VYAUKFCjijw=)**

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I went on Fox News a few days ago (yes, really)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

A few days ago, I went on _Fox News_ (yes, really) to champion President Biden's Build Back Better Agenda. This agenda matters to the folks I represent, and I'll talk to anyone, anywhere, anytime to make the case for it.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/aAflHkqc2cHL6PeE6I5v70qff9YWqFBUmEFw9UvTJSc=/JAGO2XSZlN9tF0DAVD2eu1c4Zhpdx15abCuYTA5VJJc=?ms=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})
It's crucial we don't miss this moment to get something across the finish line, so I'm doing everything I can to spread our message and deliver results for the American people.

Americans can't afford to go back to the pre-pandemic "normal." Even before COVID-19 devastated our communities, families across the nation were feeling the squeeze. I can't tell you how many working parents I've spoken to about the crushing cost of childcare, seniors about the price tag on prescription drugs and health care, or workers who are clocking in at two jobs but still can't make ends meet.

The Build Back Better framework does something to help these parents. To help the employers who need workers. **To help our nation -- and economy -- build back better and stronger than before. And, it keeps the President 's promise to ensure nobody earning less than $400,000 per year will pay a _penny_ more in taxes.**

**[If you agree it's time to get this legislation over the finish line, will you sign on today to show your support for President Biden's Build Back Better Agenda?](https://act.myngp.com/el/aAflHkqc2cHL6PeE6I5v70qff9YWqFBUmEFw9UvTJSc=/JAGO2XSZlN9tF0DAVD2eu1c4Zhpdx15abCuYTA5VJJc=?ms=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Middle class families and folks struggling to make ends meet deserve a break, plain and simple. The Build Back Better Agenda gives them a break by lowering costs, reducing taxes, and ensuring people have economic opportunities. At the same time, it will help our nation take critical action to combat the climate crisis.

The framework includes universal and free preschool for all three- and four-year-olds. It will forward affordable, high-quality care for older Americans and people with disabilities. It includes bipartisan legislation that I wrote to help communities that have faced persistent economic distress.

All of this doesn't mean I think this legislation is perfect. There are many more things I wish were included, but at the end of the day, it will make a positive difference for my constituents and for families across the country.

**[It's time to get this thing done. Will you sign on today to show your support for the Build Back Better framework?](https://act.myngp.com/el/aAflHkqc2cHL6PeE6I5v70qff9YWqFBUmEFw9UvTJSc=/JAGO2XSZlN9tF0DAVD2eu1c4Zhpdx15abCuYTA5VJJc=?ms=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/aAflHkqc2cHL6PeE6I5v70qff9YWqFBUmEFw9UvTJSc=/_Q6_bFH4xOBCimSkhOSdCC1SvY7WJNW0UNc_8Kb1CAs=?refcode=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211102_BBBFox_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/aAflHkqc2cHL6PeE6I5v70qff9YWqFBUmEFw9UvTJSc=/DVTTQhEr1nGpuJD8Q7m9LNM63Ab17vyKnZLJLhu4O8I=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aAflHkqc2cHL6PeE6I5v70qff9YWqFBUmEFw9UvTJSc=/KK2NuMr50Az3t0RTRHJhU1usKaHRIsFTF8TLuZv6c9k=)
---|---

name: Peter Franchot
subject: My Plan to Level the Playing Field for Black Marylanders
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
When Delegate Darryl Barnes issued his “Black Agenda'' challenge requesting that each candidate for Governor share their platform on issues facing Black Marylanders this summer, I was the only one to respond by the deadline. Back in August, I was the first candidate to announce my concrete plan to achieve economic, social, and political equity for Black Marylanders.
To Delegate Barnes, I would like to thank you for your recognition and leadership. I am proud to be leading out in front when it comes to securing a better life for our Black and Brown families, and when I’m Governor, I will work hand-in-hand with the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland to do it.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/d2z5m3W8-0ueFpIrik3KoA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/d2z5m3W8-0ueFpIrik3KoA2]My vision for our state in the years ahead is one of transformative progress for Black Marylanders, rooted in my track record of pragmatic good governance that delivers concrete results. From securing economic inclusion for our minority businesses, to utilizing housing as a vehicle for wealth and stability, to guaranteeing that all children get a high quality education regardless of zip code, and more, I will deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our Black communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
I want to know that you stand with me in the fight to secure a brighter and stronger future for Black Marylanders. Will you sign my petition endorsing my plan to achieve economic, social, and political equity for Black Marylanders? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/d2z5m3W8-0ueFpIrik3KoA2]
By adding your name, you can help our inclusive people-powered movement build the critical mass of grassroots support needed to win this election and bring the transformative change that Maryland needs in 2022.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?amount=20.22&refcode=em110221]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

clean_body: [ Peter, When Delegate Darryl Barnes issued his “Black Agenda'' challenge requesting that each candidate for Governor share their platform on issues facing Black Marylanders this summer, I was the only one to respond by the deadline. Back in August, I was the first candidate to announce my concrete plan to achieve economic, social, and political equity for Black Marylanders. To Delegate Barnes, I would like to thank you for your recognition and leadership. I am proud to be leading out in front when it comes to securing a better life for our Black and Brown families, and when I’m Governor, I will work hand-in-hand with the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland to do it. [ vision for our state in the years ahead is one of transformative progress for Black Marylanders, rooted in my track record of pragmatic good governance that delivers concrete results. From securing economic inclusion for our minority businesses, to utilizing housing as a vehicle for wealth and stability, to guaranteeing that all children get a high quality education regardless of zip code, and more, I will deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our Black communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. I want to know that you stand with me in the fight to secure a brighter and stronger future for Black Marylanders. Will you sign my petition endorsing my plan to achieve economic, social, and political equity for Black Marylanders? [] By adding your name, you can help our inclusive people-powered movement build the critical mass of grassroots support needed to win this election and bring the transformative change that Maryland needs in 2022. Thank you, [] DONATE [ Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer Friends of Peter Franchot P.O. body:
Senator John Kennedy is willing to do and say whatever it takes to make sure he remains in power. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lukemixon/hard-working-louisianans-deserve-better-pay?e=03e0a9e31b)

| Senator John Kennedy is willing to do and say whatever it takes to make sure he remains in power.

**In 2004, he advocated to raise the federal minimum wage, but now he does everything in his power to keep the minimum wage the same. **

I am committed to ensuring that Louisianans are paid a living wage, so they may never have to worry about how they will put food on the table or a roof over their family’s head.

name: Nancy Pelosi
