body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/LERqs2Ry~)

I don't have a second to spare.

**Polls close in Virginia 's MONUMENTAL election in just a few hours.**

And as I write this, Republicans are fighting to pull off a STUNNING victory in this must-win state.

But make no mistake: ****[No matter what happens in tonight's election, Republicans have already begun shifting their focus from winning Virginia to destroying our Democratic House Majority.](https://links.e.dccc.)****

We can't be caught off guard. We MUST be ready for whatever is coming our way -- **and FAST, because a GOP victory in Virginia tonight will only embolden their attacks on my House Democrats tomorrow.**

That's why, with just hours left before polls close in one of the most important elections of the year, I'm reaching out with a critical request:

****[Can you chip in $3 to help protect my House Democrats and defend our Democratic House Majority from imminent Republican attacks?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBeEb~ES-)****

name: Gwen Moore
subject: So humbled because of you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers – we did it! We finished October on solid footing meeting our fundraising goal just in the nick of time.

I am truly proud to represent the wonderful people of Wisconsin, and families across the country in Congress. I am humbled by your amazing support.

But we cannot rest, we face a challenging 2022 and hold the House and the Senate. Trump-loving Republicans are looking for any opportunity of weakness so they can take over the House and continue to push Trump’s vulgar, bigoted, white supremacist agenda. We are the line of defense preventing that from becoming our new reality.

Let’s crush what we raised in October to show the GOP just how strong we are. Will you help by showing your support now? Donate using this secure link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwennovember21?refcode=110221

Together #WeRepresent

Gwen Moore
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

name: Terry (personal)
subject: From the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Thank you for everything
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38238096/314545667/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.12_TM_10LH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTExZDFhNi0xYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T_RQMTDDAhPk6ceRKMgVWUSju95Ki7Pfbv_bnAlRJ3Y=)

| | Derek,

With less than three hours until polls close, I wanted to take a minute to say thank you.

This team has been absolutely incredible. You’ve been with me every step of the way, and you’ve been the backbone of this historic campaign.

_I will be forever grateful._

Now, I have one final ask for this team. **And I promise — this is the last thing I will ask of you before polls close in the most important election in the country.**

_**[Will you make a contribution of anything meaningful to you to help support our Voter Mobilization Team’s advertising efforts before polls close?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38238097/314545668/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.12_TM_10LH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTExZDFhNi0xYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T_RQMTDDAhPk6ceRKMgVWUSju95Ki7Pfbv_bnAlRJ3Y=)**_

Believe it or not — you can still have an impact on the outcome of this race. There are Virginians who are getting ready to head home for the day and we have an opportunity to make sure they see an ad from our campaign about how & when they can vote before polls close.

Let’s make sure none of us wake up on Wednesday morning wondering if there was something else we could’ve done.

Instead, let’s leave it all on the field.

Let’s go!

Terry | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38238098/314545669/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.12_TM_10LH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTExZDFhNi0xYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T_RQMTDDAhPk6ceRKMgVWUSju95Ki7Pfbv_bnAlRJ3Y=)**

name: Giffords.org
subject: We’re suing the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They broke campaign finance law and illegally supported candidates who support their agenda.
#

We wanted you to be among the first to know:
**We are suing the NRA.**
Today, we filed a groundbreaking lawsuit for violations of campaign finance laws dating back to 2014. We know the NRA engaged in a broad pattern of illegal activity involving violations of the federal election laws’ contribution limits, ban on corporate contributions, and disclosure requirements.
[**Want to support us in this legal fight? Make a $3 contribution today to help us fight back against the NRA’s illegal tactics and hold the gun lobby accountable:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211102-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1172_3935704_5H6OXw&akid=1172%2E3935704%2E5H6OXw)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211102-1-subs&t=25&refcode2=1172_3935704_5H6OXw&akid=1172%2E3935704%2E5H6OXw)**
---
****
The NRA made as much as _$35 million_ in unlawful campaign contributions to Senate candidates and to Donald Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign. They exceeded federal limits and evaded restrictions on corporate contributions, and then falsely reported this spending in filings with the FEC.
**They did all this in order to elect extreme right-wing candidates who would never put reasonable checks on their pro-gun agenda.**
It’s time to hold the NRA accountable for illegal actions that corrupted politicians who were supposed to protect Americans from gun violence.
But remember, while the NRA illegally funnels money into campaigns, we’re doing the honest work to hold them accountable, and to elect gun safety candidates up and down the ballot.
[**Donate to help us do it.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211102-1-subs&t=26&refcode2=1172_3935704_5H6OXw&akid=1172%2E3935704%2E5H6OXw)
Thank you for helping to save lives.
The team at Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211102-1-subs&t=27&refcode2=1172_3935704_5H6OXw&akid=1172%2E3935704%2E5H6OXw)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Hello Peter Willis -
The most frustrating part of the border crisis is how simple the solution is.
**Send in the National Guard and the illegal immigrant flood is reduced to a trickle. Texas is doing that right now and it's working!**
But Texas is only one part of the border. We need to adopt that strategy nationwide if we are going to stop this invasion.
[_**I took that message to Fox Business yesterday. clean_body: | | | | The most frustrating part of the border crisis is how simple the solution is. Hello Peter Willis - The most frustrating part of the border crisis is how simple the solution is. Send in the National Guard and the illegal immigrant flood is reduced to a trickle. Texas is doing that right now and it's working! But Texas is only one part of the border. We need to adopt that strategy nationwide if we are going to stop this invasion. | If President Biden wanted to secure the border he could order in the National Guard today. He doesn't want to. Biden will have to be forced to take action. The opposition to his agenda will have to become so overwhelming he has no choice but to listen to us. That day is rapidly approaching. Biden's approval numbers on the border are lower than they've ever been - because we've been out there fighting! We need your help to keep getting our message out. You are the backbone that supports all of our important work. Support our mission today and together we will win this battle. | Thank you for your generous support, Sheriff Mark Lamb Founder | Protect America Now Sheriff Mark Lamb 530 E McDowell Rd #107, Bldg 252, Phoenix, AZ 85004

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Sleepy Joe wants to pay illegals $450k each!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Close the border! No bribes to illegals! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=54347f74ea&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

When I visited the border, I saw first hand the tragedy that the Biden regime's disastrous immigration policies have wrought.

It's no joke. This is a catastrophe caused because Biden invited these illegals to come here with the promise of free stuff.

_Now he's wayyyyy upped the ante._

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f5a7bb0ccd&e=afa21b7626), in the shadow of Disney World. It's currently held by Darren Soto- an open-borders Dem who wants to pay illegals!**

I never thought I'd see many of the things Biden has done already. The damage he has done to America has been devastating. But this is truly beyond the pale!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3cc29252f6&e=afa21b7626)
---
| FOX News reports on this travesty:

_President Biden's administration is considering whether to make payments to immigrants who were separated from their families at the border under former President Trump's administration, according to a report from the Wall Street Journal.

The report, based on remarks from "people familiar with the matter," states that payments of "around $450,000 a person in compensation" could be issued to immigrants affected by Trump's zero-tolerance immigration policy in an effort "to resolve lawsuits filed on behalf of parents and children who say the government subjected them to lasting psychological trauma."

The Journal stated the Departments of Justice, Homeland Security and Health and Human Services are "considering payments that could amount to close to $1 million a family," though final payment amounts could change as some "families would likely get smaller payouts, depending on their circumstances."

"For perspective, if a service member is killed in action, their next of kin gets an insurance payment of $400,000," Crenshaw wrote. "Let that sink in."_

So that's it, huh? Illegals get $450,000 each- but veterans only get $400,000 for a life given in service to the country?

_**Joe Biden is a treasonous snake. He has no right doing this. **_

This is how we get thousands of illegals showing up on our doorstep. They were invited, bribed even, by Biden- who then lets them in, ignoring all U.S. immigration law.

_Almost a million illegals, unvaccinated and untested, have been let in by Biden this year. He is literally trying to remake the American electorate by allowing this invasion._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=467314f158&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Biden has no idea what he's doing- and my Congressman wants to help him make these huge bribes to illegals.

I have a better idea. Why don't we impeach Biden, and stop this invasion?**

[I will force Biden to close our border. We will take away his power to do damage. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=01c14edc53&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto hasn't stood up against a single bad idea Biden has had. He hasn't cast one single vote to hold Biden accountable for this disaster. He wants to pay illegals $450k apiece to break our laws!_

What is going on here!

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and put a stop on every bad idea Biden has!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2bcbc7344e&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=31f0edffd7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1ecfa966a1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e23b08e8c0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=71f93c3c6b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Trump's new social media platform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend,

Donald Trump was banned from major social media platforms for good reason: He has an unrivaled lust for spreading dangerous misinformation and conspiracy theories, and he used his social media accounts to help incite an insurrection on our Capitol.

But now, Trump is using a bevy of investors – shielded by a process of unsecured, opaque financial assets – to launch his own social media platform. He's calling it "Truth Social."

Let's be crystal clear about what this platform would be: a home to anything but the truth. It would be a home for right-wing propaganda and conspiracy theories that have the potential to lead to dangerous misinformation campaigns and violence. In short, it would be a home for any and all "news" that is unfit to print.

Friend, we already have enough challenges with existing platforms like Facebook that amplify misinformation. The last thing we need right now is for Trump to return to social media with a personal digital bull horn – inevitably becoming a megaphone to the most extreme, right-wing rhetoric in the country.

I need to know where you stand on Donald Trump's potential return to social media. Please, will you submit your response before my 11:59 p.m. deadline? I'm looking for 1,200 members of this team to speak out, and I haven't heard from you yet:

Do you support Donald Trump returning to social media?

Yes
https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trumpsmban?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1092-fr-nd

No
https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trumpsmban?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1092-fr-nd

Thank you,

Dick

Contribute - https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1092-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500

--

name: Eric Gash
subject: Thank you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress
body:
With your support, our movement continues to grow locally, and our effort to deliver compassionate, unifying leadership to North Carolina's 11th district is picking up momentum. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38239009/314550081/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTZmZjJkMS0yMjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJoSB_AWjbWiWaHwf1IAX54Zkw1Dcz1Ej3IzZlwUXfc=)
Friend,

**I wanted to take a moment to extend my sincere thanks for your generous contributions to my campaign.** With your support, our movement continues to grow locally, and our effort to deliver compassionate, unifying leadership to North Carolina's 11th district is picking up momentum.

When I first launched my campaign for Congress, I wasn't sure what to expect. I'm not a politician -- nor have I ever run for office. But over the last few years, I grew deeply concerned seeing the heart of this nation harden. The murder of George Floyd. The rise in racism and extreme division in our communities. As a father, pastor, and mentor to young people, my purpose transformed.

That’s why I brought law enforcement and activists in my community together to make sure what happened to George Floyd would never happen in our community. It's also why I'm so committed to unseating Madison Cawthorn -- a misled young man who has made his short career sowing the seeds of hate in this community.

**Friend, change can only happen if we develop trust, so it's my hope that we continue building relationships with one another in this community. In that spirit, I would like to hear from you directly:

[Please take a moment to share your thoughts about our campaign, the issues we face as a nation, or anything else that's on your mind. I take your feedback very seriously.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38239010/314550082/1664177268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTZmZjJkMS0yMjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJoSB_AWjbWiWaHwf1IAX54Zkw1Dcz1Ej3IzZlwUXfc=&emci=646ff2d1-223c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=656ff2d1-223c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18459276)**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: EMERGENCY ACTION – Stop Congressional Democrats!
body:
| |
---
The Democrats are moving on three bills that we HAVE TO STOP. These are bills that would such deep systemic changes to our country, our governance, and our elections, that America would become utterly unrecognizable. If you don’t like calling Congress, please make an exception today and make these calls. Be sure to forward this email to others as well! Thank you!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._

**CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVE**
**You must call your US Representative today (Tuesday) and tomorrow (Wednesday) and give the following messages:**
1. Vote NO on the infrastructure bill.
2. Vote NO on the reconciliation bill.

[Find your Representative’s number here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzA2LTZiZDI0NDI0NjVlNTRhZTNhZjExZjgwZjM5ZDUxNDMx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcy9maW5kLXlvdXItcmVwcmVzZW50YXRpdmU_bWlkPTQ0NTI2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=uCFM1Xedn664wnyNVjXTWA)

The problem is that there are Republicans who want to vote for the infrastructure bill, but the infrastructure bill and the reconciliation bill are tied together. If infrastructure passes, then reconciliation will pass. The reconciliation bill (Democrats call it the “Build Back Better Act,” but it’s better known as the “Build Back Socialist Act”) is filled with almost all of the radical polices that the hard Left has wanted for decades. If it passes, not only can we not afford it financially as a nation, but it will completely transform America. It contains mass amnesty, the Green New Deal, and more. It. Is. Awful. And, if infrastructure passes, Build Back Socialist passes.

You must call whether your Rep. is a Democrat or Republican, but if your Rep. is a Republican, be sure to let the office know that Republicans must stick together to protect the American people from the Democrats. There is no reason for Republicans to help Democrats destroy America, and because the Democrats have tied infrastructure and reconciliation together, Republicans must reject both. Force Democrats to pass these by themselves.

**CALL YOUR SENATORS + FIVE**
The Democrats are also moving forward with their “Freedom to Cheat Act” (also known as H.R.4 or the “John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act”).

This is a federal, partisan takeover of our elections. Democrats know their agenda is unpopular and they must cheat in order to win. This bill will allow them to cheat more, more easily, and with more frequency.

**Call both of your Senators and tell them to vote NO on the John Lewis Voting bill.** [Find your Senators’ numbers here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzA2LTZiZDI0NDI0NjVlNTRhZTNhZjExZjgwZjM5ZDUxNDMx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZmluZC1zZW5hdG9ycz9taWQ9NDQ1MjYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=qpzI-yLD6hQO9OxcCARd0A)

**Then, if you have an extra five minutes, please call the following five Senators** who need to especially hear this message. And, if you live in these states, it is EXTREMELY IMPORTANT that you make your call!

**Sen. Manchin (WV)** – (202 )224-3954
**Sen. Tester (MT)** – (202) 224-2644
**Sen. Sinema (AZ)** – (202) 224-4521
**Sen. Hassan (NH)** – (202) 224-3324
**Sen. King (ME)** – (202) 224-5344

**Suggested reading about this bill:**
* [KEY VOTE: “NO” on the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (H.R. 4)](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzA2LTZiZDI0NDI0NjVlNTRhZTNhZjExZjgwZjM5ZDUxNDMx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9oZXJpdGFnZWFjdGlvbi5jb20va2V5LXZvdGUva2V5LXZvdGUtbm8tb24tdGhlLWpvaG4tbGV3aXMtdm90aW5nLXJpZ2h0cy1hZHZhbmNlbWVudC1hY3QtaC1yLTQtMj9taWQ9NDQ1MjYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=3hczhmpXMVOvxSvQk7Ki9Q)

Jenny Beth Martin

name: Terry McAuliffe via DPVA
subject: I’m counting on you today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
It’s time to vote.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38239220/314551282/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWRlZWUwYS0yNDNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrg2RPe8-z_z1t5Kuz7NMrgYZPB4g6DeW4C1EBLe82U=&emci=677ede92-e13b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=51deee0a-243c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15759664)

| | Derek — today’s the day. If you’re a Virginia voter, this is your last chance to get out to the polls to cast your vote in the most consequential and closest election of 2021. I wanted to reach out to make sure you know just how important the election today will be and to make sure you get out there to vote: Not only are the Virginia Governor, the Lieutenant Governor, and the Attorney General up for election, but the House of Delegates is at a tipping point. If we lose these critical seats, Virginia’s progress will be set back for years to come. That’s why it’s so important for you to check to make sure you’re registered to vote, find your polling location, and get out there! **Find all that information at:_[iwillvote.com/VA](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38239222/314551284/772993946?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWRlZWUwYS0yNDNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrg2RPe8-z_z1t5Kuz7NMrgYZPB4g6DeW4C1EBLe82U=&emci=677ede92-e13b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=51deee0a-243c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15759664)_** I don’t need to remind you that polls have Virginia as a toss-up, and with the future of Virginia resting in the hands of voters, we need to make sure that everyone gets out there. Please, bring your family and friends with you to vote because we’re all counting on you. We can’t afford a Trump-endorsed candidate in the Governor’s office, and the only way we’ll win is if Democrats turn out and vote. — Terry
---
|
---

| Click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/677ede92-e13b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/51deee0a-243c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWRlZWUwYS0yNDNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrg2RPe8-z_z1t5Kuz7NMrgYZPB4g6DeW4C1EBLe82U=&id=118612594).

name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6558%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4PXPsQyQv0iOID%2fPdrB9Hg&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67705%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3o2MwwroKocR1s5b0UG%2f%2fg&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67706%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yo7noq0zjDLK21Bx53TNzA&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67707%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9I7JAJ3wT1BHAyCz175qYg&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6558%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4PXPsQyQv0iOID%2fPdrB9Hg&sysid=1)_

| | I’m so nervous I’m tearing my hair out.

Early voting looks great for Terry and Democrats up and down the ballot. But I’ll be honest — this race is a nailbiter.

_**[Will you rush a last-minute contribution to Terry’s campaign to make sure his Voter Mobilization Team has enough resources to turn out every last Virginia Democrat before polls close?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38239298/314551425/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.13_JC_10LI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2RlZWUwYS0yNDNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JBUuztTnmq9usHHu1Oj0ebZDO3YEwQUvSafrdw9Vxsk=)**_

On one side of this race, we’ve got Terry, a guy with a proven track record as a leader who has plans to help all Virginians by building the economy, expanding health care and supporting working families.

On the other side, we’ve got a guy _**endorsed by Donald Trump**_ who wants to roll back progress, promote Trump’s election conspiracies and push extreme, right-wing agenda policies like ending abortion.

This race is way tighter than it should be, Derek. **But the numbers are clear — if Virginia Democrats turn out the way they did in 2020, Terry will be Governor and Glenn Youngkin and extremism will be soundly rejected in the Commonwealth.**

From: Primary Kyrsten Sinema [info@primarysinema.com]
Date: Mon, Nov 1, 2021
Subject: How we're going to beat Kyrsten Sinema:
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_ Thank you again for joining the Primary Sinema project. We've had a _huge_ response so far — and we're just getting started! We have big plans to beat Kyrsten Sinema. In fact, 100% of the money we raise will be strategically invested in Arizona grassroots organizations who are laying the groundwork to oust her. **[Will you make a contribution toward our project today? The only way we're going to beat Sinema is by building a big, diverse movement that will reach every community in Arizona; your gift today will help us build that movement.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS_YSSoaR4KGElAXooHJhFaCS9bBw3eKf97qYq47YnV2fdKN0-I-Y0ujPRW80wKFgj4rANPOJJ8dJ7gWJonDRmiFEcpchshSkg3IRQVjy3Ik2ZmqEOaIGEe6ymHBco6ed4Z3TDLfN8V97d7d96x1EnRUtrBsO57ag9qZK7MNz45svG8f5PWDtGkxr_p9sjYZgMib6JIyA7EdfKblNR6694oPnHf1M2aJVVkUfZdpzP-5CWBd_h_F9npNolJ-dqZ6BACVvSllX_XiAO5Sk5u058YUVD8THxs3VhJKrK7oflrafPRdeTsv-zZPm5Xo0VAvUKdkcDxV7iSZ3BEju317Kokw/3go/6ypBXM5dS0SiK5fJSDOqKQ/h2/Es044saucxAiytygUuxhrXZe5aVwbBYxAOGwC2se_mE)** Here's why we're organizing to beat Kyrsten Sinema:
* **Kyrsten Sinema is the #1 obstacle holding up Joe Biden's agenda in the Senate.** She opposes the Build Back Better plan. She wants to keep the filibuster, even if it means not passing voting rights. And she doesn't care what voters think because she's too busy listening to her corporate donors and their lobbyists.
* **So we have no choice but to primary Kyrsten Sinema.** And we can win this — according to a recent poll,_two-thirds of Democrats_ in Arizona say they'd vote for a primary challenger to Sinema. And that was _before_ she blocked the Build Back Better plan!
* **But we can't wait until a primary challenger jumps in the race.** Beating an incumbent Senator is hard, so we need to act NOW to build the infrastructure we'll need to defeat her.

**[That's why we launched Primary Sinema, and that's why we're so glad you're with us. clean_body: Did you see our message from yesterday? | | | Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw our email from yesterday. Ever since we launched the Primary Sinema project, we've received an incredible response — and we're energized by Arizonans and folks all across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema. Thanks! The Primary Sinema team \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Primary Kyrsten Sinema [info@primarysinema.com] Date: Mon, Nov 1, 2021 Subject: How we're going to beat Kyrsten Sinema: To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com] Thank you again for joining the Primary Sinema project. We've had a huge response so far — and we're just getting started! We have big plans to beat Kyrsten Sinema. In fact, 100% of the money we raise will be strategically invested in Arizona grassroots organizations who are laying the groundwork to oust her. Here's why we're organizing to beat Kyrsten Sinema: Kyrsten Sinema is the #1 obstacle holding up Joe Biden's agenda in the Senate. She opposes the Build Back Better plan. She wants to keep the filibuster, even if it means not passing voting rights. And she doesn't care what voters think because she's too busy listening to her corporate donors and their lobbyists. So we have no choice but to primary Kyrsten Sinema. And we can win this — according to a recent poll,two-thirds of Democrats in Arizona say they'd vote for a primary challenger to Sinema. And that was before she blocked the Build Back Better plan! But we can't wait until a primary challenger jumps in the race. Beating an incumbent Senator is hard, so we need to act NOW to build the infrastructure we'll need to defeat her. Look, we're not helicoptering in from other states to campaign against Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona. Rather, we're strategically investing in grassroots organizations on the ground that have smart ideas for anti-Sinema organizing and communications efforts. So beating Kyrsten Sinema starts with raising revenue so we can give those groups a budget. Also, thank you again for your early support — it really does make a huge impact. Keep an eye on your inbox to learn about even more ways you can help us primary Kyrsten Sinema. Thanks, The Primary Sinema team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znaptckmms6lio7lmenc8pq2imlf1oq1n005nh8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3ge1or4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zd48gqef7jasfahoitqdgtkmddom92g4okeo03uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3ge1or4cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zoh6n7joo0tmsc8j5n25j1l951sp0u4d633l6f9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c3ge1or4cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Mark Walker
subject: SCOTUS takes up Texas’ pro-life law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
I will stand up for the right to life. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/19c18e5ebd5e8cd1/8645ca99642f0e05c3d6b838967d376c/35903)
---
Peter, Yesterday, the Supreme Court began hearing oral arguments regarding the Texas Heartbeat Act. This is a historic moment for the pro-life movement.
This legislation has effectively shut down the abortion-on-demand industry in the Lone Star State and has already saved the lives of hundreds of babies.
---
[**SUPPORT TEXAS’ HEARTBEAT LAW NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/19c18e5ebd5e8cd1/43d4dc5c5a6f72c4c3d6b838967d376c/35903)
---
Sadly, liberal Democrats are hellbent on overturning this law and want to overrun the Court with radical judges who will stand against precious life. **[Can you help us defend this legislation and the right to life?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/19c18e5ebd5e8cd1/3e75ee546731bdd5c3d6b838967d376c/35903)**
We MUST stand up and defend the sanctity of life. We cannot sit on the sidelines and allow the left to pack the court and overturn the Texas Heartbeat law.
I have been an unwavering champion for the unborn, and I will never stop fighting for those who need our help the most.
Thank you,
-Mark Walker
---
[**I AM PROUD TO BE 100% PRO-LIFE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/19c18e5ebd5e8cd1/c6b410d77c524a0dc3d6b838967d376c/35903)

body:
It’s time for folks like you and me to stand up to the radical Left and use the power of democracy to make a change. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=22030ac09dc348deaddcee27802e8ba9&_e=XHgQkpiKa8GJLf_Tg78gogRn1XuIqYd7VKtFKrV7CO7m_rFjiYeEXfj1evB3lIW5feVTDShChKmjFQhloIe-dCkNtDqdaxRGp9JCZGHZCSlqoD0Kt2IPT0RtK4RN1lCMfGK9a499AUK0lD9NO4WdJRUO2Ga3Ps2X2UpUVc_v9txaIGuDvWwGHQmnnGUA6dtfMEVYNHleMBZr2K7QZsV2ZpUb5EpFzWu3EZtwJVBJcGeSfwnphfH1j27UnbJ-tIgPAPjz6WcK1XrTwt9pSSmHRtxr99jpwy0EtWsWt_CXOUouZKq1wEdMsGimkAJ87F_5T3JHrxXM5L9zFOZPAggjLWdkeDDz2z71tRXdhCi8tsuhcBuIZEnrEQFk6fl3L5SR1HJMGSQD48YvvH7eX-3YLhkLRID3jU7grCCu8KVgwL_5belVUWY5HJsLiSx9xk-7) A time-honored tradition. Elections in America. It is inspiring. It’s time for folks like you and me to stand up to the radical Left and use the power of democracy to make a change. I look forward to seeing big wins in New Jersey and Virginia - common sense winning out over big government - especially at the local level. This is the beginning of our movement to take back the House this time next year. With momentum on our side, we can make it happen. [**CHIP IN TO NANCY MACE**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=22030ac09dc348deaddcee27802e8ba9&_e=XHgQkpiKa8GJLf_Tg78gogRn1XuIqYd7VKtFKrV7CO7m_rFjiYeEXfj1evB3lIW5feVTDShChKmjFQhloIe-dCkNtDqdaxRGp9JCZGHZCSlqoD0Kt2IPT0RtK4RN1lCMfGK9a499AUK0lD9NO4WdJRUO2Ga3Ps2X2UpUVc_v9txaIGuDvWwGHQmnnGUA6dtfMEVYNHleMBZr2K7QZsV2ZpUb5EpFzWu3EZtwJVBJcGdeyu2M6c8duxZ7hI06geZnUn51mrXSBNPpfln3MRsctUiHGaUCM4_OZXtvqzW2Mlkbh3-dxsqh8hvAJiDolJYobb5J0EhnF2RR4mtLhmQf5IXLm110xuCY6dYybl2Q0-dCYRxwV7MnN4C5ojg9pBcoaJRxNMIQAx7rhUQQZpkAaEMeuKX5pMNncuMDFeRSwAsz5FQCw0nhvTVxEXD9r07f) Americans everywhere are sick and tired of business as usual from the Left, putting big government over working people and targeting parents instead of actual criminals. We need to build on the momentum that is building RIGHT NOW. We CAN take back the House. We can’t let them force mandates, shutdowns, and more and more taxes on us. It is sending our economy into the gutter. The policies of the Left hurt every single one of us. Will you stand with me for FISCAL responsibility and COMMON SENSE economic policies? I need your support to show the Left that the people aren’t buying what they are selling. subject: Did you see this? Former CNN employee ARRESTED...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016G2OcYE_kfPLMyavYclx2_E202zUFahPJuoA5G_vx_JfzcRRXfTmg29-KrmySrmgHZyEH1oaIv1yfRhmCKKjP4PGYyiZLvyYHwh7xhcV1onN9yfPohy0t_QYyEhwUs6nySJO7Y8QXrOtmN6eTBo5Meb6pblJ8llBEUut3ysuZOjy1bvZDSDNrw==&c=8LyJiIGxaobPwMYAWyZAmA1jcdSjf12lAXkH0DrvdNzUCOZXT1zmCQ==&ch=r5jwSo9m8pzvpjGePvSyL8XZU3nwVWGUA6yrWBgf77N1P6TnpeDDKg==)
---
| BREAKING: Eugene "Gene" Huelsman, a longtime camera operator for CNN, ABC, NBC, and other media outlets, has been ARRESTED for threatening to kill me and my family.
Back in January of this year, Gene Huelsman left a [chilling voicemail](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016G2OcYE_kfPLMyavYclx2_E202zUFahPJuoA5G_vx_JfzcRRXfTmg29-KrmySrmgHZyEH1oaIv1yfRhmCKKjP4PGYyiZLvyYHwh7xhcV1onN9yfPohy0t_QYyEhwUs6nySJO7Y8QXrOtmN6eTBo5Meb6pblJ8llBEUut3ysuZOjy1bvZDSDNrw==&c=8LyJiIGxaobPwMYAWyZAmA1jcdSjf12lAXkH0DrvdNzUCOZXT1zmCQ==&ch=r5jwSo9m8pzvpjGePvSyL8XZU3nwVWGUA6yrWBgf77N1P6TnpeDDKg==) for me, threatening my life and the lives of my family members. As it turns out, Huelsman is a former employee of our favorite fake news media outlets: CNN, ABC, NBC, and others. It took almost 10 months before he was detained, but justice is finally being served.
[Watch](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016G2OcYE_kfPLMyavYclx2_E202zUFahPJuoA5G_vx_JfzcRRXfTmg29-KrmySrmgHZyEH1oaIv1yfRhmCKKjP4PGYyiZLvyYHwh7xhcV1onN9yfPohy0t_QYyEhwUs6nySJO7Y8QXrOtmN6eTBo5Meb6pblJ8llBEUut3ysuZOjy1bvZDSDNrw==&c=8LyJiIGxaobPwMYAWyZAmA1jcdSjf12lAXkH0DrvdNzUCOZXT1zmCQ==&ch=r5jwSo9m8pzvpjGePvSyL8XZU3nwVWGUA6yrWBgf77N1P6TnpeDDKg==) the report from Tucker Carlson here:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016G2OcYE_kfPLMyavYclx2_E202zUFahPJuoA5G_vx_JfzcRRXfTmg29-KrmySrmgHZyEH1oaIv1yfRhmCKKjP4PGYyiZLvyYHwh7xhcV1onN9yfPohy0t_QYyEhwUs6nySJO7Y8QXrOtmN6eTBo5Meb6pblJ8llBEUut3ysuZOjy1bvZDSDNrw==&c=8LyJiIGxaobPwMYAWyZAmA1jcdSjf12lAXkH0DrvdNzUCOZXT1zmCQ==&ch=r5jwSo9m8pzvpjGePvSyL8XZU3nwVWGUA6yrWBgf77N1P6TnpeDDKg==)
---
| Right now, [another man who recently threatened my life](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016G2OcYE_kfPLMyavYclx2_E202zUFahPJuoA5G_vx_JfzcRRXfTmg29-KrmySrmgHZyEH1oaIv1yfRhmCKKjP4PGYyiZLvyYHwh7xhcV1onN9yfPohy0t_QYyEhwUs6nySJO7Y8QXrOtmN6eTBo5Meb6pblJ8llBEUut3ysuZOjy1bvZDSDNrw==&c=8LyJiIGxaobPwMYAWyZAmA1jcdSjf12lAXkH0DrvdNzUCOZXT1zmCQ==&ch=r5jwSo9m8pzvpjGePvSyL8XZU3nwVWGUA6yrWBgf77N1P6TnpeDDKg==) is still walking the streets after the Biden DOJ blocked the Capitol Police recommendation for arrest.
My life may be threatened for leading this America First Movement in Congress, but I refuse to back down. Now is the time to stand together in solidarity against the threats, intimidation, and canceling by the Left and their partners in the mainstream media.
Remember...they want to come after you, but I'm standing in their way.
[>> Join me in the fight <<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016G2OcYE_kfPLMyavYclx2_E202zUFahPJuoA5G_vx_JfzcRRXfTmg29-KrmySrmgHZyEH1oaIv1yfRhmCKKjP4PGYyiZLvyYHwh7xhcV1onN9yfPohy0t_QYyEhwUs6nySJO7Y8QXrOtmN6eTBo5Meb6pblJ8llBEUut3ysuZOjy1bvZDSDNrw==&c=8LyJiIGxaobPwMYAWyZAmA1jcdSjf12lAXkH0DrvdNzUCOZXT1zmCQ==&ch=r5jwSo9m8pzvpjGePvSyL8XZU3nwVWGUA6yrWBgf77N1P6TnpeDDKg==) [>> Rush in your support <<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016G2OcYE_kfPLMyavYclx2_E202zUFahPJuoA5G_vx_JfzcRRXfTmg29-KrmySrmgHZyEH1oaIv1yfRhmCKKjP4PGYyiZLvyYHwh7xhcV1onN9yfPohy0t_QYyEhwUs6nySJO7Y8QXrOtmN6eTBo5Meb6pblJ8llBEUut3ysuZOjy1bvZDSDNrw==&c=8LyJiIGxaobPwMYAWyZAmA1jcdSjf12lAXkH0DrvdNzUCOZXT1zmCQ==&ch=r5jwSo9m8pzvpjGePvSyL8XZU3nwVWGUA6yrWBgf77N1P6TnpeDDKg==)
Thanks for standing with me,

name: Tim Ryan
subject: One year out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1323%2E3611125%2Eiudl7O ][IMG]

Folks --

Thank you.

I hope I say it enough. I hope you know how much I appreciate your
support. Thanks to you and our 17,994 donors, we met our email fundraising
goal.

We have the best darn supporters in the country. That’s why I’m confident
we can win this thing together.

But we can’t take our foot off the gas now. Today marks one year out from
the 2022 Election.

I know a year seems like a long time, but with a high-stakes race like
ours, we have to start campaigning early. Plus, my Republican opponents
have massive super PACs already boosting their campaigns (and chances of
winning) with TV buys, digital ads, you name it.

This race will determine Senate control. But folks, you and I both know
it’s about way more than which party holds the gavel -- it’s about raising
the minimum wage, bringing down health care costs, cutting workers in on
the deal, and giving families a bit more breathing room.

So with so much on the line and an uphill battle ahead of us, [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5773?t=1007&akid=1323%2E3611125%2Eiudl7O ]can I
count on you to chip in $25 or whatever you can so this time next year
we’ll have flipped this Ohio Senate seat blue?

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: "Joe Manchin’s opposition to the Build Back Better Act is anti-Black, anti-child, anti-woman, and anti-immigrant"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Corporate Democrats are obstacles to progress,
Peter. Joe Manchin, Kyrsten
Sinema, Henry Cuellar, Josh Gottheimer... the list goes on—they want to stop
economic relief to the people and bold changes for our country.

Yesterday, Joe Manchin said he was opposed to the current version of the
Build Back Better Act. Justice Democrat Cori Bush said it best:

"Joe Manchin does not get to dictate the future of our country...Joe
Manchin's opposition to the Build Back Better Act is anti-Black,
anti-child, anti-woman, and anti-immigrant."

Cori Bush is fighting for her district and communities across the country
who desperately need childcare, action to combat corporate pollution and
climate change, universal pre-K, affordable housing, and much more. That’s
what the 10 Justice Democrats in Congress are fighting for too.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81649?refcode=em20211102-20297&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=20297%2E1203867%2EbpxrAu ]Now we need to elect more Justice Democrats to build our power in
Congress and fight back against corporate Democrats. Can you make your
your first
$3 contribution to Justice Democrats so we can elect five
new Justice Democrats and counter Joe Manchin, fossil fuel lobbyists, and
Wall Street?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81649?refcode=em20211102-20297&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20297%2E1203867%2EbpxrAu ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=20297%2E1203867%2EbpxrAu ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=20297%2E1203867%2EbpxrAu ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Corporate Democrats are obstacles to progress, Peter. Joe Manchin, Kyrsten Sinema, Henry Cuellar, Josh Gottheimer... the list goes on—they want to stop economic relief to the people and bold changes for our country. Yesterday, Joe Manchin said he was opposed to the current version of the Build Back Better Act. Justice Democrat Cori Bush said it best: "Joe Manchin does not get to dictate the future of our country...Joe Manchin's opposition to the Build Back Better Act is anti-Black, anti-child, anti-woman, and anti-immigrant." Cori Bush is fighting for her district and communities across the country who desperately need childcare, action to combat corporate pollution and climate change, universal pre-K, affordable housing, and much more. That’s what the 10 Justice Democrats in Congress are fighting for too. [ ]Now we need to elect more Justice Democrats to build our power in Congress and fight back against corporate Democrats. Can you make your your first $3 contribution to Justice Democrats so we can elect five new Justice Democrats and counter Joe Manchin, fossil fuel lobbyists, and Wall Street? [ ]Contribute $3 In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

subject: BIG NEWS: Join Tiffany Shedd & a VERY special guest in Scottsdale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friends, Our campaign is excited to announce that former Trump administration official and Secretary of the Interior, David Bernhardt, will be headlining a fundraiser in support of Tiffany Shedd’s campaign for Attorney General on Wednesday, November 17th in Scottsdale! **We hope you will come join Secretary Bernhardt in support of our campaign. ** [You can find an invitation with more information by clicking here.](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=afb03bdd130a4ec9ad4dc4bba08b9c4b&_e=Myp5hlpy2rvmkLJEg94gXvtu1PfJWPlQYruvaJjTMyvtUzF0l7ZXZpXc2Q0Y2bofLt5AEZoMP-Uvdd-AHwz9OjDSo1UdSBD0b7MXRn6wD1EHRECt0xfQiIepODZOy8tDfnNafkh17WeAVUG1J2QOtYevSKMaqs-rUyZhq7uNism366Wlsy3AqhNWm9mNMrzAuJkrV9fcL6Q2ftA1E_ZYmrcmAKRjtSHnS8rVfQu-Svx1YSNganTIbYCkko02nzxiWimLlRCrJCB-rE4AfkWQaVavSULs74zmrp3SL5JUUUc7CM_ooehL2RbOJ2XDx-EBOjsIPI4FGPrHdrUBV2SxgQ%3D%3D) Here are the details: **Date:** Wednesday, November 17th **Time:** 4:30 pm - 6:30 pm **Location:** Hilton Scottsdale Resort, 6333 N Scottsdale Rd., Scottsdale, AZ 85250 **General Admission:** $250 **Co-Host:** $1,000 - _Includes name on sponsor board_ **Host:** $2,500 - _Includes name on sponsor board and a photo with Secretary Bernhardt_ Interested in supporting Tiffany and joining other conservative and pro-Trump Arizonans? [You can RSVP and make a contribution online right now by clicking here.](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=afb03bdd130a4ec9ad4dc4bba08b9c4b&_e=Myp5hlpy2rvmkLJEg94gXjiywL6-8lzD37f-G-qc9tAsiGPu5rR2S2Um1aH3TPkmU3aHF2P4LADpgmbQOB0DX2eB1p31UDdD8bu6JXdijI5vR1U2xbA_eqwDsiKi2B5tR2SpENSBn7egQhp7jTebWdreZaL-0ZGeHyeUzDjyGSx1FM1rxuCRGrgTZG4byr_lDgpOwHqkRBubrqduAUFCY_PvrOT_6kf67Rsg3PqcL9yD2c6inSom17eUiP4ItzBsIn-sjBKz54lobwKPON8qACG2tz9B_iCVgETZd3B7oKV4szHH3oRVqq2g5goRsmgI) **Tiffany hits the mark as the conservative choice for Attorney General – she is strong on the border, strong on the Second Amendment, and strong on election integrity. But we need your help to make sure conservatives win next year!** For more information on participating in this event, or to become a member of the host committee, please RSVP to me at hattie@sheddforaz.com or (580) 475-7334. **I hope to see you on November 17th!** Sincerely, Hattie Stockton Finance Assistant Tiffany Shedd for Attorney General Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.

body:
You may find this hard to believe, but our election is now less than four months away. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38240233/314556490/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWM1MjQwZi0yYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ug-etqR_5Fb0e9CzjV0I-uVuub9RZZGCfTjbjutjat0=)
Friend,

Before I update you on the next steps for our campaign, I want to say thank you for your support toward our October fundraising goal. Whether you chipped in your very first contribution, or you've been a faithful monthly supporter since day one -- I'm humbled that you are with us in this fight to send a champion for working families to Congress. _From the bottom of my heart, thank you!_

**You may find this hard to believe, but our election is now less than four months away. Early voting starts in February of next year. The next few months are going to be absolutely critical as we go door-to-door informing voters about the stakes here in Texas.**

One of our most critical tasks is reaching young people and students. Young parents and working families often juggle multiple jobs and don't have time to catch the local news or stay up to date on how the GOP is harming them in the state legislature. But that's no excuse for us.

We're not following the conventional political advice of asking for big checks and waiting until the very last moment to go up with TV advertisements. We're building on our grassroots organizing success from last year when we went to over 50,000 doors and drove record turnout in areas of our district. I'm confident that we have what it takes to beat the GOP and win in this Democratic-leaning district.

Your grassroots support is crucial to making that possible, and I couldn't do it without you.

Thanks for standing with me,

Donna

| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38240234/314556491/1898666321?refcode=em-11221-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWM1MjQwZi0yYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ug-etqR_5Fb0e9CzjV0I-uVuub9RZZGCfTjbjutjat0=)**

Voting is important every year. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38240364/314557232/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTZmODc2ZS0yYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jw-epqWKToIWJKGjEnFcNbG-ZEoQ922IQuKutK8kYUg=&emci=2526f6e5-223c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=796f876e-2c3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)

| | Today’s Election Day in Colorado, Peter!

It’s important to vote every year — today, we have three statewide ballot initiatives to vote on. And locally, you may have several municipal issues or local elected officials on the ballot depending on where you live.

**So we want to know: Do you have a plan to vote?** | ****[YES>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38240365/314557234/-1852699333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTZmODc2ZS0yYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jw-epqWKToIWJKGjEnFcNbG-ZEoQ922IQuKutK8kYUg=&emci=2526f6e5-223c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=796f876e-2c3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)****
---
****[NO, HELP ME MAKE ONE>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38240366/314557235/128464908?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTZmODc2ZS0yYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jw-epqWKToIWJKGjEnFcNbG-ZEoQ922IQuKutK8kYUg=&emci=2526f6e5-223c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=796f876e-2c3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)****
Participating in our elections is so important because it’s our way of being a part of the decision-making process. And these decisions impact our communities' futures in education, infrastructure, health care, and so much more.

Unfortunately, our right to vote is under attack — especially in communities of color. Ever since Trump spread his “Big Lie” after the 2020 election, Republicans have been working to destroy voting rights across the country.

In Congress, Dr. Caraveo will fight to bring ballot access to our community — just like she did in the state legislature.

In the State House, Dr. Caraveo introduced and successfully passed a bill to provide access to a ballot translation hotline, and, in some counties, a translated printed ballot. Starting in November 2022, multi-lingual ballot access will be available to thousands more Coloradans — and language barriers will no longer prohibit many Coloradans from participating in our elections.

But we can’t wait until Dr. Caraveo is in Congress fighting for us. We have to make sure our voices are heard at the ballot box by making a plan, talking to our friends and neighbors, and voting. That’s why it’s so important to get to the polls today if you haven’t yet cast your ballot!

Do you have a plan to vote in Colorado, Peter?
****[YES>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38240367/314557236/-1852699333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTZmODc2ZS0yYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jw-epqWKToIWJKGjEnFcNbG-ZEoQ922IQuKutK8kYUg=&emci=2526f6e5-223c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=796f876e-2c3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)****

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: A final nail in the coffin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by RGA Right Direction PAC
body:

body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=05fdb7add3894fee8b090b1551a26206&_e=6KaiSboEL9LtWuKHmjDlaUuKDzjrIQWLCmswYi7sks_8ZvSonPL5Im2Ol1e4rb9iouG9_bW_3Y4BN2N_wYi5DMrVi02QgDk6T75weWdAzvPNu-AFeoxlwKQNMw9UKsn_A3D4hVy_R9mH3EvcSZYwbs45LsVd_u9Q7hK4njmuOeJu8bnmVZbbYj7jw-X-CuQj__6HDOnDFBnJMrIn0dJOewlJmEMe1RzG57nPqS5mEbEZ7YCnYKilAl1DP6qwGJVqNmG9dAUNdO0or4Vl4zq7G5Ns5EJ8mGpa_m-3BWgknD5vUpEFQz8G_wU-EfM1aFJ9-FDtOl7p_A3kptGBXT-4q3Z9fL-bkqGGdNqcx5SORfKISC1T6vUp-sxogkqakX1IHMpoL-8H5p-J6VQ0HXy7-HdSlm24npTjV_XcURTl0MaEI6TZr56GimEDkjqbROZd_gebcrfuCYX3VtAbSqIOJPIgjHlIx_06ybEINbEu1EQ%3D)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=05fdb7add3894fee8b090b1551a26206&_e=6KaiSboEL9LtWuKHmjDlaUuKDzjrIQWLCmswYi7sks_8ZvSonPL5Im2Ol1e4rb9iouG9_bW_3Y4BN2N_wYi5DMrVi02QgDk6T75weWdAzvPNu-AFeoxlwKQNMw9UKsn_A3D4hVy_R9mH3EvcSZYwbs45LsVd_u9Q7hK4njmuOeJu8bnmVZbbYj7jw-X-CuQj__6HDOnDFBnJMrIn0dJOewlJmEMe1RzG57nPqS5mEbEZ7YCnYKilAl1DP6qwGJVqNmG9dAUNdO0or4Vl4zq7G5WFfwrE4xj6q7HFmRBXaSXpepBegzEWVB-hQngPZQnzhJN_p2UFdgaqvMpnaHyRHTLxzQdLMeChUx0gBPxZC-i1JSLx8NvK2wgU7TWxGXSwyyu9eL80eISMm3R0j7KM1zCiVV6xud5cs8LwYhoapi75yfGGsD9HgwLmVBO2YdQPm5Z-AyzoL1LnzrUAQWQ0IDonuJppWn9s0wqHplslnz8%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=05fdb7add3894fee8b090b1551a26206&_e=6KaiSboEL9LtWuKHmjDlaUuKDzjrIQWLCmswYi7sks_8ZvSonPL5Im2Ol1e4rb9iouG9_bW_3Y4BN2N_wYi5DMrVi02QgDk6T75weWdAzvPNu-AFeoxlwKQNMw9UKsn_A3D4hVy_R9mH3EvcSZYwbs45LsVd_u9Q7hK4njmuOeJu8bnmVZbbYj7jw-X-CuQj__6HDOnDFBnJMrIn0dJOewlJmEMe1RzG57nPqS5mEbEZ7YCnYKilAl1DP6qwGJVqNmG9dAUNdO0or4Vl4zq7G9gwuUrVdix1Rkz9pAglWfUCHjFKkHvwMpp2CCAbv4AF1azeJJlPX-IUT8o7uDVuoC0Jaf_msAGC8uQnXeU2Y5SPesB0zF7LJydjqn_I4cYgmYY6YXkkYYUdHulrcGfiy9AN_FqeeSeDNxTNBdCkLFcZETzcjjnX59AZaM6aXnRBwdHEDD0FcgwS4zijKjwtGtNcKofXFMcs0bM6qanSFPI%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=05fdb7add3894fee8b090b1551a26206&_e=6KaiSboEL9LtWuKHmjDlaUuKDzjrIQWLCmswYi7sks_8ZvSonPL5Im2Ol1e4rb9iouG9_bW_3Y4BN2N_wYi5DMrVi02QgDk6T75weWdAzvPNu-AFeoxlwKQNMw9UKsn_A3D4hVy_R9mH3EvcSZYwbs45LsVd_u9Q7hK4njmuOeJu8bnmVZbbYj7jw-X-CuQj__6HDOnDFBnJMrIn0dJOewlJmEMe1RzG57nPqS5mEbEZ7YCnYKilAl1DP6qwGJVqNmG9dAUNdO0or4Vl4zq7GxnstmhN6y4oxUUxFGDu0hjQaYFkNq_reVSJOKDtDwQlxLhJwmqAmWnK_QFCb8z4WZDpKSBePxDzwUsTypP2v-I1Te46gOIduv9eroaY2YUN1O9_FBBEd8a2P3GmrOkAUAbFCKh20_1ajzAu6UTd9MdQtemcnRCHKBChurwZt-oL3NPapYHFGVjW1s8UgDVOygfJoWwNbX5x3bZ2MrcmVyU%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as Democrats take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

clean_body: I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. | Peter, Today in America, politicians pit American against American. Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural. I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie. I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast. I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got real fast. I'm from a working-class family. I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape. Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... if you work hard enough. Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it. You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982. I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL. My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, my heart was always in Georgia. And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country. Unfortunately, a Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term. The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as Democrats take our country down the wrong path. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream. I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too. Very Respectfully, Herschel Walker P.S. The Democrats in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. Thank you. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Chief James Craig
subject: Where was Whitmer?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677836:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r) Peter, being an elected official means you're held accountable for your actions... At least - that's how it should be. But in Michigan right now, that couldn't be farther from the truth. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677836:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r) Benton Harbor has been facing a terrible water crisis for THREE YEARS. Residents have **59x the legal limit** of lead in their water pipes. And what did Gov. Whitmer do about it? _Ignored the problem. _ This is completely unacceptable and underlines a real issue in our state. Mainly - we need a new Governor. | |
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677836:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r)

In the real world, if you continuously fail at your job, you get FIRED.

But for some reason, politicians like Gretchen Whitmer think they should be rewarded for it! _She 's running for reelection despite failing our whole state for 3 years already._

She simply doesn't think she has to live by the same rules we all live by.

It's all "rules for thee, but not for me!" with Whitmer. No accountability. No guilt. No leadership at all.

**That 's why I'm running for Governor to replace her. **

[**DEFEAT WHITMER: SUPPORT THE CHIEF >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677836:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r)

See, I've never really understood this stand-back mentality of too many career politicians.

I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. _We are here to protect our citizens._

Despite unrest across the nation, our city did not burn like Portland, Minneapolis, or Seattle.

**There's one reason why: Leadership. **

Unlike too many who choose to stand in the back -_I choose to lead from the front. _

I believe in accountability. In strength. And for standing up for what you believe in. Not this trendy "do as I say, not as I do" style politics.

It seems most Michiganders are with me. Despite our deep-blue reputation, all the latest polls show me TIED with Governor Whitmer.

I know that if we all stand together, we can turn that into a clear victory. That's why I need your support today, Peter. Will you chip in now to support my campaign for governor?
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**CHIP IN NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677837:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r)
[**CHIP IN NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677838:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r)
[**CHIP IN NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677839:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r)
[**CHIP IN NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677840:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**_
Thank you for your help,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677836:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r)

Chief James Craig
Former Detroit Police Chief

_P.S. I 'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: [https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor/action-4276536](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677836:J-aD0M2N_:m:1:3253819041:52268AC37917198EEB097D1BAB35D874:r)_

We're up against a lot here in Iowa, and we can only win with a massive surge in grassroots support. **But to be honest with you, Peter, right now, that grassroots support has slowed down.**
With the race just heating up, and so much at stake, we cannot afford to stay behind a moment longer. **[Please, we just need another $1,420 to be able to start November strong. clean_body: | | | Peter – we have bad news about Abby's campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley. This isn't looking good: We didn't hit our October fundraising goal and we're still short of the $30,000 that we need. This is really concerning – especially since the Senate GOP's campaign arm is sitting on $27 million to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley. Every single grassroots fundraising goal of ours is incredibly important and every single dollar matters immensely. With our Senate majority on the line in Iowa, Abby is counting on you to get us back on track before midnight tonight. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = This race has never been more important: New reporting has revealed that Trump is "more likely" to run for president in 2024 if Republicans take back the Senate. That's why he's endorsed vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley. Trump and the GOP are going to do whatever they can to defend Sen. Grassley, because they know that if Abby wins, Democrats are all but guaranteed to maintain Senate control. Only 27% of voters want to reelect Sen. Grassley but the Senate GOP campaign arm has already raked in $76 million this year alone_ to flip the Senate red and defeat Democratic challengers like Abby. We're up against a lot here in Iowa, and we can only win with a massive surge in grassroots support. But to be honest with you, Peter, right now, that grassroots support has slowed down. With the race just heating up, and so much at stake, we cannot afford to stay behind a moment longer. = | | = Thank you for standing with Abby! – Team Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Sign my petition: Tell Congress to pass my bipartisan wildfire prevention and preparedness bill to address the increasing threat of wildfires in Arizona and across the country.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
In the 21st century, drought, heatwaves, and wildfires will be some of the biggest challenges in Arizona.
#

Friends —
In the 21st century, drought, heatwaves, and wildfires will be some of the biggest challenges in Arizona. This year alone, our state experienced the worst wildfire season in history — with more than 500,000 acres burned.
Each year, these fires grow larger and more threatening, putting our communities, small businesses, and first responders in harm’s way.
It’s critical we invest in wildfire prevention and improve our ability to combat these fires.
It’s critical we increase firefighter pay and the resources available to those responding to wildfires across the state.
It’s critical we invest in wildfire mitigation and recovery efforts, because these fires have long-term effects like flooding and burn scars.
And it’s critical we modernize our wildland fire policy to get better at wildfire prevention and management.
I’ve introduced a bipartisan bill to bring together local and federal leaders to study and improve how we prevent and fight wildfires.
It could use your support:
[**Sign my petition: Tell Congress to pass my bipartisan wildfire prevention and preparedness bill to address the increasing threat of wildfires in Arizona and across the country.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/wildfire_bill_petition?source=em211102-1-15&t=1&akid=1615%2E6688874%2EFtj_QL)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/wildfire_bill_petition?source=em211102-1-15&t=2&akid=1615%2E6688874%2EFtj_QL)**
Thank you for making your voice heard.
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1615%2E6688874%2EFtj_QL).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

In one of the most outrageous and unacceptable examples of Biden Democrats' anti-American agenda, **they're now negotiating to give at least $450,000 to illegals who were _"separated during the Trump Administration."_**

Americans are already struggling to provide for their families with rising inflation and supply chain issues. Now Biden wants to raise taxes on Americans to pay illegals for their _"trauma!"_

American taxpayers are to foot the bill for foreigners that illegally crossed our borders?

**_No way._**

This is unacceptable, and _we must stop it_. [**Great America PAC is IMMEDIATELY using our influence to stop it -- and we need you to do your part, too!**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=af64fba0b09745b49d2f2546dbe7d6bb&_e=kX1ZDkXyOBknDdbw6XT1egcTpVotYsj4sK3Euk3WIPOPHP1hxLNldXZ8l39A6qnSMI5Aol2gFh3KGLUHRa7Mtr6tVJBkTW_aAW7EpHESsARF9j0XbalC0n5XmmzZormTU9fN6_K9StV8FV5VbWwN6yi0RiqaylG2dkfpkqWrXLH_DhEQbbUPaIA1ee1Pt5Hagp6GOprBPuS5_bxUw3YeWP2EG8ZDVMV8hJmNGu8ntwN5_ndnzBhRQ0jhndRB0ECD7xJVsSU8sha1YLzVLq441_inEtE2u-t58rizMqJ-DXk4TxW5yvI807FoAFgRoMDI0BhE7X6zj4Fps8RzBEUg0AI0zQOer4Fhqgh3crgBh_LQeBD2jLfvz0i2STMWSwvoE87Q4yBQTdPH5oBgJI6V8Z2-mcL3bmWTTOVyfjmIyHEg0IzlYeFq2Ns3qdplE_eaVAHOZcRkY5aeLbk0JLdftA%3D%3D)

clean_body: American taxpayers are to foot the bill for foreigners that illegally crossed our borders? | | | Peter, In one of the most outrageous and unacceptable examples of Biden Democrats' anti-American agenda, they're now negotiating to give at least $450,000 to illegals who were "separated during the Trump Administration." Americans are already struggling to provide for their families with rising inflation and supply chain issues. Now Biden wants to raise taxes on Americans to pay illegals for their "trauma!" American taxpayers are to foot the bill for foreigners that illegally crossed our borders? No way. This is unacceptable, and we must stop it. Help stop their sellout of American Taxpayers and seal the border once and for all! Peter, Nobody is working harder than Great America PAC to spread the word, expose the Democrats, and defeat them in 2022. Thank you, Peter \-- please add your name now! Sincerely, Ed Rollins, Chairman, Great America PAC | | | | Paid for by Great America PAC 107 S. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: I can’t thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38241269/314561088/-2023814932?refcode=20211102.15_TM_10LK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODU0NTNiNy0zMjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvWGgfMIi_--OJqMHv6SeewcMwcefMoxDfy48bR-i9s=)

| | Derek,

It’s official — this race is over. The last polls in Virginia have closed, and now we wait for all the votes to be counted.

While we await the results, I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for supporting my campaign.

This year has been incredibly difficult for Virginians — and for all Americans, as we fight to get this pandemic under control and begin our economic recovery.

But this campaign has shown me the best of who we are, and it’s given us a chance to address the challenges facing our future.

I ran for governor because I have a clear plan to move Virginia forward and create a better future for all. And I am deeply grateful for everyone who believed in my vision.

No matter what happens tonight, I am blown away by what this grassroots team has been able to accomplish.

We built a historic grassroots movement, we stood up to hate and division, and we fought for what we know is right.

And Derek, that is something to be proud of.

So when the results of this election come in — win or lose — we can rest assured that we did everything we can to create the future that we want.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being part of my team.

With love,

Terry McAuliffe

Terry McAuliffe for Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

_If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/58f0f7db-533b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/085453b7-323c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODU0NTNiNy0zMjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvWGgfMIi_--OJqMHv6SeewcMwcefMoxDfy48bR-i9s=&id=108609855)._
