| | Team, Before anything else — it’s Election Day in cities and towns across Massachusetts. If you haven’t voted yet in your municipal election, you have until 8PM tonight to cast your ballot. Put down this email, [_**look up your polling place**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38241317/314561361/1277663242?refcode=em_20211102_t_s_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGUyODI1ZC0zNDNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1gTn-5z1w5odPa73j-WE6-Y8_oDLJp2PjucGQhSTSQ=&emci=d2f29226-333c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3de2825d-343c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684840), and make your voice heard. Now, before we get too far into November, I also wanted to make sure to thank you for being on my team this past month. Before our End-of-Month deadline in October, we accomplished a lot. Together we:
* Gathered over **400** individual contributions, with **87%** of them coming from right here in Massachusetts
* Assembled support from **25** state and local elected leaders
* Won the **first** statewide organization endorsement of the race from Neighbor to Neighbor and their thousands of members across the state
* Ran and attended **dozens** of strategy sessions, relational phone banks, grassroots fundraisers, and local campaign events, organizing in every region of the Commonwealth

**None of this would’ve been possible without your support, and your belief in this campaign.** We’re one year out from the 2022 general election, and I’m fired up knowing this team has my back for the long haul. We’re ready to beat Charlie Baker and flip Massachusetts from red to blue. I’m looking forward to the road ahead as we fight to expand affordable housing across the Commonwealth, improve our schools so every child has a chance to succeed, and ensure that every Massachusetts resident is able to cast a vote — and so, so much more. Thank you for being a part of this team. Saludos, Sonia [_**P.S. Remember — it’s Election Day in Massachusetts and polls are open until 8 PM. Make sure you go out and vote! If you live in Boston, vote for Michelle Wu for mayor today. I’m proud to support her campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38241318/314561362/1277663242?refcode=em_20211102_t_s_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGUyODI1ZC0zNDNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1gTn-5z1w5odPa73j-WE6-Y8_oDLJp2PjucGQhSTSQ=&emci=d2f29226-333c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3de2825d-343c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684840)

clean_body: I wanted to make sure to thank you for being on my team in October. We accomplished a lot, and none of it would’ve been possible without you. | | | | | Team, Before anything else — it’s Election Day in cities and towns across Massachusetts. If you haven’t voted yet in your municipal election, you have until 8PM tonight to cast your ballot. Put down this email, , and make your voice heard. Now, before we get too far into November, I also wanted to make sure to thank you for being on my team this past month. Before our End-of-Month deadline in October, we accomplished a lot. Together we: Gathered over 400 individual contributions, with 87% of them coming from right here in Massachusetts Assembled support from 25 state and local elected leaders Won the first statewide organization endorsement of the race from Neighbor to Neighbor and their thousands of members across the state Ran and attended dozens of strategy sessions, relational phone banks, grassroots fundraisers, and local campaign events, organizing in every region of the Commonwealth None of this would’ve been possible without your support, and your belief in this campaign. We’re one year out from the 2022 general election, and I’m fired up knowing this team has my back for the long haul. We’re ready to beat Charlie Baker and flip Massachusetts from red to blue. I’m looking forward to the road ahead as we fight to expand affordable housing across the Commonwealth, improve our schools so every child has a chance to succeed, and ensure that every Massachusetts resident is able to cast a vote — and so, so much more. Thank you for being a part of this team. Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

body:

---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=961f1cf634&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

We now know that the FBI directly participated in events of January 6.

Not only that, but one of their alleged agitators led the violence at the Capitol.

Then they blamed it on peaceful American patriots who love their country -- turning them into "domestic terrorists."

_Now, the hoax is being unraveled_.

[_**I've been fighting for the victims of this Deep State scheme, and I hope you'll support my effort to continue doing just that**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=26bb188d44&e=645b3b1338).

The Democrats in Washington can't let their January 6 hysteria go.

If they did, they'd have to discuss the real scandal -- their massive election fraud in 2020.

The whole plot is one big coverup, and these evil Democrats don't care how many lives they ruin in the process.

**Remember: they're still holding political prisoners in a D.C. jail. **

I won't let that stand, but I'm under attack from all angles -- [_**and that's why I'm in need of your generous support for my reelection campaign**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=fad4633a55&e=645b3b1338).

The desperate Democrats and weak RINOs don't want me to help expose the truth about January 6.

They're scared of me, and they're threatening my political career to try to shut me up.

They need this bogus "insurrection" narrative to continue -- and they know it won't last long if I keep demanding answers.

[_**Help me stop them and get to the bottom of the Deep State's involvement in the January 6 violence with a contribution to my reelection campaign today**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0e6b764cfb&e=645b3b1338).

_[**A contribution today of just $10 or $25 -- or even $100 or $250 -- will be put towards helps me stay in the fight**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f2b0a3ba86&e=645b3b1338). _

---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=2fe3133332&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The feds were ringleaders of the January 6 violence.

The extent of their involvement is just beginning to unravel.

_[**_Help me get to the bottom of their involvement by contributing to my reelection campaign today_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=041dc2591c&e=645b3b1338)_.

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: Respectfully, this is our last chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677904:JnWOgM22N:m:1:3253819041:B421E233247B740866FA55054043C736:r)
---
| **_URGENT:_**** The 24-hour window to make up our October fundraising deficit is ending just hours from now, and we're still behind!**
---
| Peter,

I'll be honest: this is deeply frustrating.

After Joe Biden abandoned Americans behind enemy lines in Afghanistan, I thought America First patriots would rally behind conservative veterans that served there.

I lost two legs and a finger to the Taliban, so I know exactly how bad the situation is.

But despite everything, we still fell short of meeting the October fundraising needs for this America First campaign.

My team wanted to cut our budget, but with the stakes so high, I couldn't let that happen. I love our movement and our people so much that I authorized a 24-hour grace period to make up the deficit.

But, to my horror, the response was again insufficient, and we are still short of where we need to be with just hours left to go.

That's why I'm emailing you now. Please, I'm asking for your help. Don't let our movement down.

**We need to raise another $866 before midnight. **[**So, if everyone reading this message right now is able to step up with even just $5, we 'll blow past the deficit that we still face in the blink of an eye. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58677905:JnWOgM22N:m:1:3253819041:B421E233247B740866FA55054043C736:r)

It doesn't get more simple than this - we either take a stand right now to defend the greatest country in the world and all the freedoms she affords... or we let Joe Biden and his cronies outraise us again, putting it all at risk.

_Which option will you choose?_

Friend, this is absolutely DISGRACEFUL: 12 GOP governors – including Arizona's failed governor Doug Ducey – signed a letter urging the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade. And now, the Supreme Court is hearing a case on the most restrictive abortion ban in the country – endangering women's rights to make their own reproductive decisions!
Ducey has been perfectly content to sit back and watch our state's education ranking drop, to drive our health care ranking into the ground and fail to respond to our COVID-19 crisis. But when the time comes to endanger women's health and lives by denying them reproductive care, suddenly he springs into action.
**Let's be clear: Doug Ducey and our failed Arizona GOP don't care about serving Arizona families or protecting our rights. All they care about is clinging to power and pushing their extremist agenda – so it's up to us to fight back and defend our rights. **

body:
The future of our country, and our freedoms of speech and religion are all at stake! [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6e3ea409a7ba41a0af4de7f849e1f562&_e=aAEst5jpYoNX0H-dttPhDPf0nt3IWUmo1jTRqufwqmNyMYVLEVia7mUstWSX24SiRmLaTonLEb4kycataKwK7G6T4W9g37qVr-JuBvIFyxf6ao_3U504ONLVNKpf5fFJen8P5BIXQjvhJDpp4LN54tUcEo9cJjdPeMuUB726M9Y-rtf9qsbgWAtgzQMZON4z8vlN-5hDmrLbb0Er64JiMGeZ_7vw_BnLNLkKa01nxbKbtGIZFl1OcMObzoik9oeYy1bOCbVG58mTCPOdHqEKizsU9RqmIarQOhIrypkAOtnpuPOa6mWqOyXDNMkG-LDb41LeLmoF7zh0JuRdXAYuNTmrRvg3D7HFzdG3izXqGXX1tYi8_vOjJxmMumC91hO4rqgVKI9ijNhZKgyVvmo1Vd68O5fw4-aeA4gLjItwUTg%3D) | |

The liberal media wants to be the gatekeepers for speech in this country, what you can or cannot say that's “acceptable“ speech. We cannot allow this to happen.

Over the last few years, one thing is abundantly clear — **democrats don't like the American people thinking for themselves and questioning their left-wing narrative**. They want to control it all themselves and they love the power of Big Tech because it centralizes their control of free speech. In Silicon Valley, a few key people control the free speech of millions. No one should have that kind of power!!
[**FIGHT BIG TECH CENSORSHIP**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6e3ea409a7ba41a0af4de7f849e1f562&_e=aAEst5jpYoNX0H-dttPhDPf0nt3IWUmo1jTRqufwqmNyMYVLEVia7mUstWSX24SiRmLaTonLEb4kycataKwK7G6T4W9g37qVr-JuBvIFyxf6ao_3U504ONLVNKpf5fFJen8P5BIXQjvhJDpp4LN54tUcEo9cJjdPeMuUB726M9Y-rtf9qsbgWAtgzQMZON4z8vlN-5hDmrLbb0Er64JiMAIed4FgA2C4JBzMt-OMxFjqRV8_79Zlwcu4IU86oWQ83kQ4hZYVvgWH02HKcjABoG7puftjFmn-KdLwcDXmR3KWBLipM5MaHrzwmnhOe_iMftYGsyD_OoaqHGyGeDnoGtKjby2_9tuyerbIx-Hs6TexnMbHEFH_FRn4SgXifEBpsotekHGoxCSsiSlplnQCZKTyT8-y2elERpsMWCXi1LA%3D)
We must come together and stand up to the liberal media and their friends in Big Tech and the media. **The future of our country, and our freedoms of speech and religion are all at stake!**

I am leading the fight against Big Tech because I've seen first hand how the Constitutional rights of Americans have been undermined and erased simply due to opposing views. Americans are waking up to the perils of big government and big tech. _**We must stand firm and fight back with TRUTH**_!
[**JOIN THE TEAM >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6e3ea409a7ba41a0af4de7f849e1f562&_e=aAEst5jpYoNX0H-dttPhDPf0nt3IWUmo1jTRqufwqmNyMYVLEVia7mUstWSX24SiRmLaTonLEb4kycataKwK7G6T4W9g37qVr-JuBvIFyxf6ao_3U504ONLVNKpf5fFJen8P5BIXQjvhJDpp4LN54tUcEo9cJjdPeMuUB726M9Y-rtf9qsbgWAtgzQMZON4z8vlN-5hDmrLbb0Er64JiMHRYsG_fpwVSeILZdNgqGgzyxA6SkZVFf5SmLfj34a9o7VsGi44HQ-xIDnj3agfstSW1cwG3lqNQiKCTjRPcKl3ITbnHHv7pzAwkQs81kE8Vn0LXAQ_1OJdjDgqaoeVAobTvD91zRJjrw9dMwQpckRtREz7qnQoehi0kVv1J-rUJpjv9Bp9N5Xer-kBeX9cc0PBwoNfQgeAsyGEDOKmlE8Y%3D)
God Bless,
Josh Hawley

Hi friends, Today is Election Day for Marylanders in Annapolis, Frederick, Laurel, and Gaithersburg and there's just 4 hours left to vote for Democrats! Making your voice heard at the state and local level is critically important, especially when there's so much at stake. **If you live in Annapolis or the City of Frederick, I encourage you to re-elect Mayors Gavin Buckley and Michael O 'Connor and cast your vote for Democrats down the ballot. If you have friends in those cities, remind them to vote and encourage them to do the same! **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Breaking: AG of Arizona Launches Investigation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
It's happening! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9a050cd27a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Big news on the Election Integrity Front:

**Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich just launched a formal investigation into what transpired in the fraud of the 2020 election!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7b2a9570e0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Roger Geisler, a special agent, interrogated Adrian Fontes._

**Adrian Fontes, who is now running for Secretary of State to permanently secure Democrat control of our elections, served as the County Recorder for Maricopa in the 2020 election.**

The County Recorder’s principal responsibilities include keeping public records and overseeing voter registration and early voting. In other words, if you are wondering where the buck stops when it comes to election integrity in Maricopa, look no further.

_And I am glad to write to you today that our Attorney General is taking the evidence seriously, opening criminal investigations. Clearly, the allegations are not baseless as the Marxist media would have you believe._

**[And that is why I am writing you today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bc325dd635&e=44b8c466b0) We cannot let AG Brnovich think this is enough. If he stops here, then it will be a case of _too little, too late_.**

We must pressure Brnovich to continue to do his job and prosecute those responsible for the fraud in 2020. And we cannot stop until every one of these perpetrators is brought to justice.

_[Donate today to help us keep up the pressure on AG Brnovich’s office to make sure that the perpetrators of election fraud are brought to justice and Adrian Fontes is held responsible for the fraud perpetrated under his purview!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=25e3b20d2c&e=44b8c466b0)_

**_“I will take all necessary actions that are supported by the evidence and where I have legal authority. Arizonans deserve to have their votes accurately counted and protected.” – Mark Brnovich_**
And we must hold AG Brnovich to his promise! He MUST press forward until every wrongdoer has been brought to justice. Anything less is a _disgrace to democracy._
**The fight for Election Integrity is long, hard, and essential. Every day we are fighting against media, political, and legal attacks.**

_The radical Left and the thieves behind the steal of the 2020 election have been doing everything they can to hide their misdeeds. [And if we don’t make sure they don’t do it again, who will?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=37a99424d5&e=44b8c466b0)_

**[This is why I need your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cda5bf9bef&e=44b8c466b0)**

After we audited Maricopa, we saw that there was obscene levels of fraud – more than enough to overturn the election, and those involved needed to be brought to justice. **And now AG Mark Brnovich is beginning the investigation.**

_We are pushing for nationwide audits to uncover the severity of the fraud while also pushing forward to Pima._

**Our approach has been and continues to be systematic, aggressive, and thorough. And we won’t stop until all the perpetrators of fraud are in prison and our Democracy is secure once again. [And I must ask you for help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=97517ac928&e=44b8c466b0)**

**I desperately need your help in my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona. The constant political, legal, and media attacks are draining my campaign. [To keep up the good fight, I need a rush donation of $25, $50, or $100 tonight. Can you help?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cf8f5490cc&e=44b8c466b0)**
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a341ff10a8&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=eb33928cab&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=58ade3f0c9&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6c901bc486) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6c901bc486).

clean_body: Peter, Have you seen the NEW website that Katie launched last month? Katie LOVES our Alabama farmers and pledges to fight for them as your next Senator. Unfortunately, not every candidate has this view. One vocally anti-farmer candidate is Katie’s BIGGEST opponent in the race for Senate. While he spends time lambasting our hard-working agricultural industry, Katie’s received a formal endorsement from Alabama Farmers Federation's FarmPAC. Will you join her and stand UP for Alabama’s farmers, Peter? Thank you, Wesley Britt Katie Britt for Senate Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Shontel Brown
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Thanks to you, we’ve come so far.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38241582/314564036/1329859415?refcode=EM_FR_211102Victory_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWEyNDVmZC0zODNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7r6W9H665uU0_SyAVe4gkd1AKUQrtyNURCyAlbRbF7Y=) Team — _we did it!_

Tonight the will of the voters was heard loud and clear! Ohio wants a leader who’s ready on day one to work with the Biden Administration to ensure every American has access to quality, affordable health care, good-paying jobs that invest in our communities, and comprehensive justice reforms to give marginalized people a seat at the table.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38241583/314564037/1329859415?refcode=EM_FR_211102Victory_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_N_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWEyNDVmZC0zODNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7r6W9H665uU0_SyAVe4gkd1AKUQrtyNURCyAlbRbF7Y=) Thank you to every grassroots supporter who helped make this possible. Next up, getting to work building coalitions in Congress on behalf of the American people.

Let’s get to work,

Shontel Brown |
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As the next Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Ready for Stacey (via When Democrats Turn Out)
subject: Stacey Abrams just wiped out 108,000 Americans’ medical debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Stacey Abrams' organization Fair Fight just completely wiped out $212 million worth of crushing medical debt for 108,000 Americans. “I know firsthand how medical costs and a broken healthcare system put families further and further in debt,” Stacey said. “This problem is exacerbated in states like Georgia where failed leaders have callously refused to expand Medicaid, even during a pandemic.” We need Stacey Abrams to run against Brian Kemp for Governor of Georgia in 2022. Stacey will be an incredible Governor— she is also instrumental to helping Democrats protect and expand our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority. Mitch McConnell knows that if Stacey's name is on the ballot in 2022, that fact alone will turn out hundreds of thousands of Democrat voters to support Raphael Warnock. That's exactly why Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are working overtime to suppress the vote in Georgia. McConnell successfully filibustered the Freedom to Vote Act which would have guaranteed millions of Americans long-overdue voter protections. And Trump is inciting his violent Proud Boys base to scare progressives into staying home on Election Day. Georgia is the ground zero for voter suppression because it's a volatile swing state. In 2020, Joe Biden won Georgia by just 0.3%. But Stacey Abrams and Raphael Warnock will keep Georgia blue forever by driving massive voter registration and passing historic voter protections that ensure everybody can vote. Abrams and Warnock know that when Democrats turn out, Democrats win. We need to raise $3,518 by midnight tonight to meet our vital October 31 fundraising deadline or else we simply won't be able to hold the line against Trump and McConnell's authoritarian electioneering game-plan. So we're asking you directly, Peter: Please, will you donate now to show Stacey Abrams and Raphael Warnock that grassroots power is on their side? **[This can't wait, Peter: Help us close this daunting $3,518 fundraising gap and donate whatever you can right now. Whether you can spare $5 or even $50, you will get us that much closer to our goal. But more importantly, by protecting Stacey Abrams and Raphael Warnock in their 2022 elections, you will deal a major blow to the GOP's authoritarian power-play. body:
YOUR input means everything to me.
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=a1bba2e536c742298e7db2614e67900d&_e=Azf5S4Q_OmogjraPAPxVr6Q5_hT8ySNZR4qDtE2MusqjDYk41uQCCnmzuW-98RDP4b49Dv7JLUEvkkc_RZJg0io_2Wb9sQ11IJEdF_-1hTidHGmFO1t2sgXnv-lMwzM1mSycEfMZ9uAiY4O246Ag60RdiRBoyk8kEzGMnD2-MqlhETRk1BRsnHLofzg40wl76cqPTinzyrRNctQMiJs-7piBP19og764H2yDqewYSEYw4ImWnrTQdChAXArU5FKUai38Uy8NKdiaqkdg1vSYdsky1GpV07Wcvun_92K0ndy7VEXRVPDYT2reJScU4zuIu4XMJWAMPUFa8e4G3Vak1ZZ614Q-eQf1TyZmKjXuK5TlD2KrHSfMPvDwfpJr6BPPCR0fi4A7noRzW1b0MbmI7ckA3IOHeF6KwjklhOauQMz0Uby4Gn7LkP1yYI0b4h2qULu86VmcmcgVnyS0_WZby_toV2w9qR72fR68iLtvohbBcPDRjBu2asAX29rcjyj2oZOOLLccaV-cmqFtsWBJoQ%3D%3D)

Friend, I wanted to touch base and just say how thankful I am for all the support you’ve shown me, my family, and our campaign over these past two months.
---
YOU are the backbone of our fight to take back Wisconsin and retire a radical “woke” leftist like Tony Evers.
---
_Which is exactly why I’d like to take a moment at the beginning of the month to see which issue is your #1 concern as we continue to build our campaign’s winning platform._
---

While Kansans won’t be able to cast their ballots for governor until this time next year, don’t forget that TODAY is still Election Day! Local elect Friend, While Kansans won’t be able to cast their ballots for governor until this time next year, don’t forget that TODAY is still Election Day! Local elections are happening in many counties, school districts, and cities across Kansas today, and you still have a chance to support conservative values up and down the ballot. This shouldn’t be controversial, but instead of fixing this, the left just called me names. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cc7b6a4fb6994ace96bb9a63b4517f00&_e=QukIaJUeQnBUIyvdRvExMIYn6svzrbRY2g64RWjGe2oaQNtfEiNH1n3gKuxZaaOpcUBx3zBbJa7ltJgmFjwQZwi-VIRL9vfzsPeSgorkOLNb94y4L2C2MEx3NpAXgNX9pdSfHkUjrx5ECum79-ZUZgwPfqX0ckd5hckZdPcUmX1w-z0iKG1vFc_4eHxlb9gHo-rMowSzV8ZyVLkWPW2g67pytlH0LrjrbHysDmODYOazIAwenE0qhFjUiwq57JRY-a1xs3MNSFbHJh69wz_3Es5S4AA41UOU3zP6799DQjUSRrtukHvvrFbeRoKnAukl83g-dyglKLGINVSxUizg6OhRt91QSapFqQ4I34a6HNLQO5FftVvvyoXRpjrFkMLkymTnkKRfb_akaXeI4mxESaLIKo2Af2nMrHBQ6-NVZl-XkUntTqIGV-wLY2STZTi1kFsxdE_OdvySCjIZvT8LgXGobAw71E_9mf49BVIjrTg%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**In America, you should be able to raise a family on one income.**

Why is no one talking about this?

I've made it one of the cornerstones of my campaign, and [**I made this video to tell you why it is so important to me. I released it yesterday, and it instantly went viral.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cc7b6a4fb6994ace96bb9a63b4517f00&_e=QukIaJUeQnBUIyvdRvExMIYn6svzrbRY2g64RWjGe2oaQNtfEiNH1n3gKuxZaaOpcUBx3zBbJa7ltJgmFjwQZwi-VIRL9vfzsPeSgorkOLNb94y4L2C2MEx3NpAXgNX9pdSfHkUjrx5ECum79-ZUZgwPfqX0ckd5hckZdPcUmX1w-z0iKG1vFc_4eHxlb9gHo-rMowSzV8ZyVLkWPW2g67pytlH0LrjrbHysDmODYOazIAwenE0qhFjUiwq57JRY-a1xs3MNSFbHJh69wz_3Et19Ll1NsHOdoAOhyUAC0U8IEtSre-5-fUOvCUO9acnBbZc-VXNDbdSHS-J2oQguRoYhMnHH4TGzGWd2XLG-V7ERE6WWO-zxa4sa5BezZnsfxhft5KxLDMVUrmvjbz1WMpYSMknJljhyYf8ftKzlyiLstHFBKLp_ZpmaTg56ZvoHhsr4BKrvzDjbE5nleRhhD4Xt0DL4NEsn7Wk7rQjXR1k%3D)

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cc7b6a4fb6994ace96bb9a63b4517f00&_e=QukIaJUeQnBUIyvdRvExMIYn6svzrbRY2g64RWjGe2oaQNtfEiNH1n3gKuxZaaOpcUBx3zBbJa7ltJgmFjwQZwi-VIRL9vfzsPeSgorkOLNb94y4L2C2MEx3NpAXgNX9pdSfHkUjrx5ECum79-ZUZgwPfqX0ckd5hckZdPcUmX1w-z0iKG1vFc_4eHxlb9gHo-rMowSzV8ZyVLkWPW2g67pytlH0LrjrbHysDmODYOazIAwenE0qhFjUiwq57JRY-a1xs3MNSFbHJh69wz_3EqQc-XWb3o1FYEtwXxlBK5SU0wHAVgro8hWeUjlx1gxzkVnMCxDSDRRzg7umjwyyTmTOXdujSj93CPj0yPnOyPHhctNwY028BIxa6m8j_2AzI1nA8mG8BE1o3CdvTqhTsdHXxBRn6lM0qDWutkBDhyIyYjT50d_SBu2O4X0LA6_S2AZ8oucfOF0367DBq4alEMrIWJXtoZXDz0yj_J0Rkq0%3D)
**It shouldn't be hard to raise a family in this country,** but establishment politicians have sold us out to major corporations, overregulated small businesses, and driven the cost of living through the roof.

My wife Catherine and I have three sons; I know what it's like to have a young family in 2021. **I see how past mistakes will destroy the American dream for families like mine.**

Democrats have made it almost impossible to get ahead in America, and they are okay with that. [**At this point, only an outsider can fix their damage. **11.02.2021 STRATEGY MEMO**
**THE STATE OF THE RACE:**
**1) We are hanging onto our majority by a thread.** **Republicans have targeted 47 vulnerable races** to flip blue to red, so Democrats are playing defense in 2022.

Meanwhile, **the Republican Party only needs to flip five seats** to win both the House and the Senate.

Historically, midterm elections favor opposition parties -- so **the Republicans are in a better position than us to pick up seats.** If we don’t work hard -- and invest early -- we won’t be in a position to beat them.

Georgia Republicans just passed voter suppression legislation that some are comparing to Jim Crow laws -- we NEED to protect our voting rights nationally so state-level Republicans can’t get away with this.

body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ae90a081c7be405fa510e3617391a0d4&_e=8EBqgjkD_iTJgH4ZZYN1vhi4qLrqMrhbQn5YKdcQZtjUJD3TE2xohVtC_X4LVlqff-pQla5_2c7vLocdmrwovU9Gwes7tO9oSeG0c-FulnCK8YgwXLBziBDrS1Y-58xK_c-lfrYihHxZLpUtiWtfMZWhGG4VKgC8NoTN754F0guklD8jTJ_RO8aN1hPKSf3XSM4jWzHO7z7cgttGH4vR32DKy3R424oRHcrF0jECdmzfwkz7zJ2yZpEfOygZYlkPWMFMHP9Jg4cQZj3LlVTBleh-y5Cq6XUIzQs3AtVfUIW5XGnKjqqNB3_C-VnluBhHMddy6B0Yb0BxHLnV5pnCFtVS5s_ixLibW3-Jc3qLWibs4NHWoyIiGObs7-RtprQfjPrL4pT29RoB_lLUTJJ9H42kwIkbqUuOgDQJ3w2jFa6SWPFOTbWd0N70FN2yBAF6O735L93DeRdSTxwkOCuekOAd7mnba2MCs7Ist0WogzQ%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: What I'm Running For...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [My Plans for 2022](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziop9mzIcV7R6JucTeZaHBppe-TqVmAq0ubJWtndBQu2NCA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_2b&n=1) Next year is shaping up to be a promising one in politics. I’m writing to ask for your guidance on the best way to build our movement and carry on the fight. With the June 2022 primary election quickly approaching, there are a few possibilities for where my name will appear on the ballot. The first option is to seek reelection to the Assembly and continue fighting from the Legislature. The second is to run for Governor, building on the strong foundation we now have in place for a statewide race. A third option is the U.S. Congress. California’s districts are being redrawn, and it appears there may be an opportunity to flip a Democrat seat where I live. I’ve been asked to consider running to help retake control of the House. In both Sacramento and Washington, we need representatives who will fight back against corruption, ineptitude, and radicalism – and fight for the principles that have made America the greatest country in the world. I would very much appreciate your feedback, as I need to make a decision soon. Just reply to this email to share with me your thoughts! Sincerely,
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_2b&n=2)Kevin
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_2b&n=3).

**ICYMI: Wesley Joins One America News to Discuss Critical Race Theory and how Parents Should have a Say in their Children's Education**

**Houston, TX** \- On Thursday, Wesley Hunt, Army combat veteran, and Houston native running to represent Texas' 38th Congressional District, joined _One America News_ to discuss the need to eliminate Critical Race Theory from our schools. He also detailed how his mom would now be classified as a domestic terrorist under Joe Biden's administration just for being an active member of her Parent Teacher Association. clean_body: ICYMI: Wesley Joins One America News to Discuss Critical Race Theory and how Parents Should have a Say in their Children's Education Houston, TX \- On Thursday, Wesley Hunt, Army combat veteran, and Houston native running to represent Texas' 38th Congressional District, joined One America News to discuss the need to eliminate Critical Race Theory from our schools. He also detailed how his mom would now be classified as a domestic terrorist under Joe Biden's administration just for being an active member of her Parent Teacher Association. Watch the interview below! Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

These radicals have abandoned YOU and your families in favor of their “woke” agenda of trillions in socialist spending and the Green New Deal. But you can make your voice heard RIGHT NOW by taking my Fiscal Flash Point Survey to help inform our campaign’s platform for VICTORY. Fiscal Flash Point Survey Participant: dpwillis67@gmail.com Submission Status:[Pending] DEADLINE: Tonight at 10:30 P.M. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Josh Weil for US Senate
subject: In Memory: Richard Allen Rowe (1980-2021)
body:
Tuesday, November 2, 2021 | Normally, I begin these with a timely message, today it would probably be something about Election Day, and how
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.joshweil.org/so/3bNpYEHlx/c?w=nIaX2ugSFDA_4joziRG0yleQA-dFL4L1Lqa5hXnOP98.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuam9zaHdlaWwub3JnL3NvLzNiTnBZRUhseD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZmI1NTQ5LTQ5MzQtNGM0OS1iZDRmLTRhZWEyZTg2MzgxNiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Josh Weil - Democrat for U.S. Senate (FL)
---
| |
---
| | Tuesday, November 2, 2021
---
|
---
| | Normally, I begin these with a timely message, today it would probably be something about Election Day, and how important it is that we make voting as easy as possible so every American has a voice in their community. Then I would give you a review of how our campaign has grown, and all of the stops we've made and events we've participated in over the last few weeks, and then I'd wrap up with a preview of what we've got coming up on the calendar, and ask you for a little bit of money. I wish that this was that type of email. Instead, I'm hear to share the news of the untimely passing of an absolute warrior of a man, a working class progressive hero from northern Florida, our friend, Richard Rowe. Richard ran in the Democratic Primary for Florida House District 23 in 2020, in a bid to unseat Republican incumbent Stan McClain. I met Richard earlier this year, some of the workers and volunteers from his campaign came on board and helped set up my campaign earlier this year, they only had the best words when they spoke of him. Back in September, while I was out knocking on doors to help support Dr. Manal Fakhoury's bid for Mayor in Ocala, Richard was driving around with a truck full of lumber and building road signs for her. He was a good man who wanted to make a difference. Richard was not married, and had no children. He is survived by his sister Laura, and her husband and three children. A GoFundMe has been started to help the family with the unexpected expenses of his untimely death. Help, if you can. Richard Allen Rowe 1980 - 2021
---
| |
---
| | | [**Click here for the GoFundMe for the family of Richard Rowe**](https://www.joshweil.org/so/3bNpYEHlx/c?w=h5_YaHlFk4ihxxG-oNOVv3g9RRAEUPUaF7GiV9u0f0E.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ29mdW5kbWUuY29tL2YvdW5leHBlY3RlZC1sb3NzLW9mLXJpY2hhcmQtcm93ZXM_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXBfY3Arc2hhcmUtc2hlZXQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1jb3B5X2xpbmtfYWxsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9Y3VzdG9tZXIiLCJyIjoiYTZmOTM5OGQtZWQxNC00ZDNjLTRmOTYtMmMyOGNiZDlkZmRmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODlmYjU1NDktNDkzNC00YzQ5LWJkNGYtNGFlYTJlODYzODE2In0)

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: BRB, texting you 📲
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Here’s your exclusive invitation from the Erica Smith team »
#
Hey there, we want to officially invite you to something really special: **Our Official Team Erica texting community.**
If you want to join to get texts from Erica and our team — _and never miss out on an important campaign update_ — you can either:
* [**_Click here_**](http://act.ericaforus.com/go/24738?t=1&akid=604%2E3698%2Eviwaj9)**if you’re on your phone to sign up with one click**
* **Take out your mobile phone and text JOIN to 51550.**

[](http://act.ericaforus.com/go/24738?t=2&akid=604%2E3698%2Eviwaj9)
Trust us when we say we appreciate you being a part of this movement. Your support has helped power our campaign forward.
We really appreciate your support for Erica Smith and we can’t wait to realize our vision of a better North Carolina that works for all.**It’s not just about electing more Democrats. It’s about electing BETTER Democrats.**
**Erica is absolutely committed to fighting for EVERYONE in North Carolina and beyond — and she consistently shows it.** Erica grew up on her family farm picking cucumbers and corn. She uniquely understands how important it is to reach EVERYONE. Not just those in the biggest cities, or with internet access, or even the exact same beliefs.
That’s why Erica went on a 100 counties, 100 day tour across North Carolina. It’s why we’re currently hard at work on our $1/1 door campaign where for every dollar donated to the campaign, we’re knocking on a door in a county that voted for Trump. **It’s why Erica is THE ONLY candidate in this race advocating for Medicare for All, an end to the filibuster, a Green New Deal, and universal broadband.**
**If you’re with us, let’s take your support to the next level. Sign up to receive updates from our team by texting JOIN to 51550 now. We can’t wait to continue on this journey with you.**
Let’s do this,
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211102-604-footer&t=3&refcode2=604_3698_viwaj9&akid=604%2E3698%2Eviwaj9)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=4&akid=604%2E3698%2Eviwaj9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=604%2E3698%2Eviwaj9)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Peter,

We need to free Nevada from the grip of radical Democrat Steve Sisolak.

Lifelong conservative and devoted Nevadan Dean Heller is running for Governor to put the government to work FOR the people, not the other way around.

clean_body: Dean Heller is committed to undoing the damage done by Governor Sisolak and getting Nevadans back to work. | | | | Peter, We need to free Nevada from the grip of radical Democrat Steve Sisolak. Lifelong conservative and devoted Nevadan Dean Heller is running for Governor to put the government to work FOR the people, not the other way around. Governor Sisolak voted to EXPAND mail-in voting. Dean Heller wants to SECURE our elections. Governor Sisolak has SHUTTERED small businesses. Dean Heller wants to keep small businesses OPEN. Governor Sisolak released tens of thousands of prisoners convicted of drug possession. Dean Heller wants to lower crime rates and has been endorsed by the Nevada Police Union. Peter, that’s just the tip of the iceberg. Dean Heller is committed to undoing the damage done by Governor Sisolak and getting Nevadans back to work. We need Dean Heller to clean up the mess Governor Sisolak made. Your investment in Dean’s campaign is an investment in the future of our state. We need you. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Georgia on my mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b886dbc40b2c4cd199add008eedb3e7d&_e=VCV0IH26aSpoVc17gR9HpGSjXGobpjvOyexOsCKf3j3dPPupxjb0Et_rh_kJl48n9J65X1p91Rfum9-UICGRInJwUb53Fdg-CLUX_2im9OHfZLjJqC1jvieDgMGkrm9gIjNw1T0FEaw8cscB9MXDUsK8I8ZMg2Fww2oJJrtRe17RjIJidxRAoAutltKdoO1oj-BsGbBnrickPJz2-4c3w_XiJSxMp4IAYS4W5e47BPLmXFQtyM1ELaitZGQaUDagLTqzjBwHuQydxe39x-IiHyGeu2LcvMEvwYzxssGMobDUXD1Oy6EZ1xNf5apbqLwivgaqXtY_enXrBIVntAiWbUFlVo-C8ucSgx5Gzo2pIpcbl31-3ofwXsXSWYex8wn7CNETZN1X5DrzNIrfUrsTalyaI9xn2xwkTEg7ZCDIyMooyGS7H_RIdXrsd8s3LrySN9eZvCJu9Wha6O3bXI_yN__ZbdOUTDMg67ALVG_Jnao%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b886dbc40b2c4cd199add008eedb3e7d&_e=VCV0IH26aSpoVc17gR9HpGSjXGobpjvOyexOsCKf3j3dPPupxjb0Et_rh_kJl48n9J65X1p91Rfum9-UICGRInJwUb53Fdg-CLUX_2im9OHfZLjJqC1jvieDgMGkrm9gIjNw1T0FEaw8cscB9MXDUsK8I8ZMg2Fww2oJJrtRe17RjIJidxRAoAutltKdoO1oj-BsGbBnrickPJz2-4c3w_XiJSxMp4IAYS4W5e47BPLmXFQtyM1ELaitZGQaUDagLTqzjBwHuQydxe39x-IiH2YvtFLADxaYciryIDokusUXaPojJvb0RAu9Je_BWTrlZGelScw5AOOBPfYGA0l4cHEZZrBad133Il10Mnf088OjKz-fq11OccUGvowIjIV7MQeTUI2vWjKrjdCR4s2uPH-IQv0piqdX8TjPY8vvnQ-qd77gmAQaihrk4juaaWYkNA3O6BB3SCPG_BaaTTh90cjMq-5G9P9kcFT-dc6K9Rk%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b886dbc40b2c4cd199add008eedb3e7d&_e=VCV0IH26aSpoVc17gR9HpGSjXGobpjvOyexOsCKf3j3dPPupxjb0Et_rh_kJl48n9J65X1p91Rfum9-UICGRInJwUb53Fdg-CLUX_2im9OHfZLjJqC1jvieDgMGkrm9gIjNw1T0FEaw8cscB9MXDUsK8I8ZMg2Fww2oJJrtRe17RjIJidxRAoAutltKdoO1oj-BsGbBnrickPJz2-4c3w_XiJSxMp4IAYS4W5e47BPLmXFQtyM1ELaitZGQaUDagLTqzjBwHuQydxe39x-IiH-Qe_rclQDSMb7LLilsE3jbURn1TnrxJQ3So5nFA2P9tWGgJB3n1SYnTggq4rJ9qrdKiaXxOm7WY4yD-oolGrRRKUCf8I4lkL-GUxfxlYjT4AUL2DnLtEKHzpyTOUS195S6gxe_9Elm95yRwm6M3BvHcWIOP2OK6UfD7n1Fl8QruqzluNbifOS1JPXdgo6bxp2AXExNRJ92XAstBqiU4bGI%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b886dbc40b2c4cd199add008eedb3e7d&_e=VCV0IH26aSpoVc17gR9HpGSjXGobpjvOyexOsCKf3j3dPPupxjb0Et_rh_kJl48n9J65X1p91Rfum9-UICGRInJwUb53Fdg-CLUX_2im9OHfZLjJqC1jvieDgMGkrm9gIjNw1T0FEaw8cscB9MXDUsK8I8ZMg2Fww2oJJrtRe17RjIJidxRAoAutltKdoO1oj-BsGbBnrickPJz2-4c3w_XiJSxMp4IAYS4W5e47BPLmXFQtyM1ELaitZGQaUDagLTqzjBwHuQydxe39x-IiHwbpKkIDznNL3JUhwy0uGjNdcwNWuj1Gs6pt8FpndvO7OBbc9yDIqSfc-krLFQynCKDchB8UQiURVwzsqrjHyhzfBtQwKvtBejAlXyJWrRVy_-WnLj6IW_pYQxuBbym6YdOTsqlfC3O86hfZ2x1WLVTWkVcn_fqAAg7ToWhxjAt5TGkMa6c-Wq44PZzQWsbRWFjQu7RlnVS5qwf0eLChOBM%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as Democrats take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b886dbc40b2c4cd199add008eedb3e7d&_e=VCV0IH26aSpoVc17gR9HpGSjXGobpjvOyexOsCKf3j3dPPupxjb0Et_rh_kJl48n9J65X1p91Rfum9-UICGRInJwUb53Fdg-CLUX_2im9OHfZLjJqC1jvieDgMGkrm9gIjNw1T0FEaw8cscB9MXDUsK8I8ZMg2Fww2oJJrtRe17RjIJidxRAoAutltKdoO1oj-BsGbBnrickPJz2-4c3w_XiJSxMp4IAYS4W5e47BPLmXFQtyM1ELaitZGQaUDagLTqzjBwHuQydxe39x-IiHweloxWy2CbrYN2cDA7Nz4EK328iaE4ONdlVfOm119dD4k43G5ueUuOtNqRAMPY5gMRZhmu1pU3w9eYBAINkLKNf3YmKenU1U4MOIKP5Fk9IhBTj3juZOMUC42zsSR0gtxZFYRFHi4Wlfp4cQ0fyPeOgNisx0tbY_nsQmYHW2gLdQIRjuM0nGDcHnY101Em-r34xy0_oYlZ5wPJWZEMxioo%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b886dbc40b2c4cd199add008eedb3e7d&_e=VCV0IH26aSpoVc17gR9HpGSjXGobpjvOyexOsCKf3j3dPPupxjb0Et_rh_kJl48n9J65X1p91Rfum9-UICGRInJwUb53Fdg-CLUX_2im9OHfZLjJqC1jvieDgMGkrm9gIjNw1T0FEaw8cscB9MXDUsK8I8ZMg2Fww2oJJrtRe17RjIJidxRAoAutltKdoO1oj-BsGbBnrickPJz2-4c3w_XiJSxMp4IAYS4W5e47BPLmXFQtyM1ELaitZGQaUDagLTqzjBwHuQydxe39x-IiH9IJAr7etsix6Tbw2WPpws4hHmPdrJsSWbgnEb2_h6rbfjIpX0dX32KIxGdpotkMTA1ijHHazzC5Q1fgr3jjiHi16U05azKDnWPwZ_tJcerEjOzJU4DGd4X89GM2U7jOP1fhfNbxGur9SpP8sGnGsNNjxkIIB_PhPSYzxKRRE-T7D-xyUjNxGc-GjJIyDxIDmS1b-acAOY6kZKLVWWe2aTY%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The Democrats in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b886dbc40b2c4cd199add008eedb3e7d&_e=VCV0IH26aSpoVc17gR9HpGSjXGobpjvOyexOsCKf3j3dPPupxjb0Et_rh_kJl48n9J65X1p91Rfum9-UICGRInJwUb53Fdg-CLUX_2im9OHfZLjJqC1jvieDgMGkrm9gIjNw1T0FEaw8cscB9MXDUsK8I8ZMg2Fww2oJJrtRe17RjIJidxRAoAutltKdoO1oj-BsGbBnrickPJz2-4c3w_XiJSxMp4IAYS4W5e47BPLmXFQtyM1ELaitZGQaUDagLTqzjBwHuQydxe39x-IiHw2DhPRAjGz-FGPHjFUosV3oBDwEPQ4MOxuDEV3Vi1GFDZYjhvHgcvgMylXNL3qEBFcZyG41MPTdyJPP5cMlKoqmUsRVzSmVxEc7poonMs7GsLcjtqJH9pEtZ47m6sT4bZY3PX_Wxn0DBZNDdeWt2iCbiGRgY5K5EEwViSyE7XetMEyc9pRKWYUkpPPFFFNTjH7oyaLEeLmBx8L5EuQMswk%3D)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b886dbc40b2c4cd199add008eedb3e7d&_e=VCV0IH26aSpoVc17gR9HpGSjXGobpjvOyexOsCKf3j3dPPupxjb0Et_rh_kJl48n9J65X1p91Rfum9-UICGRInJwUb53Fdg-CLUX_2im9OHfZLjJqC1jvieDgMGkrm9gIjNw1T0FEaw8cscB9MXDUsK8I8ZMg2Fww2oJJrtRe17RjIJidxRAoAutltKdoO1oj-BsGbBnrickPJz2-4c3w_XiJSxMp4IAYS4W5e47BPLmXFQtyM1ELaitZGQaUDagLTqzjBwHuQydxe39x-IiH9ZD9xrjIg3KNe4V4D55n-UBpLOK0XK6AatnqV-9MYH156ykOHfXH3gOs_dz-7UKYU0B6DARiGedAKL_7KBHSisL9fA-Y5dHPXJMjvkczsbz0htKh6zAbekMcG6FvCG0nM6piB0SfNxf01PDQLV6836HgI10pjTd6Dk0DrckqGFESvIYEP6ttAd1pfyp7fZmxkTCZr5YqqByseM59OLvSnI%3D)

[
](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b886dbc40b2c4cd199add008eedb3e7d&_e=VCV0IH26aSpoVc17gR9HpP3nvNMIa3VUzqtiwGVj2MK3Y9G5pdPnVEMkhWupoPq_uj9ZJlQnnvQ7ljZdpG3RBnk-iPOqkwAHCXx3Q6VXxRoGgfxwGgdQZ48WyCMmbZRW2qvmxuOYcDWLtvJOj_AFpX7dtns-e-kVy9IVqgdC2yqVDJC7kWdfoO_mwdZD63ddAAjmTG5Np8SF_JJ8piVDyuQY_q4xzRaE9FFEKr1WnkV2k8TaQJ4aCtHg0X0V-aC7pfRwZZNKoLVEkVuYx_K8BA%3D%3D)

name: Team King for Maryland
subject: We have to invest early to flip Maryland blue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Team—
It's looking like a far-right Republican just won the Virginia governor's race. I'm just as frustrated about these results as you are, but we can't sit down and let the GOP take over Maryland, too. Democrats can't take any race for granted in 2022, and this shows how critical it is to invest early in statewide races. Will you rush a donation now to invest early in flipping Maryland blue in 2022? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rr_opponent?refcode=20211102-rr-EM&refcode2=5bf1b8bf-503c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8]
John King is our best shot at preventing a GOP takeover in the Mid-Atlantic region, but only if our campaign has the resources to spread our positive progressive message to voters in every part of the state.
We need to make sure Maryland goes blue in 2022— so please, give whatever you can to support our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rr_opponent?refcode=20211102-rr-EM&refcode2=5bf1b8bf-503c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8]
In solidarity,
Joe O'Hern
Campaign Manager, John King for Governor

I'm just as frustrated about these results as you are, but we can't sit down and let the GOP take over Maryland, too. Democrats can't take any race for granted in 2022, and this shows how critical it is to invest early in statewide races. Will you rush a donation now to invest early in flipping Maryland blue in 2022? [] John King is our best shot at preventing a GOP takeover in the Mid-Atlantic region, but only if our campaign has the resources to spread our positive progressive message to voters in every part of the state. We need to make sure Maryland goes blue in 2022— so please, give whatever you can to support our campaign today. [] In solidarity, Joe O'Hern Campaign Manager, John King for Governor [] Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his website [] . If you would prefer to not get updates from the campaign, please unsubscribe:

name: Team AOC
subject: One year out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
From day one, we have been defined by people-power. In 2020, we beat millions in corporate and special interest dollars with a movement. And we’re going to do it again. By once again proving that people-power is winning power.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211102-2629-header&t=1&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)
We’re exactly one year out from the 2022 midterms.
**And that means, today we’re officially kicking off Alexandria’s reelection campaign!**
We can’t take anything for granted. Last year Alexandria faced a record 13 opponents during the primary and a $10 million challenge during the general. And, already this year, she has three opponents raising thousands against her.
**So we’re going to need your help to build the powerful momentum and organizing program we’ll need to keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for our communities.**
[Will you endorse AOC’s reelection right now? Your commitment will show Republicans and corporate Democrats alike that AOC is here to stay »](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/endorse-aoc-reelection-2022/?refcode=em20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&source=em20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&t=2&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)
**[Endorse AOC »](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/endorse-aoc-reelection-2022/?refcode=em20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&source=em20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&t=3&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)**
**From day one, we have been defined by people-power.** In 2018, we beat a machine with a movement. In 2020, we beat millions in corporate and special interest dollars with that same movement. And we’re going to do it again. How? By once again proving that people-power is winning power.
Across the country, people look towards our campaign as a vanguard of progressive change. Every person who endorses Alexandria’s reelection isn’t just endorsing her — **they’re endorsing our movement and everything we’re fighting for.**
That has an impact. When other members of Congress or politicians see thousands of grassroots activists aligning themselves in support of Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and a livable minimum wage, it entices them to join our cause.
**But building a movement takes work. And there are already opponents aligning to try and stop our momentum. That’s why we’re asking for you to lend us one of your most powerful resources today:_Your voice._**
[So will you take a moment to lend us your grassroots endorsement right now, and tell the entire nation that you stand with AOC?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/endorse-aoc-reelection-2022/?refcode=em20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&source=em20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&t=4&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)
Thank you for everything.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC
**[Endorse AOC »](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/endorse-aoc-reelection-2022/?refcode=em20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&source=em20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&t=5&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&t=6&refcode2=2629_2526796_5ZD-KZ&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211102-2629-P_ENG_ANO_END&t=7&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2629%2E2526796%2E5ZD-KZ)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Margaret from Black America's PAC
subject: ⏳ While we wait for the results...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
⏱️ It's time to fight back, Peter... -
| | | | Dear Mr. Willis, As we await the election results in Virginia, _where one of our candidates, Winsome Sears, is running for Lt. Governor_... I wanted to reach out and make sure you didn't miss the important message from Alvin. We're fighting to propel the only two Black Republicans in Congress to reelection victory, but we really need your renewed support to make that happen. So please read Alvin's previous message to you (below) and respond as soon as possible. Thank you! \- Margaret
---
* * *
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Liquid error: comparison of ActiveSupport::SafeBuffer with 0 failed Dear Mr. Willis, The Democrats are coming after Burgess Owens & Byron Donalds (the only two Black Republicans in Congress) like nothing I've ever seen before... ...and the ONLY Black Conservatives left in Congress are in **serious trouble**. [](https://www.bampac.org/fightback?recruiter_id=61888&info=2021EA1204&sal=Peter&ask=20.22&utm_content=FightBack&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1204&n=1) [](https://www.bampac.org/fightback?recruiter_id=61888&info=2021EA1204&sal=Peter&ask=20.22&utm_content=FightBack&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1204&n=2) I'm writing to you, Peter, because patriotic conservatives like you were instrumental in helping Burgess & Byron beat the odds to win two hotly-contested races for U.S. House last election. But they need us now more than ever. You see, the Democrats have already stockpiled millions of dollars to relentlessly bombard Burgess & Byron with brutal attacks from now until Election Day, and their deep-pocketed Big Tech comrades are funneling in millions more. The Democrats are desperate to defeat these two outspoken Black conservative Congressmen because they're... | **☆** | Speaking truth directly to the Black Community
---|---
**☆** | Exposing the Democrats' race-baiting LIE that conservatives like you and me are all **racists**
**☆** | Reclaiming Black voters from the Democrat Party like never before
**The Democrats are launching an ALL OUT assault on Burgess Owens & Byron Donalds because they know that the _only_ _way_ _to_ _keep_ _their_ _stranglehold_ _on_ _Black_ _voters_ is to SILENCE _each and every_ outspoken Black conservative.**
The only Black Republicans in Congress desperately need your help to fight back against race-baiting Democrats hell-bent on taking them down...
**...but you haven't yet made a donation to help Burgess & Byron, and _they really need to know_ :**
Have you abandoned them at this critical time or will you help them fight back and win?
Peter, most people are giving $35 at this time, [but I'm hoping you'll Join the Fight with an emergency donation of just $20.22 today.](https://www.bampac.org/fightback?recruiter_id=61888&info=2021EA1204&sal=Peter&ask=20.22&utm_content=FightBack&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1204&n=3)
After all, if you and I don't help Burgess & Byron fight back, we'll have ZERO Black conservatives in Congress...
...and you know as well as I do that Democrats are drooling at the prospect of parading this fact in front of the mainstream media's cameras as PROOF that conservatives like you and me are all racists.
**You and I simply can't allow that to happen, Peter.**
[Can I count on you to JOIN THE FIGHT to help Burgess & Byron fight back with a gift of $20.22 at this critical time?](https://www.bampac.org/fightback?recruiter_id=61888&info=2021EA1204&sal=Peter&ask=20.22&utm_content=FightBack&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1204&n=4)
Or if that's just too much for you at this time, [please chip-in $15, $10, or even $5 as a symbol of your support for Burgess Owens & Byron Donalds, who are destroying the Democrats' racist lies and reclaiming Black voters.](https://www.bampac.org/fightback?recruiter_id=61888&info=2021EA1204&sal=Peter&ask=20.22&utm_content=FightBack&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1204&n=5)
Regardless of the amount, please give whatever you can today to show your support for Black conservatives like Burgess Owens & Byron Donalds at this critical time.
Your generous donation will be used to defend Burgess & Byron against the Democrats' vicious attacks and your support will go a long way helping to elect the largest class of Black conservatives running for office EVER!
[So please help Burgess & Byron FIGHT BACK with an urgent donation of $20.22, $30, or $40 today.](https://www.bampac.org/fightback?recruiter_id=61888&info=2021EA1204&sal=Peter&ask=20.22&utm_content=FightBack&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1204&n=6)
Thank you, and God Bless.
|
Alvin Williams
President
---|---
P.S. The Democrats are coming after newly-elected Reps. Burgess Owens & Byron Donalds like nothing I've ever seen before...
...because these two Black conservative Congressmen are **RECLAIMING** Black voters from the Democrat Party by **EXPOSING** the Democrats' race-baiting LIE that conservatives like you and me are all **racists**.
The Democrats know the _only_ _way_ _to_ _keep_ _their_ _stranglehold_ _on_ _Black_ _voters_ is to **SILENCE** outspoken Black conservatives like Burgess & Byron before they can destroy the Liberal LIES within the Black Community.
**That's why Democrats will stop at nothing to SHUT THEM UP!**
[So please help Burgess & Byron FIGHT BACK with an urgent donation of $20.22, $30, or $40 today.](https://www.bampac.org/fightback?recruiter_id=61888&info=2021EA1204&sal=Peter&ask=20.22&utm_content=FightBack&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1204&n=7)
Thank you and God Bless.
| | | |
---

Contributions are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. ---
You're receiving this email because you support our mission to reclaim Black voters by destroying the Liberal Lies. If you're giving up on this critical fight, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1204&n=8) to STOP receiving emails from Black America's PAC Action Fund.

name: Susie Lee HQ
subject: We fought hard in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
Here’s our plan moving forward

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38242180/314589042/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmQyYTgyMS01MjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhYBDlRYaeVGbdoFZcrs5kV28fYltIuEqcRYNdlw5fI=)

| | Team, if you haven’t heard the news, networks are **calling the Virginia Governor’s race for Republican Glenn Youngkin.** Although we knew this race was going to be close, **we have to take this loss and use it as motivation to _save our majorities in 2022._** Starting right now, it’s time to focus on preparing and organizing for the midterms. **Are you all in to help Democrats keep control of the House?** **TAKE ACTION: [_Chip in to help re-elect Susie Lee, running in one of the most crucial swing districts to hold the House!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38242181/314589043/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211102_FR_MCAULIFFELOSS_A0_na_U1_X1_M2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmQyYTgyMS01MjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhYBDlRYaeVGbdoFZcrs5kV28fYltIuEqcRYNdlw5fI=)** | | | [Chip in >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38242182/314589044/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211102_FR_MCAULIFFELOSS_A0_na_U1_X1_M2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmQyYTgyMS01MjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhYBDlRYaeVGbdoFZcrs5kV28fYltIuEqcRYNdlw5fI=)
---
The margin of victory for Republicans tonight may seem small but **it has to be a wake-up call for Democrats.** _Don’t forget, Joe Biden won Virginia by a commanding 10%._
So, while this appears as a slim Republican victory, we can’t afford a similar outcome in places like Nevada where **Susie Lee only won her seat by three points in 2020.** If we do, we will certainly lose Democratic control of the House by a large margin.
We can’t waste any time in amping up our efforts to keep Democrats in control of the House. [_**If you’re with us, can you help Susie’s campaign raise what it needs to remain competitive and win in 2022?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38242183/314589045/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211102_FR_MCAULIFFELOSS_A0_na_U1_X1_M2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmQyYTgyMS01MjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhYBDlRYaeVGbdoFZcrs5kV28fYltIuEqcRYNdlw5fI=)

clean_body: Here’s our plan moving forward | = | | Team, if you haven’t heard the news, networks are calling the Virginia Governor’s race for Republican Glenn Youngkin. Although we knew this race was going to be close, we have to take this loss and use it as motivation to save our majorities in 2022. Starting right now, it’s time to focus on preparing and organizing for the midterms. Are you all in to help Democrats keep control of the House? TAKE ACTION: = | | | = The margin of victory for Republicans tonight may seem small but it has to be a wake-up call for Democrats. Don’t forget, Joe Biden won Virginia by a commanding 10%. So, while this appears as a slim Republican victory, we can’t afford a similar outcome in places like Nevada where Susie Lee only won her seat by three points in 2020. If we do, we will certainly lose Democratic control of the House by a large margin.
